name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: I’m running for Congress

body:
My name is Kristen McDonald Rivet. I’m a Michigan state Senator, lifelong advocate for kids and families, and proud mom of 6. And I’m running for Congress in Michigan’s 8th District.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79272837/455968659/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTQyMGExYS1iYWNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FqaHtNxIIFZfb9ouvid8AGfk8xV-9DwYzqLTcsY-O6A=) My name is Kristen McDonald Rivet. I’m a Michigan state Senator, lifelong advocate for kids and families, and proud mom of 6. And I’m running for Congress in Michigan’s 8th District.

Experts say this race is a pure tossup after Democratic Rep. Dan Kildee announced his retirement, so I’m going to need your help to build a winning campaign. **[I’ll explain more about why I decided to run for Congress, but if you’re already with me, I hope you’ll contribute as much as you can today to support this campaign:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79272843/455968661/1433120897?refcode=email_021824_intro&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTQyMGExYS1iYWNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FqaHtNxIIFZfb9ouvid8AGfk8xV-9DwYzqLTcsY-O6A=)** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79272849/455968672/1433120897?refcode=email_021824_intro&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTQyMGExYS1iYWNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FqaHtNxIIFZfb9ouvid8AGfk8xV-9DwYzqLTcsY-O6A=)
---
**I’m running for Congress to restore what I call The Michigan Dream:** that if you work hard, you can own a home, pay your bills, put a little away for retirement, and maybe drive your family to Disney World every now and then.

I know this dream firsthand. Growing up in Portland, my dad worked construction, often clocking in 70 to 80 hours a week. When the construction season slowed down and it got cold, he worked snow removal to make ends meet. Like many people in this district, he showered at the end of his work day, not before it. Dad wasn’t afraid to get calluses on his hands through a tough day’s work. Thanks to him and my mom, my sisters and I were the first in our family to go to college, and I have been working to uplift families like ours ever since.

**Unfortunately, today, the Michigan Dream has become out-of-reach for too many Michiganders.** Combine that with extremists making us less safe by trying to take away the right to abortion and refusing to address the epidemic of gun violence, and it’s clear that we need to send real leaders to D.C. who we can trust to solve problems our community faces.

I have spent my adult life fighting to make it just a little easier for working families, like the one I grew up in, to achieve the Michigan Dream. Throughout my career and now in the state Senate, I’ve helped improve employment and educational opportunities for children across our state, pass historic tax cuts for working families, and enact public policy that’s helped level the playing field.

**I’m running for Congress because I am ready to help give hardworking families across the Great Lakes Bay Region the tools to succeed.**

**[But I can’t get there on my own. This is going to be one of the most competitive House races in the country – one that will determine whether or not Democrats take back the House. I’m counting on supporters like you to power this campaign. So please, will you chip in today to support my campaign for Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79272855/455968676/1433120897?refcode=email_021824_intro&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTQyMGExYS1iYWNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FqaHtNxIIFZfb9ouvid8AGfk8xV-9DwYzqLTcsY-O6A=)**

Friend,

**It’s a tale as old as time, yet the liberal mainstream media continues to shield their own.**
In the ongoing battle against the deep-seated corruption of the Democrat establishment, every revelation serves as a reminder that they will do anything to protect their own, no matter how bad the crime.

Not only the recent bombshell revelation of **Hunter Biden pocketing a cool $100,000 through a joint venture with a Chinese energy firm, but he also had access to sensitive areas where classified documents were stored,** including his father’s garage.

This sheds light on the alarming extent of the Biden family’s disregard for national security and their brazen abuse of power.

**Imagine if Joe Biden were a Republican – the hypocritical Democrats and mainstream media would be leading the charge for impeachment in the blink of an eye.**

Instead, they protect their own, disregarding the rampant corruption.

As true patriots fighting to preserve the sanctity of our country, we have to refuse to be silenced any longer.

clean_body: Tale as old as time: the mainstream media turns a blind eye | Friend, It’s a tale as old as time, yet the liberal mainstream media continues to shield their own. In the ongoing battle against the deep-seated corruption of the Democrat establishment, every revelation serves as a reminder that they will do anything to protect their own, no matter how bad the crime. Not only the recent bombshell revelation of Hunter Biden pocketing a cool $100,000 through a joint venture with a Chinese energy firm, but he also had access to sensitive areas where classified documents were stored, including his father’s garage. This sheds light on the alarming extent of the Biden family’s disregard for national security and their brazen abuse of power. Imagine if Joe Biden were a Republican – the hypocritical Democrats and mainstream media would be leading the charge for impeachment in the blink of an eye. Instead, they protect their own, disregarding the rampant corruption. As true patriots fighting to preserve the sanctity of our country, we have to refuse to be silenced any longer. | Stand with me in our relentless battle to pursue justice and ensure that the corrupt elites are brought to heel, no matter how high their ivory towers may be. Thank you, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2024 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Martinez, Yvette
subject: (no subject)
body:
I’ve been reflecting this evening on the incredibly high stakes in the 2024 election – especially here in California.
An article came out from the Associated Press recently that underscored this, and there are two telling excerpts that have stuck with me:
“Heavily Democratic California might appear an unlikely national battleground, but a string of competitive U.S. House contests is again poised to play a crucial role in determining control of the chamber [...]”
“Leaders in both parties agree that the outcome in California could be the lever that determines who holds the gavel in 2025, after GOP wins in 2022 helped the party gain control."
These excerpts sum up our challenge here at the California Democratic Party.
Our state is absolutely critical to retaking the House Majority and firing Speaker Mike Johnson, but because our state trends blue at the national level, we are often overlooked by grassroots donors.
I think that’s a mistake. And here are three points why:
(1) It was GOP wins here in 2022 that allowed them to narrowly take control of the U.S. House.
(2) The media, election analysts, and GOP leaders all agree that California is where the House Majority will be decided again in 2024.
(3) But despite that, our fundraising is slowing down ahead of our critical March Primary.
That’s the situation. We are investing heavily in our critical tossup seats, but the stakes are too high for us to not leave everything on the field. I want to expand our map to more purple seats and deepen our investments across the board, but I can’t do it without your support.
That’s why I’m hoping you’ll be willing to make a generous donation of $ or more. My personal ActBlue link is below, and I’d be incredibly grateful to see your donation come in.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-feb24?&refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-feb24?&refcode=&amount=]
Thank you for your leadership and partnership in taking back the House Majority this year.
- Yvette

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: We know it...they know it too...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1144%2E135344%2E20NZ7h)

Friend --
He's right.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240218-2&t=2&akid=1144%2E135344%2E20NZ7h)
The White House and the Senate will be decided in Michigan.
We've always known that. But we share Mike Rogers' tweet because our opponents know it too.
No surprise, of course they do.
That's why National Republicans have poured millions of dollars into the state to try and flip it Red. That’s why Trump was here just yesterday.
I don't take corporate PAC money. Mike Rogers, on the other hand, will take money from almost anyone – including most recently Betsy DeVos and Elon Musk’s SpaceX. And the Super PACs that are already spending over $1 million in TV ads right now... we may never know where their dark money comes from before the election ends.
Instead, our campaign is funded by lots and lots of people donating what they can, when they can. That's how we'll win this race.
So while we don't expect you to donate to every email, I hope you will to this one:
[**Can I ask you to use this link to contribute $3 to our campaign? Help us answer the avalanche of outside spending coming our way in Michigan. I can't do this alone.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240218-2&t=3&akid=1144%2E135344%2E20NZ7h)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Simply put: We can’t afford to lose Katie Porter in Congress. But recent polls show this is a very close race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Billionaires and special interest groups are getting involved in the 2024 elections as we speak

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1929%2E4032634%2EVFCbSM)
---
Billionaires and special interest groups are getting involved in the 2024 elections as we speak — currently spending millions against Katie Porter in the California Senate race. Super PACs are running misleading television and digital ads across the state in the final weeks ahead of the primary in the hopes of defeating her. Why could they be targeting Katie Porter? Oh I don’t know, it could be because of her record of calling out corporate greed and because she’s been a strong voice for consumers. [**Wealthy special interest groups have no place in our democratic process. If you’re able, please split a donation of $28 or anything you can between Katie Porter and my re-election campaign so that she can compete with this outside spending and we can fight on behalf of working people — not special interests — in the Senate together.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1895?amount=28&t=8&akid=1929%2E4032634%2EVFCbSM)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1895?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=1929%2E4032634%2EVFCbSM)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1895?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=1929%2E4032634%2EVFCbSM)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1895?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=1929%2E4032634%2EVFCbSM)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1895?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1929%2E4032634%2EVFCbSM)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1895?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1929%2E4032634%2EVFCbSM)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1895?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=1929%2E4032634%2EVFCbSM)
---

---
This is a make-or-break moment in Katie’s primary election, and she needs all hands on deck right now in order to secure advertising funding and mobilize voters. Simply put, we can’t afford to not have Katie Porter in office. California’s unique jungle primary system means the top two vote-getters, regardless of party, advance to the general, but recent polls indicate Katie is tied for second place with Republican celebrity Steve Garvey. Katie stands for getting big money out of politics, rooting corruption out of Washington, and making our government work for everyone, so it’s no wonder these special interest groups are spending big right now to keep her out of office. They'll do whatever they can to influence elections so that policies are written in their favor vs. in favor of consumers.

We've got to fight back right now with strong grassroots support for Katie. [**In the final weeks of her primary, can you please split $28 or anything you can to make sure Katie can win and we can fight for working families together in the Senate?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1895?amount=28&t=14&akid=1929%2E4032634%2EVFCbSM) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |

# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79273189/455977536/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240218_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2YzEzODA2LWJkY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0eV2hsAYS44KqkLUbWHMdo35wn6NkfuVPsI4VUvZa6E=)
Peter —

Never in my wildest dreams did I expect to be the Republican Party’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks. But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, **so be it.**

If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, **so be it.**

And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me “shifty Schiff” or a “sleaze bag” for holding him to account again (and again, and _again_), **so be it.**

**I wear their enmity as a badge of honor. The insults and attacks show that they’re terrified of how effective I’ve been — and I’m not letting my foot off the gas when it comes to defending our democracy from MAGA extremists like Trump, Carlson, McCarthy, or anyone else.**

[**Please, help me take our work to the United States Senate — the last place Trump wants me to be — by splitting a contribution between Upset the Setup and my campaign of $3 or any amount you can spare.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79273190/455977537/443154033?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240218_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2YzEzODA2LWJkY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0eV2hsAYS44KqkLUbWHMdo35wn6NkfuVPsI4VUvZa6E=)

clean_body: = Peter — Never in my wildest dreams did I expect to be the Republican Party’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks. But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, so be it. If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, so be it. And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me “shifty Schiff” or a “sleaze bag” for holding him to account again (and again, and again), so be it. I wear their enmity as a badge of honor. The insults and attacks show that they’re terrified of how effective I’ve been — and I’m not letting my foot off the gas when it comes to defending our democracy from MAGA extremists like Trump, Carlson, McCarthy, or anyone else. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thanks for your support, Peter. body:

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=4449508d3d964e6f94eacd69d0969ff3&_m=3e12d6fd1207433bbfceae8817cefed0&_e=e2NYBzajHsxEJ4XMBxqWs_QDk27YnofSrUZM8F5cPyjB82ukydPmQqc6KPAOKc3ndQhNNPD8oiHMH_DgVjXLP-OIEFCEYT6UOi2zgUebAod0kb5vh99pwBQPobosrUNURpBhb4d1FWzY8t3bbMveWvUF8LXZX_i3xsU9Pt-toYnQY_8lqm21rsi9o6Gmx_q0hPqHW_Pe4vWUWZ8VfLbQDBZ01OBXCpuA4lmDArs1haqrrbcvui8BICGS9qM2qkmw3u_pHFFPXFhz87-jY5Ausw%3D%3D)

| | Dear Friend,

It has only been one week since we announced that we launched our campaign to serve Maryland in the United States Senate, and the **momentum is building behind our campaign!**
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Check out our campaign launch video if you haven’t already seen it:
---
[| | |
---|---|---](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=4449508d3d964e6f94eacd69d0969ff3&_m=3e12d6fd1207433bbfceae8817cefed0&_e=e2NYBzajHsxEJ4XMBxqWs0uc2O836ltcUcSIT48HoZZQqln1nIFQmjLo56IP8NnRKvcPh8nF7HzSpHXOkDh_qkznvNI_-0qHo0QH96UH6fCxfWBBKog0BSWDP62ccD44XUHrvE0IiwUVWRWaKgD2CCzoGIzNr_YbrtUu5qlwvugN7QaJ3pt9V_N2VYzGsAiR3DxfXOmYD4VZwf3gnVgs5WDzWO3PnTOuf0wraKa5XOo%3D "Let’s Get Back to Work")
[This week](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=4449508d3d964e6f94eacd69d0969ff3&_m=3e12d6fd1207433bbfceae8817cefed0&_e=e2NYBzajHsxEJ4XMBxqWsxw6ufwJq0rhgp3FEbpHHydSpWGanxFcKX5RWFJRDnUfEc5cmjM2xzZqmPlNEpSYf01tL_6mm2ykJvozAn4VkpOsC9QstkLDE4UawtkNec6sPCB8RLhtmOkJdKqyP8JopPMsvgNLghUjXoIrLlsmizpo25zzPIpeCMUAhkgkwf9UsiiW74t0Ixg0bQMO20-jhAxmb00SruDTkYIx9-n4dlnJeljttPHqmTYIlgV_Ybek081j_sJfU9D1EF1I9Px1i1q_byxE8fjEF7yVft6WGlzPf-XHjKk4B8aHCSwubxi6), the leading candidate in the race, **General John “Dragon” Teichert, withdrew his candidacy and enthusiastically endorsed our campaign.** The General has given a lifetime of service and dedication to the country. He is a true patriot, devoted public servant, and a great Marylander. We are truly humbled to have his support, and we look forward to working alongside him to unite our party on the road to victory in November.
---
[| | |
---|---|---](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=4449508d3d964e6f94eacd69d0969ff3&_m=3e12d6fd1207433bbfceae8817cefed0&_e=e2NYBzajHsxEJ4XMBxqWs0uc2O836ltcUcSIT48HoZYP7tWnRcrspNha5jPv4pljE-3pJgtsrDjeamECySsXnj6LWOylzwOAAUZp3FBJNx4gXHmk1vmrcNOahWBaa44T7QHKWUHyqZyFwhuYjYu1BahOwNnfw1RngBZfGQoS9-IAB3ahd3lxro_HHI66uLx7v8VI_-00dNP81N9Zl9vRZEJhJ3WKB7Qv0H10WDOWuSc%3D "Brigadier General John Teichert Endorses Governor Larry Hogan for Senate")
Governor Hogan also spoke to The C4 and Bryan Nehman Show, Mikenzie Frost of Fox 45, Kate Amara of WBALTV, Leonard Fleming of DC News Now, and Tom Fitzgerald of Fox 5 about why he’s entered this race.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=4449508d3d964e6f94eacd69d0969ff3&_m=3e12d6fd1207433bbfceae8817cefed0&_e=e2NYBzajHsxEJ4XMBxqWswEGShHCGDMvKUnKwqrPI2egQFInD5rWCIFWAJuF-bT8gbSFw08kIbPjknN_Bjf1sRXOcFZK-WcoUK6MXNHsgl7WHUxou1CcxQMKm1x08WOwDw7WRTeA68287Y4Ei8JcM83uXGJaP6i87V4LEczAApKZRqQPKZK9i97vO7nG_8cB9XEPK7cE_V1TrDGcQs95Pw%3D%3D)
---
He is not running because he needs another title, but because Washington is completely broken. And like so many of us, he is completely fed up with politics-as-usual and the politicians who are more interested in arguing than in actually getting anything done for the people they represent.

**We can do so much better, but not if we just keep electing the same kind of typical partisan politicians.**

Our country is way off track, yet nothing seems to get done. We need someone who can bring people together and deliver results, just as Governor Hogan did in Annapolis.

**[We’ve done it before, and we can do it again. But we need your support — will you join our team today?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=4449508d3d964e6f94eacd69d0969ff3&_m=3e12d6fd1207433bbfceae8817cefed0&_e=e2NYBzajHsxEJ4XMBxqWs_QDk27YnofSrUZM8F5cPyjB82ukydPmQqc6KPAOKc3nEcCqS5Q22rYvpLpfffcEr4XVDpi_BSCtQac02SsrJ-MKayBzt1kZVsDa8RAcA5vresJKn5v12_oCGbVH0lhYV-tAPpMpuj8fPSec9cU2xBi2c0eiFg6JwoizwVU0xlj9OoOvyHUjHX8XOo_Jijvc6w_ICKcwOhkt-Yw0lhV2Y4eqTEh6ybOTnCyg6ADDM0yah3GHfi87bCBsXLJcru1Dgw%3D%3D)**

Together, we took on the career politicians in Annapolis and changed Maryland for the better.

**[**Can you chip in today to take on the career politicians in Washington?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=4449508d3d964e6f94eacd69d0969ff3&_m=3e12d6fd1207433bbfceae8817cefed0&_e=e2NYBzajHsxEJ4XMBxqWs_QDk27YnofSrUZM8F5cPyjB82ukydPmQqc6KPAOKc3nEcCqS5Q22rYvpLpfffcEr4XVDpi_BSCtQac02SsrJ-MKayBzt1kZVsDa8RAcA5vrMhmiWGY_K4SVrkpapO1che1zSu22mO_PAQHlg3IVW1anV5KP4_uoKs03fuVFPJr9d33Ur5eC01MSMN6DeW18WAzyVHGRYvdLimagWhL0EvnjGN5UUATgQBzkWut6-hZkmwqDNEG59fw9_eooctclhg%3D%3D)**

Let’s get back to work,
**Team Hogan**
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=4449508d3d964e6f94eacd69d0969ff3&_m=3e12d6fd1207433bbfceae8817cefed0&_e=e2NYBzajHsxEJ4XMBxqWs5WJ3ft9PnDS-kfbe6L73cDAgQpUO-sJZyf3XyyXS6GSmHlpXhucOVzweRM0ThRkGwMFmIh-_TfCMp3dJ5UJmbkEiXgA2y0FMKg9G_sQd2_4Jxk7TBgnUXKfAys4dGF2GCliVRpXXzYrmcHiSa-_hbn3A2pIalCQtBUVP4xbDqZzd0ulQhygpl78DVzaX299G8Oi1CaR5U49_P3ZJCUV8w8%3D) | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=4449508d3d964e6f94eacd69d0969ff3&_m=3e12d6fd1207433bbfceae8817cefed0&_e=e2NYBzajHsxEJ4XMBxqWs-DQvhxfqRaWI776bl2FcJJIZpboNC6mNr-jL-Nzb51nKolTWNMZSKkMEFuFqRvUcyL477lerbuEfv-ihItz7tnaGhkgC07wW_eFxjBfJUTv_iibsi1erIyVx3YRR7DCOFmqPdXZeIOQ1q-H0TBhPXrfNp221QceAmyErZ-NZJRlBJhUmfVuLP31MtmZ5GwBTQ%3D%3D)| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=4449508d3d964e6f94eacd69d0969ff3&_m=3e12d6fd1207433bbfceae8817cefed0&_e=e2NYBzajHsxEJ4XMBxqWs5LCjTYYWLe9baYPSdm7abKuPMOAwul0lriAx0O_Iqrpq0LgQb0QcFfz4Y1q2jAVeAu1fZJ5qYFZmcctI5MewGoRdvVnCjEOw6pRu5dcPnLGJNqhTZ_s4KqzBwwjjWaiV_eRmira7ir3Ngn6xqdd3bwE_VA23xWzb70G7Ytse8M3Uuwr-MzzGjkq0fxhPiXyASPZz7smAw4QYGwJVchr2Og%3D)
---|---|---

name: Debbie
subject: Extremists are trying to take away our right to choose (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
enough is enough
| | |
---
Friend, I'm furious. Just last month, Florida activists secured hundreds of thousands of signatures to put codifying reproductive rights on the ballot this November.

**But now, far-right extremists are SUING to remove this question from the ballot.**
Unfortunately, this is just the latest example of out-of-touch extremists trying to silence Florida voters. From abortion rights to voting rights, whether in the state house in Tallahassee or on the Senate floor in Washington, our leaders are forcing their extreme agenda on Florida families.
**Ya no más — enough is enough. I refuse to stand for it. That’s why I'm running for Senate to defeat Rick Scott, restore abortion rights nationwide, and give Florida the leadership that we deserve.[_And now, with all eyes on our state, I'm counting on you to stand with me: Please, will you donate $5 or more before midnight tonight to help me flip Florida blue and fight for families?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79273557/455990688/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk829-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMwZDU4ODMtYzFjZS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tkTR-o8znCfVKknmUOSOm4rpyZmoyX7Rj8v_EtvK6sc=)**

It's no secret why far-right extremists are working so hard to take this question off the ballot: They know that Florida is ready to follow states like Ohio and Kansas to reject our radical abortion ban and choose to protect our right to privacy, our right to choice, and our most basic freedoms.

No matter how many lawsuits they file or lies they spread, the GOP can't change it: **Abortion is going to be the driving force at the ballot box this November. And that's why Rick Scott and his campaign are absolutely _spiraling_.**
He knows his record on choice is nothing short of abysmal. That's why he's panicking, and calling me a liar to the press every chance he gets. **Friend, let me make this clear: Rick Scott co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions, just like the statewide one that his radical friend Ron DeSantis signed here in Florida last year.** I am unapologetically pro-choice, and his accusations don't scare me. I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom.
**I know that we can defeat Rick Scott this fall, but only if people like you believe in Florida and invest in our campaign.[_So I'm asking one last time: Please, will you donate now to help me defend our Senate majority, flip Florida blue, and restore abortion access across all 50 states?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79273562/455990693/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk829-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMwZDU4ODMtYzFjZS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tkTR-o8znCfVKknmUOSOm4rpyZmoyX7Rj8v_EtvK6sc=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79273563/455990694/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk829-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMwZDU4ODMtYzFjZS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tkTR-o8znCfVKknmUOSOm4rpyZmoyX7Rj8v_EtvK6sc=)

Thank you so much,

Debbie

Friend, far-right extremists like Jim Jordan and Rick Scott have been scheming for _years_ to cut Social Security and other lifesaving programs like Medicare. In 2023, President Biden destroyed their hopes of passing cuts through Congress — but this fight is far from over.
Now, the Supreme Court has heard arguments on a case that could DOOM Social Security, Medicare, the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau and so many other programs that American families rely on.
_Experts are warning that the Supreme Court's ruling could even "trigger a second Great Depression!"_
**We need Americans to make their voices heard loud and clear NOW to tell the extremists on the Court that we won't let them destroy these programs that millions of us count on. But our petition is missing 1,295 signatures — including yours! [_Please, will you add your name before our 11:59 p.m. deadline tonight to protect Social Security from right-wing extremists?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79274282/455996199/-469023099?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4821-su-nd&refcode=jtk4821-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjQ2ZGRlNi1jMmNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0EJbEBnFHZBzY2RKljXBMM6S0DMw682yboeWRUq2ZEE=&emci=f4e316f6-2dcc-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=b246dde6-c2ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=7659029)**

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79274284/455996201/1575385346?code=jtk4821-su-nd&refcode=jtk4821-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjQ2ZGRlNi1jMmNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0EJbEBnFHZBzY2RKljXBMM6S0DMw682yboeWRUq2ZEE=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. clean_body: Friend, add your name before our 11:59 p.m. deadline tonight | | | SCOTUS ALERT:Supreme Court set to rule on case that could END Social Security! | | Friend, far-right extremists like Jim Jordan and Rick Scott have been scheming for years to cut Social Security and other lifesaving programs like Medicare. In 2023, President Biden destroyed their hopes of passing cuts through Congress — but this fight is far from over. Now, the Supreme Court has heard arguments on a case that could DOOM Social Security, Medicare, the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau and so many other programs that American families rely on. Experts are warning that the Supreme Court's ruling could even "trigger a second Great Depression!" We need Americans to make their voices heard loud and clear NOW to tell the extremists on the Court that we won't let them destroy these programs that millions of us count on. But our petition is missing 1,295 signatures — including yours! | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: My mom is pretty worried she’s going to lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I have homework to get to so I’m going to keep this quick
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37879%2E3422442%2EXKTngs)
Paul (Katie Porter’s son) here! I have homework to get to so I’m going to keep this quick. . . **[can you chip in $3 to my mom’s campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240218-2?refcode=em20240218-37879&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37879_3422442_XKTngs&akid=37879%2E3422442%2EXKTngs)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240218-2?refcode=em20240218-37879&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37879_3422442_XKTngs&akid=37879%2E3422442%2EXKTngs)
I know my mom will make a great Senator, **but right now she’s pretty worried she’s going to lose.** Even when I turn on the TV or watch YouTube videos I see ads lying about her record. There are positive ads about her too, but you just don’t see those as often. She says she has to raise more money if she’s going to increase her ads, so if you can spare $3 or $5, I know she’d be so grateful!!
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240218-2?refcode=em20240218-37879&refcode2=37879_3422442_XKTngs&akid=37879%2E3422442%2EXKTngs)
Paul

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. subject: Help Gabe Evans Get on the Ballot – Sign the Petition Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Gabe Evans
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://wayrap.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjYwMjExMCxcImxcIjoxMTM1Njg4NjI0MDgwMTcyODMsXCJyXCI6MTEzNTY4ODYzNDE1Njk5MzQ3fSIsInMiOiI5MTM2NDQzNjYwZmZiYWNiIn0)
| |
---
|
---
| Friend, We need your help to ensure that Gabe Evans appears on the ballot as the conservative champion for Colorado's 8th Congressional District. Your signature on Gabe's petition is crucial to making that happen! **Why Sign Gabe's Petition?** Gabe Evans is a proven leader with a track record of serving our community. From his time as a combat veteran to his service as a former police lieutenant and conservative state representative, Gabe has consistently demonstrated his dedication to our values and our district. **How You Can Help:** Signing Gabe's petition is a simple yet powerful way to support his candidacy. If you're located in Colorado's 8th Congressional District, we want to make it as easy as possible for you to sign. Simply reply to this email with your address and a convenient time, and a member of our team will personally come to collect your signature. **Your Support Matters:** Your signature is more than just a name on a piece of paper – it's a statement of your commitment to ensuring that our community is represented by a true conservative leader. name: Katie Britt
subject: I have something exciting to share with you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
My whole life, I’ve defied the political establishment | Peter,

I have something special for you.

My new memoir [**“God Calls Us to Do Hard Things”**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=231a7ecbb3b7485290b75eed250d1dda&_e=Q1tbFdWUe_wx4KBcoLgCcF-UsmbMpEaXY4vFj33oUrOWaFb18NYsDHJ-v3kO4edhYD5B0m1sCGnc9yu-QM4P0GDU3Paahuyu1c2xqIO52nlONeojX7Bs4vQbNUlQz6YBQ1QhzaQVInAa2wTD0Jre3KNzqhHpUHk0qU-KZdbdPLbg1NYX0HiRCz3GNlKiNNeFKBEoCEgjcKNB4LIB-VORgUS32Ww0ZaDJaviiZlJCN8n-VobAGbYcTto5QFuWPNV-tVRhkVXomIoaTigUB6cEAjK9FYqU7MT09lBEnAevHW9eaSolA8WnJzcPRN2Nt6NyTuY6sNIQB9qlK0BpXn3Ey4qR2GDBcR8vmvSCDahhGbGEL7S28AzysKJtDm4hdV_5bO0a8jk5Z8IgbozIaMNkH6fhRKD0RL0SRPB-QEqFtSiRII5DB62mcSLRGzlf0fVa) was recently released, and I want to send you a limited edition, hand-signed copy.

During my career, I’ve overcome setbacks, defied expectations, and shocked the political establishment by becoming [**the youngest Republican woman to ever serve in the United States Senate.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=231a7ecbb3b7485290b75eed250d1dda&_e=Q1tbFdWUe_wx4KBcoLgCcF-UsmbMpEaXY4vFj33oUrOWaFb18NYsDHJ-v3kO4edhYD5B0m1sCGnc9yu-QM4P0GDU3Paahuyu1c2xqIO52nlONeojX7Bs4vQbNUlQz6YBQ1QhzaQVInAa2wTD0Jre3KNzqhHpUHk0qU-KZdbdPLbg1NYX0HiRCz3GNlKiNNeFKBEoCEgjcKNB4LIB-VORgUS32Ww0ZaDJaviiZlJCN8n-VobAGbYcTto5QFuWPNV-tVRhkVXomIoaTigUB6cEAjK9FYqU7MT09lBEnAevHW_66k5BPRpOlZTntu-EmEoxox0YyOe2mmj5BVtW3VYFBBLPatHNF4TDqvIuEA2rbvawefp4QlrAl_lRmSDAUpU_krDwg_s20uAw1CY83ep-jqkR-e8L-93wfhgzXpAcjg282MUHcmRIQiljMHGqCmX8) Now, I want to share some of my stories with patriots like you.

| | I just finished our first debate of this primary, and I hope I made you proud tonight. If you were watching, what you saw were two very different candidates running two very different campaigns. Because of supporters like you, we've built a grassroots movement that is working hard every day to restore integrity and give voters their voice back in New Jersey politics. What we saw from the First Lady was very different; hers is a campaign powered by the well-off and well-connected. Hers is a campaign fueled by corporate PAC money. Hers is a campaign that simply refused to answer why the First Lady has always put people in power first; whether it was donating six-figures to Republicans or letting party bosses, not people, try to decide this election. clean_body: If you were watching, what you saw were two very different candidates running two very different campaigns. | | | | I just finished our first debate of this primary, and I hope I made you proud tonight. If you were watching, what you saw were two very different candidates running two very different campaigns. Because of supporters like you, we've built a grassroots movement that is working hard every day to restore integrity and give voters their voice back in New Jersey politics. What we saw from the First Lady was very different; hers is a campaign powered by the well-off and well-connected. Hers is a campaign fueled by corporate PAC money. Hers is a campaign that simply refused to answer why the First Lady has always put people in power first; whether it was donating six-figures to Republicans or letting party bosses, not people, try to decide this election. The contrast is clear. But we need your help to get the word out. = Our grassroots campaign has powered us forward to this moment, and I'm glad you're alongside me in this fight. Thank you, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . name: Katie Britt
subject: I have something exciting to share with you, Fellow American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
My whole life, I’ve defied the political establishment | Fellow American,

I have something special for you.

My new memoir [**“God Calls Us to Do Hard Things”**](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=0d4e7e6cdd334750a13ee2456850ea11&_e=pZri0zVY_gU5JTj8ITxoK0iYQYY8W2RR9s6OQGwqTzBuH_ObPQ1hpGpsf9GM2plJJjI9S-TmBN272d5OgLf7xwGDUtp9_lOndgV1VDd4lz3kt8uqtmTmbzCsyzv-HMccI4rWFRyxJlUxdqDpJ870v_XA8YMc9dF4rKUzGzsS95zNEC-XVj5kiNTI7nRCYXngjemzCw9yc88I2CZUBn1m-XPBN5CshEYo-gW5WQxOVPH5YOzbW748nYYy3aUsewSL90ycBnyc5maEV6BW_XdWerpnmBox09lQnGO9pCazCHokJuIH6iJ36Xsuw1hQ_9m5PuZpG4d6lMs8SkOxuIawpFngN9z1Qj63xVbhmu8YtJChAGpgBEvlIxVH40UXa_0nzkiUqac9Fn_6dqeMWfbz53EyC47Md8FeC9m066pzfvY9xrXNXMBExrVNk_BlRK73) was recently released, and I want to send you a limited edition, hand-signed copy.

name: AMAC Action
subject: Healthcare for illegals but not for Veterans
body:
Medicare is being slashed...the border is WIDE OPEN...

| |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1g2k242br5i3ba0uv2840n24ik8679tfiip7h4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spgm0ob6c3h2bs)
---
Fellow American,Medicare is being slashed...the border is WIDE OPEN...and the Veterans Administration (VA) has a massive backlog of claims from our veterans......but now Joe Biden and the VA are colluding with ICE to help **pay for illegal immigrant healthcare** – on your dime. The most important thing we do here at AMAC Action is fight for policies that keep more of your hard-earned money in your pocket.That’s why I want to know what you think:**_Should your tax dollars be used for illegal migrants or Veterans who honorably served and risked their lives for this country?_**
---
| | [**Illegal Immigrants**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmlok25f163dbajfnf1euhomi64d6bga3lvasuqg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spgm0ob6c3h2bs)
---
[**Veterans**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4v4euab25ilv4r6obkm414oeafenf00vg8gebdg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spgm0ob6c3h2bs)
---
Friend, I think this is a no brainer. You and I live in a world where the government continues to slash our benefits. Medicare benefits are always on the cutting board. Social Security is running out. And we pay more for groceries and gas every month.It’s not fair that Joe Biden is using our tax dollars to give free healthcare to freeloading illegal migrants while you and I struggle to stretch every dollar. Last month, Senator Tommy Tuberville introduced legislation to bar the VA from using resources “to provide health care or engage in claims processing for illegal migrants.”That’s the kind of legislation Congress must pass to stop Joe Biden’s betrayal of taxpayers and Veterans.And it’s the kind of legislation AMAC Action is proud to support. If you stand with AMAC Action against the Biden administration, please make your voice heard by answering the poll above – and consider making a generous donation to AMAC Action.
---

---
Bob Carlstrom, PresidentAMAC Action

subject: Breaking Alert: Biden Exec Order Threatens Millions of Americans
body:
Wake up! Your financial liberty is under SIEGE!

| | | |
---
| | | Dear Fellow American,
Wake up! Your financial liberty is under SIEGE! Biden's Executive Order 14067 is not a mere policy shift; it's an outright WAR on your retirement savings. Imagine waking up to a reality where your hard-earned dollars are replaced by a digital leash, dubbed "FedCoin" – a Central Bank Digital Currency that gives the government absolute control over your savings.
This is not a drill.**It's a Red Alert for every American.**
---
| | | **The writing is on the wall:** the dollar is plummeting, our national debt is skyrocketing, and now, Biden's digital dollar is the **final nail in the coffin for your financial independence.** You must act NOW to protect your future.
**What's at stake? Everything.**
* **Your privacy?** Gone, as every transaction becomes an open book for government scrutiny.
* **Your freedom?** Stripped away, as the government gains the power to freeze your assets on a whim.
* **Your savings?** Devalued, as the dollar's collapse is accelerated by reckless policies and foreign adversaries conspiring against it.

Remember **the fall of the Italian Lira, the German Deutsche Mark, and the Venezuelan Bolivar?** They were once robust currencies, now reduced to historical footnotes. **This is our future if we don't act.**
But there's a way out. **A loophole that the government hasn't closed yet.**

**Don't wait until it's too late.** The **digital dollar is ALREADY in its late experimentation phase** , and its launch is imminent. Your window of opportunity is closing fast.

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: The Conversation That Saved 100 Souls
body:
| [](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD0zNTk3MTcifQ/MQrQ-aJy9ZJ5VF4O8iKn8w)
---
# **[The Conversation That Saved 100 Souls](http://trk.libertyledger._3E85HCnOqPQ)**
---
After his conversation with Myles Rutherford at Dream City Church, more than a hundred people came forward to give their lives to God. Listen to Rutherford at Freedom Night in America, as he talks about the choice between letting America become a fully non-religious nation in a single generation, or rallying to revive the faith in the greatest Christian nation to ever exist.
**Read More**
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9MTE5NDg4In0/5sgbpnvfJkTHFKiF0rVXNQ)
# **[Christian groups urge 'matriarch of modern Qatar' to use influence to help free hostages in Gaza](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9MTE5NDg4In0/5sgbpnvfJkTHFKiF0rVXNQ)**
---
Christian groups have launched a campaign urging Moza bint Nasser, the mother of Qatar’s Emir, to leverage her influence for the release of hostages in Gaza. A billboard featuring bint Nasser and an Israeli infant hostage appeared in Times Square, New York City, bearing the plea “It’s in your hands” and “Release the hostages.”
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9MTE5NDg4In0/5sgbpnvfJkTHFKiF0rVXNQ)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD0zNTk3MTcifQ/fmHuFJzsygjgtbW2A7CzoQ)

[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9MTE5NDg4In0/5Z2R70VDWBKlBwqLH8Z2yg)
# **[Hillary Releases New Line Of Cement Shoes](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9MTE5NDg4In0/5Z2R70VDWBKlBwqLH8Z2yg)**
---
U.S. — Not to be outdone by former President Trump, Hillary Clinton announced she had released her own line of shoes that come with just enough cement in the bottom to sink straight to the bottom of the sea.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9MTE5NDg4In0/5Z2R70VDWBKlBwqLH8Z2yg)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-Q)
# **[Amy Schumer's 'Life& Beth' Returns, Warts and All](http://trk.libertyledger.-Q)**
---
Whether its second season will end as charmingly as its first remains to be seen, but one thing is certain: Schumer’s journey to self-actualization makes for some genuinely funny moments.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-Q)

name: Mike Soboleski
subject: We've won 4 in a row!
body:
Soboleski wins Franklin and Penobscot straw polls!
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lJ-Fh1nvFi7gHDDHCTWIyG4IkZM8IPBbUbmDjrMyyqqvTpddxPBVxibcdADlyhThHxMHbBRdeSDXVONHS_GaoFv_ISAz5Fmy6YOX7DAyDM4JLt2SmjO6LHGPoZdPEgZ5V4mdFF9B-gZFNvx5OU0VVg==&c=Urk2R953tNvC1KItPo__FTy-LaU9Xpe_rdSbzLbMTcy2ouJqKJD0Lg==&ch=p4ESrJ-XYdudJb8tUXf-_9Tj8uE2Hu5qdA4M_gS27FAOYYEvrJx-Cg==)
---
---
|
# ONE OF US- FIGHTING FOR US!
---
---
| Fellow Patriots,

---
|
---
| My friends,
Happy President's Day! We are using the day to reflect on a busy week on the campaign trail. Over the weekend I was able to speak in Farmington, Rumford, Garland and Brewer.
Representative Katrina Smith was able to advocate for the campaign at an event in Palmyra. We thank her for that and everything she does for her District in Augusta.
That's five events in two days!
In Farmington they had a straw poll for Franklin County and in Brewer they had straw poll for Penobscot County. I am so happy to report that our campaign won both of these polls! We won by 80% in Franklin and 55% in Penobscot. I am so grateful to everyone who attended, listened and voted.
There have been four straw polls for the Republican Primary for CD2.
Our team has won them all!!!
Words cannot express how thankful for my team and the voters who so desperately want change in their representation. The polls show that CD2 voters want the conservative fighter with the conservative record to back it up!
Take the day to recharge and enjoy family time. We are back to work tomorrow to spread our message that the real conservative will win the CD2 Primary and beat Jared Golden in November!
Stay safe,
Mike
---

# MONDAY, FEBRUARY 19, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this date in 1945, the U.S. Marines invaded Iwo Jima, beginning one of World War II's bloodiest battles in the Pacific. It lasted five weeks, and the Marines lost 7,000 men before taking control of the island. ([See Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7GOhCAQgOGnwQ4D4whaUFxjt9deaUDHdTa4GCRL9u0ve_XVX_Hn_7nNN8-Rn_dvf5ArW5r9UvhFM0g9SsAZm9VtREBdQ05bNXR914222Z3xK_QBeht6M-CgYfGwGRpQBW0QQsMOFKACPWrVG23anhBVsKhwWKztRoGKVi4pt4_Ez7LTFt_pRbld0tFEt5dyXqL7EjAJmGqt7c5XSfn9cQFTSScv14dSjqusPktmAVPwpUSSaZNck3zw4Zvs1rNyjHwZK1DdD8_xr1L-ff4NAAD__yIkV5Y)) Happy Presidents Day! Because of today's holiday, be aware that federal offices will be closed, the stock market isn't open, and there'll be no U.S. mail delivery. There _will_ be plenty of Presidents Day sales waiting at local stores. In case you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, you can do that here [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuszAQAOCnsbeg8_mMYfDwSxHTT9eOyOADrjUQETdV376qOjb7N32v_dBHybIvL3HjUOZjiFORBw94Me0FaSCdwsyMbDUH46GxztrW6zUgJmcSJueIzJgQAcaJItY0Q-NnoyUgIAGa1oCrTV05JoLRE1AzeW9bRcBJynFWb4fsZeU5fx0PPqvp2HQOaym3u7L_FHYKu79EYdfHRab_sr__GNuxstd0-5Sc5V57RbBsUfKvrT_KpuyVQJ_hudHlacB3AAAA__8nMFoH). Today, we're taking off with our friends at [Incogni.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwzAMBNCvkbcYFEVb9qChQOAtXTsaikw6LBQrcNQU_fsibceOdzc84N5O8ylq1m19jVcOVcocU9UHz3iw4wFppmYJwozsGg7Ww-A650bfXAKfUbgb3DhQf4boAQCEXJeYoohQowEBCdCOFrre9m3HRHD2BDQk791oCHjRWvb2vehWLyz5qzx4b1O5Njlcar3djXsxOBmcVq6tbqmsm7ZaDE5RZE7GTUWE91kX447WdtZg_1x-8zDgs7iXjz2xccc_oNnDcvvUnPXee0OwXqPmH7X--8F3AAAA__9H2lq3) They exist to protect your personal information online; check them out!
|
---
## White House Backs Off Electric Car Push
The Biden administration reportedly plans to relax its [proposal for strict limits on tailpipe emissions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOrCAUxvGnwQ4DBxQtKG5jN7fd0oAcx7NBMMiOO2-_ceutf8mXL_-Px_xwFCk9_7sdbV3z7JZKL5yBy5GDnnUT7IoIqBq00ohBdUqNptnsIjqv_dANypgBOqnCCMF7saLzptdjQxYEaAFylKLrZd92qLXwRgs9LMaokWmBgWou7WemVDdc4zu_sLRL3ptot1qPk6l_DCYG03Vd7ZL8ciOD6Z5mMAlgMMmBweQpYOIu7JTorMVVyonXzAseuVQM8c0LRvfN8cXLV0R-s6N40IEcdzpPyulst7rHpthwXBQjnb1hWjx3R_H3VP0z0U8AAAD__1yCZ9s) designed to push Americans to buy electric vehicles by 2030. The rollback in the White House position was a result of [strong lobbying from car manufacturers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OozAURp_GdBf5DwwFxaagWCnbbokMXMLN-CeynVh5-1Gmnur7pNMcnf_X5WrJUbj9sx6ncsTFboVeuEgQI0i96GafDkSJqsFJGD6oTqnRNOek1t4YYfYeu30Y-Gi6Q2ybVWYYVimRNzRJLjWXYhS860Xfdqg1X43metiMUSPTHHcqMbX3SKGceLh3fGFqt-gbN52lPDJTf5icmZxrra3P4cOYnDHAMzM5B6yfeURHhbbPdXFd35RLhlxt8lBPKghnfGYEm2GlHQNk8PYeE7zwpM0hoKecKQZIT4cZAtrE5GwTXC6Czq-_pUnT_qjkHOXeMM1v3pL78Sy_VvsOAAD__0IGb5k) and dealers, who said the original timetable wasn't feasible, considering consumers' current unwillingness to buy electric vehicles. The original proposal was to have 67% of all cars on the road be electric by 2032; the current number is 8%. Reports say the new proposal won't require that kind of sharp increase until [several years later](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LuuozAYBOCnMZ2R8QXbhYtNQZeVttoSGfhJ_pUvyHbC5u2POPVpv5FGo_l7n-8eA6bHbx_BtT3Pfm34hpnTwVIuZ9ltbgfgIDpwg2ZGKCGs7p6Os8WYUe-rUiuTw6Ks2D0YBd5YY4Xq0HHGJeODHZgah7FXICVbtGTSrFoLSySDDVsu_b-MqT1hD5_8htKvOXbBPVs7KhG_CJ8In87z7GNNV0b4BIm-KuFTzAk-hE9rjodPCJctuEGifouYsLbiG-ZEW6YFgv9P4U3LKwC9zGM48AAKEWvFnCpNn0YLHLm0q8kXersN2Oof2xW3HSeGgHXURLJH9Bi-h7Yfb_sKAAD__9CwcEU), a relief for car companies.
## Abuse Call Ends With Police, Paramedic Dead
Two police officers and a firefighter-paramedic [were killed Sunday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL8Gb0T4jI0ZPHTxlq4dLQKHuQqDZU6J-vdVOnd70lue3td9uzvKVPZPd-DCsW7OMz1xA9lbCXrTXVgiIuDQ4dIbNQ_jMFjTpWXu1WPCaR4nC97aAGiiRhe0chBgho4WUKAV9LZX49RPtxG1Vg-jlZ69MYMVWmEgrtftu1LhhDH_1CdeN1-PLi-J-Wxi-BCwClg5YaKc307AmuqBBV9NwNrYMcqXY58ErFqb0Y6TBHnWTB5ljZE8Xk32MtKFkfbEeMmALkgX33hhO2sJVHbJVYZ6YGPykoqngIUlFXlQKdgqOwFrdy3hfFHO1CYjtNoPR39ZHf878DcAAP__1w1zFA) while responding to a domestic abuse call in the Minneapolis suburb of Burnsville. A SWAT team killed the shooter. Officials said the officers arrived at the house about 2:30 a.m. to find [a man armed and barricaded ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGTpCAUhH-NZs9CRNGA4CYwm0svtBh4jO8WwQVGa_fXbznxRt1dXdXV9f27L3dNnsLzr95QFRcXbQoduHBoJ-BiEbVVDpFjV6NqJRu7vusmWa_KjKM0kxt61ALN-LBa8nEw0ri2721va1KcccF4O7WsH9qh6VEI9pCCidFI2U2VYGipxNT8jxTKis5_xQNTY-JWe7WWsueq-1PxueLzeZ7NlsPVVXzGAK9c8TngecnbrzElcmSAwx49GYToHBlMGTa0ZOCDvEcLFODxSiEfV4SNQsAci4a8xlgoPMHTgfDarS547eoEt1tL5fvT1knZ_STvKQ-yEuy5afLvu-VXeD8BAAD__1Vuc0k)with family members, including multiple children. The shooting started about three hours later. The paramedic was shot while trying to help a wounded officer. Police swarmed the neighborhood, and "_at approximately 8 a.m., the suspect was reported to be dead_." City officials said the other family members were safe.

clean_body: White House lawyers wrote repeatedly to Attorney General Merrick Garland ahead of Special Counsel Robert Hur's report, strongly objecting to Hur's comments on President Biden's memory issues, | | | | | | MONDAY, FEBRUARY 19, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1945, the U.S. Marines invaded Iwo Jima, beginning one of World War II's bloodiest battles in the Pacific. It lasted five weeks, and the Marines lost 7,000 men before taking control of the island. () Happy Presidents Day! Because of today's holiday, be aware that federal offices will be closed, the stock market isn't open, and there'll be no U.S. mail delivery. There will be plenty of Presidents Day sales waiting at local stores. In case you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can do that here . Today, we're taking off with our friends at They exist to protect your personal information online; check them out! | White House Backs Off Electric Car Push The Biden administration reportedly plans to relax its designed to push Americans to buy electric vehicles by 2030. The rollback in the White House position was a result of and dealers, who said the original timetable wasn't feasible, considering consumers' current unwillingness to buy electric vehicles. The original proposal was to have 67% of all cars on the road be electric by 2032; the current number is 8%. Reports say the new proposal won't require that kind of sharp increase until , a relief for car companies. Abuse Call Ends With Police, Paramedic Dead Two police officers and a firefighter-paramedic while responding to a domestic abuse call in the Minneapolis suburb of Burnsville. A SWAT team killed the shooter. Officials said the officers arrived at the house about 2:30 a.m. to find family members, including multiple children. The shooting started about three hours later. The paramedic was shot while trying to help a wounded officer. Police swarmed the neighborhood, and "at approximately 8 a.m., the suspect was reported to be dead." City officials said the other family members were safe. List: Ranking Home Prices Across U.S. The most expensive neighborhood in America is South of Market in San Francisco, where the average home costs $5,415 per square foot, while the least expensive is Homewood North in Allegheny County, PA., at an average price of $29 per sq. ft. Those are the extreme ends of by American Home Shield insurance analysts. Not surprisingly, the priciest neighborhoods are in California, New York, and Florida. The least expensive are in Pennsylvania, Ohio, Missouri, and Indiana. You can see the top 20 on both ends at the link above. You can of every state's cheapest and costliest neighborhoods. body:
Ugh, Friend. This isn’t the email I wanted to send today, but it’s the email I have to send.

Ugh, Friend. This isn’t the email I wanted to send today, but it’s the email I have to send.

body:
Ugh, Friend. This isn’t the email I wanted to send today, but it’s the email I have to send.

| |
---
| | | Ugh, Friend. This isn't the email I **wanted** to send today, but it's the email I _**have**_ to send.
You see, I fell short of my February Mid-Month Goal, and now, I have to face the reality that I could lose in November because I didn't have the resources to get my message, my story, or my values out on the airwaves.
**One last try** - I'm extending the deadline for _**TEN MINUTES**_ in hopes that you'll send in a donation to help me hit my February Mid-Month Goal and stay the course to win in November:
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z943tln5q4gvssm52rb7l9jsgbhi4l3701458kf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm8pr4sph2bs "10 minute timer")
---
| | [I'LL CHIP IN, DERRICK!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrer8tlat6so4mkvr8fl08ncodpr4vvqthsjd5o8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm8pr4sph2bs "I’LL CHIP IN, DERRICK!")
---
Democrats hate that I speak my mind and call out their BS for what it is... **_BS_**! In fact, Democrats working in the White House, Senate, and House have spent all year attacking me. They've pretty much been against me ever since I pulled into DC on my Harley motorcycle.

I'm not going to let DC Democrats get away with "business-as-usual," and that's why I'm reaching out to you one last time.
---
| | [HELP DERRICK REACH HIS FEB. GOAL!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8gl0uqhtte9uklqkr38hs5kf4e05icf2sv286j0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm8pr4sph2bs "HELP DERRICK REACH HIS FEB. GOAL!")
---
Please, Friend, remember that I'm counting on you!

Thank you in advance for stepping up,
Derrick Van Orden
---

* * *
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdh247mmrdocunfu2gstmjlih7pd3c3os99o4f60_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm8pr4sph2bs)
---

My story is simple. I was raised in rural poverty by a single mother on food stamps. At 18, I joined the Navy. After 26 years of service and 5 combat tours, I retired as a Navy SEAL Senior Chief. Now, I'm serving as a first-term Congressman for Wisconsin's 3rd District.

I'm not a swamp-dwelling politician - I don't have support from mega-donors or Super PACs. I'm just like you - **a concerned American who loves this nation and will always do the right thing.**

[The Democrats are going at me with everything they've got, and I'll need all the help I can get to protect this seat. If you have anything to spare so I can stay on pace with the Dems, I'd be so appreciative of whatever you can chip in:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8i3sm0igg0u38jr3n999grbfjhdolcn7hncd53o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm8pr4sph2bs "The Democrats are going at me with everything they’ve got, and I’ll need all the help I can get to protect this seat. If you have anything to spare so I can stay on pace with the Dems, I’d be so appreciative of whatever you can chip in:")
| **[DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3arcebuq7bupfjns3889bnpjlg1p17tbb5pifg0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm8pr4sph2bs "DONATE NOW")**
---

Thank you and God Bless,

Derrick Van Orden

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Pukita=2C=20GFI=20Ohio?=
subject: 🔥 URGENT! Vote on or before March 19th!
body:
🔥 URGENT! Vote on or before March 19th! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bdfbcb4ae6&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
Happy New Year!

I’m sorry we haven’t communicated in quite a while. It’s been a busy few months for “self-governance” in Ohio. Issue 1 in August, another Issue 1 in November, and now a primary election just around the corner, which is the reason for this communication.

Many volunteers across Ohio are working to fix what we believe is wrong with the way we’re governed at the local, state, and national levels. But it all starts locally, because as the saying goes, “All politics is local.”

We have an opportunity with Ohio’s March 19th primary election to wrest control of both Ohio’s House of Representatives & the Ohio Republican Party from insider, corrupt, career politicians. But it won’t be easy, and we need your help. Please consider doing everything you can to lend a hand.

---
| | | **
WE MUST VOTE
ON****-or- BEFORE
MARCH 19TH!**

---
| If you're an Ohio Trump supporter, don't skip the March 19th Republican Primary. While President Trump's nomination is secure, there's still crucial work to do. We need your vote to secure Senate control, gain House seats, support local conservatives, and defeat the Ohio "Blue 22". MOST IMPORTANTLY Democrats may try to sway the primary to weaken our candidates by pulling a Republican primary ballot and "crossing over" to steal our votes! Your vote ensures we elect strong Republicans who will advance the "Trump Agenda". Spread the word and vote on March 19th (or any time February 21 or after using absentee or early-voting options). Check out our recommended candidates at **[LiberatorList.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9857407afe&e=5c740fa3e2)**. President Trump is counting on us to shape the future. It's now or never!

---
| |
**THE OHIO “LIBERATOR LIST”

[www.liberatorlist.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=447df5b06a&e=5c740fa3e2)**

---
|
Myriad people involved in grassroots political activism across Ohio have built this list to make all Ohioans aware of candidates who aren't establishment & tend to be small-government, freedom-loving, America-loving, regular people. These candidate have stood up and are willing to contribute their time, talent, and/or treasure to run for office in hopes of fixing our badly broken communities, state & nation. They face an uphill battle against insider, establishment, money, a legacy corporate media that disrespects them, and the headwind of cancel culture degrading word-of-mouth support. You can see the list [HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b8203e0e72&e=5c740fa3e2) or by clicking on the image below. We pray this list will help in this battle against these obstacles. Please share it with everyone you can!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d25658b69a&e=5c740fa3e2)

This list is not an endorsement of these candidates. We urge you to do your own homework & research these people. Where we can, we've linked to their web presence so you can click their names & start your exploration. Worst case, if you're pressed for time or can't drum up what's needed to do a deeper dive, we believe you can trust these candidates to do a good job of representing you. We believe they are the best candidates of those from whom you will be asked to choose on March 19, 2024, in Ohio's primary election.

---
| |
**HELP US PROMOTE THE "LIBERATOR LIST"**

---
|
If you like this idea please become part of our promotional army across Ohio to help us promote the "Liberator List". As we did with both Issue 1 ballot initiatives, we are promoting the “Liberator List” with magnetic car door signs, magnetic bumper stickers, and re-stickable bumper stickers.

The new twist here is we’ve made these generic so they can be used over and over for every election. The signs & stickers won’t change but the web page will! Invest in signs or stickers once & promote our movement many times!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=78fb48e029&e=5c740fa3e2)
_Car Door Magnets (9" x 12")_

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1b280c4c54&e=5c740fa3e2)
_Bumper Sticker (9" x 3") either magnetic or re-stickable_

Order yours by going **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=75b20ad573&e=5c740fa3e2)** or clicking on the images above. You will pay when you receive your order. There's no payment needed up-front.

Please don’t delay. Early voting starts February 21st!

Remember, we're just getting started. This effort will continue for every election!

Thank you!

---
|
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[November 9, 2023 - What now?

October 15, 2023 - Critical Volunteer Needs!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7b95f0bebb&e=5c740fa3e2)

[August 12, 2023 - Download Our FREE App!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=097838bb07&e=5c740fa3e2)

[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f9a0ee6b01&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=cbbcb41cf6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=cbbcb41cf6).

---

Thank you! | | | Prior Issues of This Email You May Find Valuable | | | | Thank you for being a GFI person as part of the GFI network. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Feb. 19: Stop noncitizens from voting
body:
Also, the Mayorkas impeachment trial must happen
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **This week, you must help us spur the House to act on an incredibly urgent issue: noncitizens voting in our elections.** When noncitizens vote, it is wrong, it destroys the very foundation of our system of governance, and the American people oppose it by huge margins. We know this because Tea Party Patriots Action fielded a survey at the end of January and found that overwhelmingly Americans agree that only U.S. citizens should vote in our elections. We must get the House to act on this issue as soon as possible. **Additionally, the House has impeached Alejandro Mayorkas for his failure to secure our border in his role as Secretary of Homeland Security.** The Democrats in the Senate do NOT want to hold a trial, but every senator is obligated to hear the evidence against Sec. Mayorkas. Furthermore, it is our opinion that there is enough evidence to convict him. We must contact senators this week while they are on recess and tell them to hold the trial. **** ************
---
| |
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb97946aab4c10/1edb97946aa9a822)
---
| **Noncitizen Voting Action Items**
1. **Read and share my op-eds** on the subject of noncitizen voting and our poll results. One is on [**Breitbart**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb97946aab4c10/1edb97946aa9a824 "Breitbart") and the other is on [**Daily Caller**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb97946aab4c10/1edb97946aa9a826).

2. **Use our[ Align Act campaign](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb97946aab4c10/1edb97946aa9a828) to spur the House into action.** This issue cannot wait and they must act now. Once you've completed the actions, share the Align Act campaign on social media and/or forward this email to others.
With more than 7 million new illegal immigrants in the country, this issue is priority number one if you agree that we must secure and win the 2024 election. **In fact, today is Presidents ' Day, and what better way to celebrate the birthdays of two of our greatest presidents - George Washington and Abraham Lincoln - than to ensure that when we go to elect our next president, that only U.S. citizens are voting?** **** ************
---
| |
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb97946aab4c10/1edb97946aa9a82a)
---
| **Convict Alejandro Mayorkas Action Items**
1. **[Read and share my op-ed](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb97946aab4c10/1edb97946aa9a82c "Read and share my op-ed")** about what the senate needs to do next.

2. **Use our[ Align Act campaign](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb97946aab4c10/1edb97946aa9a82e) to contact your senators.** The Align Act will give you your senators D.C. office phone numbers, but because the senate is on recess, if you have time to [**call one of their local offices too**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb97946aab4c10/1edb97946aa9a830)**,** please do so!
************
---
| |
---
| Thank you for all you do, and remember to share this call to action by forwarding the email and posting on social media!
In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin ************
---
|
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb97946aab4c10/1edb97946aa9a832)
---
|

name: Your America
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39416%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iunKkm4Co%2bcBVE4KtO5ErA&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39417%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7C6i5NltwoeWH6dOOoHDZQ&sysid=1) That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39418%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ty%2fpXi8I3CM8uj3EcuAamQ&sysid=1)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: John Kennedy
subject: Enjoy it while it lasts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Can you imagine what would be in store if they won again next year?

| |

---
| | | As I always do, let me give it to you straight:

The Democrats JUST squeaked ahead in the polls and activated their army of Liberal megadonors to grow their lead even further. _**[Unfortunately, I’m left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684258%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0rcqrCLWTRvRcIzEmx9xlg&sysid=1 "Unfortunately, I’m left
with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose
everything.")**_

Look,

The Democrats are working from dawn ‘til dusk to force-feed Liberal propaganda in our classrooms, trash the reputations of Conservative Supreme Court justices, re-up mask mandates, leave the border wide open, and woke-ify our military - that’s enough to drive folks like you and me up a wall...

**But their Limousine Liberal buddies eat it up. And the huge checks roll in one after another. **

They’d love nothing more than to see the downfall of our House Majority. They know Conservatives would be powerless to stop them if they take full control of Congress.

_I know Mike Johnson reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Newt Gingrich reached out...
I know Byron Donalds reached out...
And I know James Comer reached out..._

But now I’m reaching out ONE LAST TIME because the latest reports show the Radical Democrats with a devastating $8 million lead on us.

_**[If we don’t get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. That’s why I’m asking you to dig deep and kick in just a few bucks to save our House Majority and take back this country of ours.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684259%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WbvrbNlHhrhGz6NOK0plZQ&sysid=1 "If we don’t get it
together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House,
Senate, and White House before we know it. That’s why I’m asking you to dig deep
and kick in just a few bucks to save our House Majority and take back this country
of ours.")**_
---
| | | [KICK IN TEN BUCKS](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684250%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xtQSxG%2fXn%2fJiiDqNo%2b5E5A&sysid=1 "KICK IN TEN BUCKS")
---
| | | [KICK IN TWENTY BUCKS](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684251%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BJrvJxm%2fFaQ8vCUDj1CGTA&sysid=1 "KICK IN TWENTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [KICK IN ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684252%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ngAaLfjA795yBtXH5EuK8A&sysid=1 "KICK IN ANOTHER AMOUNT")
---
Let me put it plainly:

**WITH YOUR HELP:** We have a direct path to sweeping the next elections.

**WITHOUT YOUR HELP:** We might as well enjoy our House Majority while it lasts... because the Democrats will crush us in no time.

_**[So can we count on you? This is really, REALLY important.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684253%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kpo6M2ZX%2b5BnFXiGSctvyA&sysid=1 "So can we count on you?
This is really, REALLY important. ")**_

- Senator John Kennedy

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684254%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=drAJEl6XbmnqjSbr745Qug&sysid=1 "John Kennedy")
---

---

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I’m respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684266%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xH8fM%2bDxtkdLPkG%2fb4bQZg&sysid=1 "MAJORITY LEADER
SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It’s important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

_What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats?_

name: John Kennedy
subject: We might as well enjoy it while it lasts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Can you imagine what would be in store if they won again next year?

| |

---
| | | As I always do, let me give it to you straight:

The Democrats JUST squeaked ahead in the polls and activated their army of Liberal megadonors to grow their lead even further. _**[Unfortunately, I'm left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zudold9meqfev6stvoofvrdei5v5f6fr6ajq9a00_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphmco76c9h2bs "Unfortunately, I’m left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.")**_

Look,

The Democrats are working from dawn 'til dusk to force-feed Liberal propaganda in our classrooms, trash the reputations of Conservative Supreme Court justices, re-up mask mandates, leave the border wide open, and woke-ify our military - that's enough to drive folks like you and me up a wall...

**But their Limousine Liberal buddies eat it up. And the huge checks roll in one after another. **

They'd love nothing more than to see the downfall of our House Majority. They know Conservatives would be powerless to stop them if they take full control of Congress.

_I know Mike Johnson reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Newt Gingrich reached out...
I know Byron Donalds reached out...
And I know James Comer reached out..._

But now I'm reaching out ONE LAST TIME because the latest reports show the Radical Democrats with a devastating $8 million lead on us.

_**[If we don't get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. That's why I'm asking you to dig deep and kick in just a few bucks to save our House Majority and take back this country of ours.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztm3d39k2i2pt71v0limjhqem7m7taaqgd5p5qqo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphmco76c9h2bs "If we don’t get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. That’s why I’m asking you to dig deep and kick in just a few bucks to save our House Majority and take back this country of ours.")**_

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztthf19j89ck8avq489434tmu46i12t4jem60870_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphmco76clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1fu52kea73ks1ckvabd1ugetkg0tv84t1ikk1v0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphmco76clh2bs) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z37ufop7qspsdso3tsj5mv1j2uhbrjohuiv2j1h0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphmco76clh2bs)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeiof9h0da83f13p3cs1ik4dnd3sttnp01opa7n8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphmco76clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp32c5h60p34s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z298qsu3jdbqbi8r39sb13s3v3q583tqal5ah170_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphmco76clh2bs)_
