name: Byron Donalds
subject: Republican Ballot Harvesting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here’s the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I’m Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here’s the gist:](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684275%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uxM1p1GCLI1ibQuq8ca%2b5Q&sysid=1 "I have a plan for a
CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let’s make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There’s just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It’s not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684276%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t5oOxEiuhXmQD75mVVyohw&sysid=1 "That’s why I’m coming to
you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart
these efforts?")**_ I know it’s a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it’ll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn’t convince you to want to help, I don’t know what will! Are you in?_
---
| | | [PITCH IN TEN BUCKS](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684277%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DTpRJCvuNFNZdZk3xzZ6vw&sysid=1 "PITCH IN TEN BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684278%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DRoGCGTKQ76amy8q8sX3Kg&sysid=1 "PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684279%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SOGowRxzh5FPvd6hSTS4pA&sysid=1 "PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684270%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RbEbPxeOkHYJ1Sdy%2fNCzVw&sysid=1 "PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT")
---
This is a non-negotiable if we want to win.

Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register.

**If we don’t do it too, we will lose.**

But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election.

Will you do your part?

I look forward to seeing your name.

Thank you,

Byron Donalds
Co-Chairman of “Bank Your Vote”

---

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Declare Your Independence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
We must remember that which unites us is bigger than that which divides us.

|
---
| | | [**We must remember that which unites us is bigger than that which divides us.
**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pres_day_2_19_24_em1_nd1&n=1)
---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pres_day_2_19_24_em1_nd1&n=2)
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pres_day_2_19_24_em1_nd1&n=3)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pres_day_2_19_24_em1_nd1&n=4)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
George Washington is remembered for many things: he was our first President, is often referred to as “the Father of our Country,” and famously crossed the Delaware River with his troops during the war for independence.
Washington also gave perhaps the most famous of all presidentialf farewell addresses in 1796, after serving two terms as Chief Executive.
Here are a few things he said...
* The Unity of Government, which makes us one people, is the main pillar of our real independence.
* The name American, which belongs to you and I, must exalt the just pride of Patriotism. _With slight shades of difference,_ we have the same religion, manners, habits and political principles. We have a common cause...Independence and Liberty.

Washington reminded his fellow countrymen that the Unity we held was sacred, and it was born of the common idea of Liberty. He called upon all of us to remember our purpose.
I agree: we must remember that which unites us is bigger than that which divides us.
Washington also warned us about our own military. He admonished us to, _“avoid the necessity of ...overgrown military establishments,”_ which can _“be regarded as particularly hostile to Republican Liberty.”_
I agree: we must hold the Military Industrial Complex and its contractors accountable for violations of our liberty and violations against our Constitution.
He also warned that, _“a passionate attachment of one Nation for another produces a variety of evils. Sympathy for the favorite Nation, facilitating the illusion of an imaginary common interest, in cases where no real common interest exists” and can lead us into “a participation in the quarrels and wars..without adequate inducement or justification.”_
I agree: and it’s one reason why I am the only candidate who seeks to bring our troops home and end US military involvement overseas where our interests are not at stake.
Washington’s 6,000+ word Farewell Address was prophetic.
Today it serves as a clarion call to avoid foreign wars, to be sober about the rise of our own military establishment, and to remember why we are called the “United” States of America in the first place.
His warnings and his encouragement 228 years ago resonate with me personally, and with our top campaign goals.
It is my aspiration to be a President who prioritizes you and all of the American people–our history, our liberty, our unity and our future.
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
Declare Your Independence

name: =?utf-8?Q?Laura?=
subject: Addressing Debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Jones for Congress
body:
When elected to Congress, I intend to be that voice of reason, advocating for sensible financial decisions that benefit our nation. | | | | | [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=92489b9afb&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
# Addressing Debt

Peter:
Debt is more than just a numerical value—it carries significant weight, impacting individuals, families, and economies.
**As personal, national, and global debt levels escalate, the consequences affect various facets of society.**
Mounting debt can lead to financial stress, limited opportunities, and decreased quality of life. Families find themselves grappling with budget constraints, unable to adequately provide for their needs or plan for the future.
It's essential to adopt responsible financial practices and policies to lessen the negative impacts of debt accumulation.
When elected to Congress, I intend to be that voice of reason, advocating for sensible financial decisions that benefit our nation's present and future.

name: Young
subject: They won.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
I couldn’t believe it...

| |
---
| | | _**- A Personal Note from Congresswoman Young Kim - **_
Dear, Friend,

You may not know me, but this is Congresswoman Young Kim, and I would really appreciate it if you would take a moment to read my story.

I am a Christian, mother, wife, small business owner, and a first-generation immigrant.

When I moved to America, I didn't speak a word of English. But I worked hard, put myself through school, and am now one of the first Korean-American women to serve in Congress. But my road hasn't been exactly easy.

__In 2018, I ran for Congress and I lost my election.__

But I wouldn't let myself give up no matter how hard the Democrats tried to make me. So I ran again in 2020, and despite MILLIONS in spending against me, we won. **Together, we flipped a DEEP BLUE seat RED for the FIRST TIME in 26 years. **

Every year since then, we've continued to defy the odds to stop the woke Democrat machine and keep this seat for House Republicans.

_I 'm nothing special._ Just an immigrant who came to this country - not knowing a word of English - who lived the American Dream. And I've made it my mission on Capitol Hill to help make that same Dream possible for everyone.

But now, the Democrats are once again after my seat. They are angry that I flipped a deep Blue seat Red, and now they want it back. _The far-Left knows that my seat could very well decide the House Majority and they are DESPERATE for revenge. _

---
| | [SUPPORT YOUNG KIM TODAY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuqtl06v45qim9jv95uhe5u0omq6ht4q98mjhk60_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphmeob2cjh2bs)
---
| | [DEFEND THE GOP MAJORITY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpndp8pgmf0a4ns0v4nfpmm39h67nqik0uqre6ro_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphmeob2cjh2bs)
---

They've recruited progressive Liberals to run against me, pledged MILLIONS of dollars in attack ads & smear campaigns, and the White House even named me one of their TOP 18 targets.

I don't normally ask for help like this, but my campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters just like you, and I urgently need your help to win my fight, Friend.

_**[I'm coming to you personally today to ask if you could chip in just a few bucks to help fuel my campaign against these attacks from the woke Left and help me DEFEND the GOP Majority.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfhld2e8h8fcb3lrice90eote2pu30eftubbtubg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphmeob2cjh2bs "I’m coming to you personally today to ask if you could chip in just a few bucks to help fuel my campaign against these attacks from the woke Left and help me DEFEND the GOP Majority. ")**_

---
| | [SUPPORT YOUNG KIM TODAY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8bv5kdq53uqcs3mq1j4kq3fmmr53qvega0j4rd0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphmeob2cjh2bs)
---
| | [DEFEND THE GOP MAJORITY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj9s8e8gmmbrjqs3v77dehrqf02ftd60ml0pou78_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphmeob2cjh2bs)
---

Thank you in advance for your support,
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo4a18uicvkeur0jv5173ns4042f3tth2kt6gfq8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphmeob2cjh2bs)
---
Young Kim
---
* * *
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5v1aepaalsbp8987b53ij55lnm0g7ignfo0shno_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphmeob2cjh2bs)
---
| |
Friend, the desperate Democrats have once again named me a Top Target.

They will once again result in desperate, disgusting attacks like calling me a **token candidate.**

subject: They won.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
I couldn’t believe it...

| |
---
| | | _**- A Personal Note from Congresswoman Young Kim - **_
Dear, Friend,

You may not know me, but this is Congresswoman Young Kim, and I would really appreciate it if you would take a moment to read my story.

I am a Christian, mother, wife, small business owner, and a first-generation immigrant.

When I moved to America, I didn’t speak a word of English. But I worked hard, put myself through school, and am now one of the first Korean-American women to serve in Congress. But my road hasn’t been exactly easy.

__In 2018, I ran for Congress and I lost my election.__

But I wouldn’t let myself give up no matter how hard the Democrats tried to make me. So I ran again in 2020, and despite MILLIONS in spending against me, we won. **Together, we flipped a DEEP BLUE seat RED for the FIRST TIME in 26 years. **

Every year since then, we’ve continued to defy the odds to stop the woke Democrat machine and keep this seat for House Republicans.

_I’m nothing special._ Just an immigrant who came to this country - not knowing a word of English - who lived the American Dream. And I’ve made it my mission on Capitol Hill to help make that same Dream possible for everyone.

But now, the Democrats are once again after my seat. They are angry that I flipped a deep Blue seat Red, and now they want it back. _The far-Left knows that my seat could very well decide the House Majority and they are DESPERATE for revenge. _

---

# U.S. Taxpayers are Funding the Invasion of our Southern Border
---
By Mark Robertson, Candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District
The Biden administration has nearly tripled the amount of U.S. Taxpayer money going to the United Nations International Organization for Migration (IOM), which then gives cash to people who are entering our country illegally.
You heard that right: We are funding our own invasion!
A well-researched [article in Epoch Times](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cO-1yS6FrfSHTHtyLM_h22ZcNRb1pEPh0ZU15iNLAiVmIKik7JQOWRHkEsrteCUl420zxqRVz20ONGtPatarhLQgVifNS7uWStOPFdS-oDD3oulVefmlWyFUGFQ4QpZONTymWOp2H4KPmGkv4xI--i69mtRMU1m79xcOESix56SUPDOsxzYR7xLaQa25bOwzQC8Hr6VDxUqgOlQGupsXw_O_lTvT0j_92m460aAOq2pwJLCSXurqSsRQT2nKMQD6NIvpeEs1LFoqIL-zJSFeq7HdL8B1s022L_N-0i8TXrG7qwRPR9KwyUZZTezskE1BbbHKKZbbqR_BNS9d8b3yaT0LeAB5TPKHxL9g0gXvSmw2pEjXNuiqI5NDQgiqrFjjA3b-2sapHHtae6fZgpWCuLPk6I0Ly16mwvlmlWWhi-etmCh5tkaaDHFtQmZnyjiGcPK8FvZ5JzJ1tPWwBJdvUJJUsuT2_5A6ni1Kilg2bkJFRUYZz9y2aPOv_AjreO66zwvFvo6NsReCAhxiJKPxrLkrrYbG89HRMNbVHpuGPnY=&c=_JLcz1AUcVlR36_owbD8UoIPJs3iM_nWjh1hEBlkiO8ngZGFJSHfrg==&ch=whrfG_M0p71ZLbaFan-Q9_VOXgDmJd12kjtSf1DnkKxqLDX7k2o6OQ==) chronicles the flow of American tax-payer money. Here's how it works:
* The U.S. State Department and the U.S. Agency for International Development give money to the United Nations.
* The United Nations keeps some of that money and then gives the remainder to non-government organizations (NGOs).
* NGOs keep some of the money and then give cash and prepaid credit cards to people traveling through Central America and Mexico to enter our country illegally.
* These people, intent on breaking our laws, keep some of the money and then give the remainder to Mexican Cartels.
* Mexican Cartels use the money to finance human trafficking and drug smuggling operations. This includes the rape and exploitation of women and children along with the production and distribution of fentanyl, which is killing Americans.
The ties to Biden are undeniable. The head of the U.N. Agency doling out these funds, Amy Pope, served as President Biden's senior adviser on migration. Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas served on the board of an NGO that is reaping millions of taxpayer dollars.
Crime, chaos, corruption, and cartels sponsored by the Biden Administration. All the while, our very own Dina Titus proudly proclaims that she is "Ridin' with Biden." It is time to end the Democrat's policies of "Americans last." We must stop the insanity!

Please forward this email to your friends and neighbors and encourage them to support Mark Robertson in his fight to take back our country.

[Click here to compare two Republicans running for Congress in Nevada.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cO-1yS6FrfSHTHtyLM_h22ZcNRb1pEPh0ZU15iNLAiVmIKik7JQOWVJQ6RY9P4BMByzRvr4UVsv9ul9oXipYBxnOSo8ZjdqZE9ywgWZ6oEFEk_SaWpTbw2G-5Lqb9I92hQuKUnXgrsQ1atoS3GiNqw==&c=_JLcz1AUcVlR36_owbD8UoIPJs3iM_nWjh1hEBlkiO8ngZGFJSHfrg==&ch=whrfG_M0p71ZLbaFan-Q9_VOXgDmJd12kjtSf1DnkKxqLDX7k2o6OQ==)

*******

| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=2ef4458f83be414986c7f8fb8fde8bf5&_e=uUZBmA7MLRTM03BC3PEc-OtVEp5KsSNidTaCITSHi8w7HZ3TLkqUZ-uJ2aS0YtJAp8hbr0kf5nkwoY5XZ-M0N_vQCqGHLQtS9hPzJU41Gu91FOBN90sfpH4CZwZwbW12VG6OjISWdLm_wj3Q0BTdK5TUstmyE88kW8FbGPnFKNnCXEtkFrt-oFVOrI5Z6fAPuk79CVwuoCEMktBMo8JEXq19nqn2DqUW6hQhVejJasqm1pLmDM4H5oGFqyo3pGQA1B7aSfjDV-O8DdmeYlSGp_J8qnDN8pRlQxBPagWB30TExAq2spR-W06FDNUECkQPW85PdYafFZPn07jmxCr-HytZwVW-2b8t7_M2mcc2I2f0bWMMwJ4XD0hjNUDfW60DUUJDTI5tYQjwEsP0X2-piw%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. | As we commemorate Presidents' Day today, it's an opportunity for us to reflect on the remarkable leadership of past Presidents and the enduring principles they upheld. In particular, we pay tribute to two giants of American history - President Abraham Lincoln and President George Washington.
President Lincoln, through his steadfast resolve during one of our nation's darkest periods, preserved the Union and championed the cause of freedom for all Americans. His unwavering commitment to equality and justice continues to inspire generations.
President Washington, our nation's first leader, set a standard of integrity, humility, and service that remains a guiding light for all who follow. His leadership during our nation's founding years laid the groundwork for the freedoms we cherish today.
On this Presidents' Day, let's honor the legacies of Lincoln and Washington by rededicating ourselves to the values of liberty, unity, and opportunity. Let's strive to emulate their courage, wisdom, and humility as we work together to build a brighter future for our great state of New Hampshire and America.
Happy Presidents' Day!
---
| Thank you for your support,
---

clean_body: | | | | == | Peter, | == | As we commemorate Presidents' Day today, it's an opportunity for us to reflect on the remarkable leadership of past Presidents and the enduring principles they upheld. In particular, we pay tribute to two giants of American history - President Abraham Lincoln and President George Washington. President Lincoln, through his steadfast resolve during one of our nation's darkest periods, preserved the Union and championed the cause of freedom for all Americans. His unwavering commitment to equality and justice continues to inspire generations. President Washington, our nation's first leader, set a standard of integrity, humility, and service that remains a guiding light for all who follow. His leadership during our nation's founding years laid the groundwork for the freedoms we cherish today. On this Presidents' Day, let's honor the legacies of Lincoln and Washington by rededicating ourselves to the values of liberty, unity, and opportunity. Let's strive to emulate their courage, wisdom, and humility as we work together to build a brighter future for our great state of New Hampshire and America. Happy Presidents' Day! | Thank you for your support, | == | Russell Prescott Republican for Congress NH-01 | == | Follow Russell on Social Media: | == == == | == | A note from Russell... The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington. Thank you. -Russell Peter \- Forward this message to 5 FRIENDS AND FAMILY MEMBERS and help us raise awareness for our mission to achieve a better future for New Hampshire. Fellow Conservative,

Jon Tester is already breaking records for ad spending in this Senate race. He is fundraising like the career D.C. politician he is and putting together a formidable campaign.

Winning this race is going to be quite a challenge. But a challenge I am up to. _**I can and will defeat Jon Tester by offering Montana a new brand of conservative leadership that stands up to the socialist left and fights for the principled solutions our state and country need.**_

But I need you on my team if we're going to get this done. Your support for my campaign will mean victory or defeat. **[I’m writing to ask you to please consider donating to my campaign today. Every day we're not hitting our goals, we're losing.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1cc85f23f3bd40778fd666024cfed237&_e=O4MkW3GPrQlOYKr6nfwRFAC2tl4sdJMMSpZkjrRHCPZGQRgxMoHvn_M-NG4yNIw0A-4bsol9F53uHJVUnlsXmHFLxY4pBYSuQobaFSoUlz3fIWpq7YxOK336SVk-wHl7M_QjrAWjrd7kRs2MNFGvNlw-MaUEqWStOFdiH9xGr9pymwFZRNbTTgWgzZSTYrrSlrhc5LwsyXBI55-tU9mh44NgfaATL7Bmy5XaWzCzcMhP0_DfWq8H8iI59T2E0VrOL8xxVW2WrsJjMpmlhdzO9scICN23JIaTtEfjMYAivLp8G2IBzXH0CQCFo5jkJbPPXehx9idEfMGaj6ZKMSfN531S0yWGBx84Ay-g1IshAfXQFRvh_bzfDn_vcFhAYhVzSl8-NRdhdIgi94HQJUxxdxGJQjo9_YDa0nLxOSkxZxs%3D)**

[**HELP TIM TODAY ->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1cc85f23f3bd40778fd666024cfed237&_e=O4MkW3GPrQlOYKr6nfwRFAC2tl4sdJMMSpZkjrRHCPZGQRgxMoHvn_M-NG4yNIw0A-4bsol9F53uHJVUnlsXmHFLxY4pBYSuQobaFSoUlz3fIWpq7YxOK336SVk-wHl7M_QjrAWjrd7kRs2MNFGvNlw-MaUEqWStOFdiH9xGr9pymwFZRNbTTgWgzZSTYrrSlrhc5LwsyXBI55-tU9mh44NgfaATL7Bmy5XaWzCzcMhP0_DfWq8H8iI59T2E0VrOz07NXJ4xAV6HDdvolIl747DZdxbH2ZD-dDLQAo2kFEUvADjhw6d9dH4BY-psbPU-k813_SDc_XXuxsZmPn4mr5-Uiws0afgXjp9U2zfFVYJHChInxxk0yPC88mKQXd5o6k7XZbcl7uw6N9fesuyx0WGnKE9IzUx6uSVAxgNNDRI%3D)
This campaign is going to get even more expensive than it already is, which is to say **very, very expensive**. We’re already getting outspent by millions of dollars! And those millions are being spent on attack ads that smear my record of success and my conservative credentials.

That's why it's critical for me and my campaign to keep our own ads on air defending my record as a successful businessman and principled conservative. Every day we're not on air, _**Jon Tester will attempt to define me on his own terms.**_

name: Team Freedom VA
subject: Today is Presidents' Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
| | |
---
| | Today marks Presidents’ Day, a federally recognized holiday dedicated to honoring the Presidents of the United States. It provides an opportune moment to reflect on the impactful contributions made by our nation's leaders. The historic Inflation Reduction Act (IRA), passed under President Biden, has played a pivotal role in enabling states, such as Virginia, to implement cost-saving initiatives for prescription drugs. Our goal is to build upon the foundation laid by the IRA and advocate for the enactment of legislation establishing a Prescription Drug Affordability Board, further addressing the pressing issue of drug affordability in our nation and our Commonwealth.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
want to tell you why it’s critical for us to take back our culture and education from the radical left...

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zidttvn5m19k9j1mnlcm56h2iiq4tb8ffhn5s8i0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

This is a deeply personal email, but I want to tell you why it's critical for us to take back our culture and education from the radical left... not just in sports, but even in children's books.

My story begins at the University of Kentucky. I was on the swim team. I am a 12-time NCAA all-American, 5x SEC champion, and SEC record holder in the butterfly.

But then it all changed for a photo-opt.

In March of 2022, I and other female swimmers were forced to compete with a male, Lia Thomas. We watched as this male swam to a title, beating out Olympians and other record holders. Despite tying Lia to the 100th of a second, the NCAA denied me the trophy because the NCAA claimed it was necessary to have Lia Thomas hold the trophy while photos were being taken.

The radical left reduced everything I worked my entire life for down to a photo opt.

But that's not all...

I was forced to share locker rooms with a 6'4" man.

**_This is where the madness needs to end because it 's not just sports where the radical gender ideology movement is dominating_.**

Now, children's literature is injected with this radical gender ideology movement.

[You can help me STOP this madness by making an urgent donation to SkyTree Book Fairs, which is combating Scholastic's transgender woke propaganda, by creating a wholesome and age-appropriate book fair alternative for parents, students, and educators. Click here to donate ANY amount!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoje3md3mlipageahius1lqfcvdmn5638vvqsd3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)

Some of the books are too gross to even share with you on this email. But here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zijmbnh409fkevubkeh94aee720aap7u5a60eti0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)

Full stop: This needs to end. No compromising. No more excuses.

While Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs, one organization is fighting back, and I am urgently asking for you to support them as you have supported my fight to defend women's sports.

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

[Can you help me raise $50,000 in the next 48 hours toward SkyTree in order for them to host dozens of book fairs? Click here to chip in $35, $50, or even $100 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziv9a53507b4fbmcahguvebsnemh60b9ares54q0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)

[Donate](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zik05f2mrchmpspm7hccqgg1t150h66edmq61tf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)

**Why this matters:**

You may remember Scholastic book fairs. All the kids used to love it when they came to school. It was a catalog of all the stories I got to read. It used to be an innocent event.

Unfortunately, that's all changed.

Scholastic now promotes woke, radical LGBT books. They promote a radical agenda over the well-being of kids.

And make no mistake, Scholastic is the nation's leading hotbed. Ellie Berger, president of Scholastic's trade publishing division, wrote, "We pledge to stand with you as we redouble our efforts to combat the laws restricting children's access to books."

With over 120,000 book fairs a year, Scholastic is the biggest pusher of transgender, woke propaganda to school children.

That's why it's urgent we create more SkyTree book fairs.

SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

However, SkyTree Book Fairs is a David VS. Goliath battle.

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $4,500 to host each book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4vm5fq3lme4hijq933rve21hj1jfj7pr04f7bmo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqcq5re4gfgn5u57hggscpl9tk2oi4m55m6anrio_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zortnfhjnjfp2ajgtclhesr69918osqob8peff1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zndv5scsha6rqp0qamdpe5e1t16v8lctcqha4n0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrfvi0fo0pfft0nqssh3cqvpn20lc4kqvplt4nn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2b9vbrt0e2f5loqtoa0rbf98obt0e577oekr6dg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9cjp0b7uht69hfhu7r8oggqr84c978j4lupfgo8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)

[Sponsor a SkyTree book fair for $4,500 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z281q373q3sohfdejubk2fndobpbuhp5ooavhr6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqh7jdpk70j3m31udgeaokhjjvgp4lpj3ogh2ueg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)

Since I began sharing my story, I've received death threats and ugly and twisted threatening messages on social media. The media has labeled me an extremist.

_I 've even been physically assaulted by a mob of transgender activists_.

But I'm not afraid.

**Instead I think of what God tells us in _Romans 8:18:_**__I consider that our present sufferings are not worth comparing with the glory that will be revealed in us__.

You and I must take on this battle. We're called to do so.

Let's step up and provide children with a positive alternative to what's happening in Scholastic book fairs by supporting SkyTree.

I hope you will join me in supporting SkyTree to ensure that children have access to high-quality literature that aligns with our most cherished values and principles.

Thank you,

Riley Gaines

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5m1lma336aglcc019i29p8fgntp6fp9chk2v9t8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj1c9g62ob246h22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4f0f3o1vrv0suma2ucfqmetjp722dlbhutokjl8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30sphm9oj2c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmnriailc592imcjn9rvg2o10j3i48r30grcm7oo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0c3j66p72c9gm49fg)

1776 Newsletter - December 2022

** Elections Are Over, Covid Scam Mandates Have Subsided, So Where Do We Go From Here?
------------------------------------------------------------
Do you find yourself lost and wondering how to get involved and make an impact on a local, State and National level? There are currently no campaigns that need your participation, no mandates to mask up, vax up and rob you of your parental and medical freedoms to fight against. If not YOU, WHO? If not NOW, WHEN? YOU were made for such a time as this!!

Dr. Cordie Williams
USMC Veteran
Founder of 1776 Forever Free

https://rumble.com/v20jnwi-satanic-public-education-corrupting-the-minds-of-american-youth-american-fi.html?mc_cid=0c51980844&mc_eid=UNIQID

**
Justice For COVID Tyranny
------------------------------------------------------------
After Tuesday November 7th's special runoff election ended with Democratic incumbent Raphael Warnock maintaining a 1+ Dem seat majority in the senate, post-midterms, the U.S. government, lawmakers at Capitol Hill, and mainstream media pundits trudge along with "business as usual".

Late Tuesday night, December 6th, bipartisan leadership in both houses agreed on a $858 billion military policy bill that would terminate the Pentagon’s mandate that troops receive the COVID-19 vaccine, much to the dismay of the Biden Administration.

In the inevitable rollback process, will it be business as usual? Or will the millions of impacted lives, the billions of dollars of lost income, the permanent damage to personal health, the unnecessary death of loved ones, be accounted for?

We would love to have you on our volunteer team!

We need to start a conversation where the other side is not "Made wrong," but where a conversation starts that bridges the gap between what they think they know from fake news to what the constitution really says.

**
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Idea?! A Constitution Video Series
------------------------------------------------------------
These powerful videos would include an interview with Doug Gibbs about pertinent matters of the day, and at the end of each video you would have take-home nuggets where you could start discipling to other people about the constitution.

** We are trying to raise $10,000 to do a 3 part video series involving training candidates.
------------------------------------------------------------
As a non-profit, we are incredibly grateful for all of the donations that have come in. YOU make what we do possible. This video series has been on our hearts for some time now, and we believe we can make this happen with your help!

Donate Here >> (https://1776foreverfree.com/donate/?mc_cid=0c51980844&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Coalition
Several others and I, after God gave me the vision and direction have formed a Coalition to accomplish (2) objectives:
1. To take down the RINO's, DM me on IG or email me at cordie@cordie4senate.com (mailto:cordie@cordie4senate.com) , to get more on that objective. (We have to be somewhat hush-hush as the forces of evil are never ending in their pursuit to ruin me, and this Republic.
2. Support Candidates with Money, Fundraising people to hold events, provide a social media following for them, Church connections so they have a stage to reach the masses. We feel that candidates that have leverage are candidates that win. Grassroots organizations like the California Tea Party Caucus and the CRA, "The California Republican Assembly," should be stepping up to lead California. Well, they are, but they need you and I. Get involved and become a CRA member and inquire about how you can help 1776 with the Coalition.

subject: NYT: “The swing state that matters most…”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1147%2E135344%2EuuYk1d)

Team,
In 2016, Michigan was the single closest state in the presidential race, with Donald Trump winning here by just 10,704 votes, or about .2%.
2024 is shaping up to be another pivotal year here, with both control of the White House and the Senate likely being decided by Michigan. Here’s a headline that caught my eye:
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240219-1-30&t=2&akid=1147%2E135344%2EuuYk1d)
Public polls show that both our race and the race for the presidency are in a dead heat. Odds are, if we’ve lost our race, Donald Trump has won here in Michigan AND Republicans have flipped the Senate.
That’s why Republicans from Trump on down will be investing heavily to flip Michigan. We’ve been building out an infrastructure to defeat them, but we need your help. [**Will you chip in to support organizing efforts in the swing state that matters most?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240219-1-30&t=3&akid=1147%2E135344%2EuuYk1d)

body:
| | |
---
| | Team Rosen

My faith has always been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than where we found it.
---
| | It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. **But right now, I need your help.**
---
| | National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: **Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me neck and neck with my GOP opponent – in a race that experts say could decide Senate control.**

I need you to hear this, friend: Donald Trump is all but certain to become the GOP nominee for president again.
This is a man who incited an insurrection and threatens the very fabric of our democracy. Who boasts about overturning Roe v. Wade and taking away women’s reproductive freedoms. Who — a few weeks ago — said that he _wants_ to see the U.S. economy fail, because it would help his presidential campaign. **And he’s neck-and-neck with President Biden in the latest polls.**
So when you hear people say that 2024 will be the “most consequential election of our lifetimes,” that’s not hyperbole.
**[_We need to do everything we can — right now — to ensure that we reelect President Biden and save our Democratic Senate majority._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79288643/456031789/-1220293910?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4810-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTE1OWJmMy0zMWNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9bkqiCbB4RLsG7csT4786E04HjC2hS0z99WN-pRjsuM=)**
That means getting the message out about the ways in which President Biden and Senate Democrats have delivered for the American people:
* Capping the price of insulin and lowering prescription drug costs for seniors;
* Finally enacting a gun trafficking ban and passing transformative gun safety legislation;
* Protected Social Security;
* And investing billions to rebuild our roads, bridges, tunnels and sewer systems — creating good-paying, union jobs at the same time.

Make no mistake: Democrats have a winning message. **But we have to make sure that our message of results and progress can cut through the noise of far-right lies and attacks up and down the ballot. **[**So I'm personally asking you to split a donation of $5, or whatever you can spare today, between President Biden's reelection campaign and mine. Please, will you donate now to help us defend the White House _and_ the Senate this November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79288645/456031791/-1220293910?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4810-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTE1OWJmMy0zMWNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9bkqiCbB4RLsG7csT4786E04HjC2hS0z99WN-pRjsuM=)

body:
Voting Against Seniors! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/198111ace0e9/conforti-for-congress-8396576?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Sean Casten is voting against Senior and in favor of Illegals!!

This is outrageous!

For him to put the welfare of illegals over our own senior citizen is a show of his true colors. By not voting to deport them, he is enabling them to commit more senior fraud.

He does not care about the people of this District - or about Americans. He only cares about himself - he is a globalist that considers himself one of the elite. Casten is working against the people of the 6th Congressional District - and against all Americans. It is time to Cast Casten Out!

Once I am in Congress, I will work in the interest of the people of this District and protect all Americans against the failed Democrat policies. Spread the word. Tell your friends and family to vote Niki Conforti for Congress!!

Stay Safe! Stay Strong!

Can you help support the Conforti for Congress campaign's efforts to beat Casten? Your contribution will go a long way in helping us win! You can click the link below to make a donation today.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=48b5defaf2&e=25f4fa3311)

Your support is greatly appreciated.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---

body:
You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zckdn2q5db2q2ke3r0lkieibanobuo6s9rfko100_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spjm8o34c1h2bs)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbtfnhk97q2vve9aldmjf229u1a3u87gbjv56d18_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spjm8o34c1h2bs)_**

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zivg2tlppso26eljgdaf14nuh6v2o5o9nm4mtn0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spjm8o34c1h2bs) [No](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt4hu3kddooejloljfvsllk3gjv8ai9mb5kg6ooo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spjm8o34c1h2bs) [Not Sure / Don't Know](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zruad6pjd3839jt8ccjis3jmg4nqbidptp4as26g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spjm8o34c1h2bs)
We need more citizens like you— _informed citizens_ —because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen! That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative—the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable.** That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education** today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z56k5gr10koslr301s3ga28r6n7mnd1oa4e99uig_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spjm8o34c1h2bs) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Joe Biden
subject: Do you want to meet me, Barack, and Bill?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
What do you say? We would love to meet you. | | |
---

clean_body: What do you say? We would love to meet you. | | | Peter, We recently launched a contest to give supporters like you a chance to spend an evening with President Obama, President Clinton, and me. It’s a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to meet not one, not two, but THREE presidents! (And my campaign will cover the costs of your flight and hotel.) If that’s all you need to hear, use this link to be automatically entered for a chance to meet me, Barack, and Bill: People ask me all the time if these messages asking for $25 really matter in a presidential election that will cost so much money to win. Yes. They do. Grassroots supporters like you who give to these messages are the backbone of my campaign. So when you see our ads on TV and our numbers rising in the polls, your support is a big reason for that success. Today your donation also gets you and a guest a chance to meet and take a photo with three presidents. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Hope to see you soon! Joe Joe Biden President of the United States

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My anniversary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5567%2E5257348%2EYjK6HF ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hi Derek — My
team has been extra busy lately, and with our final debate tomorrow
evening and just 15 days until California’s U.S. Senate primary election,
we’re not slowing down.

But today, I wanted to take a moment to celebrate my 29th wedding
anniversary with my beautiful wife, Eve.

If you had told me that a blind date with Eve Sanderson in Los Angeles for
tennis would lead to the life and family we’ve built together, I might
have made it to the tennis courts on time. (I was late.)

I’m convinced that she only went out with me for Italian food and a jazz
bar later because — how often does an Eve go out with an Adam?

She’s been an amazing partner.

We’ve gone vegan (her first, plant-based whole foods, while I am of the
Oreo cookie-eating variety), weathered Trump’s tantrums and threats, and
heard the (many, many) Adam & Eve jokes — together.

Eve is a private person, who just happens to be married to a very public
figure. I know you don’t hear from her often, but she is the rock that
holds our family together.

Since our anniversary is the same week as Valentine’s Day, it can be kind
of a rip, with the two often getting merged into one celebration. The home
stretch of this campaign isn’t making that any easier (I even had to sneak
away from our Valentine’s Day dinner to take a call from my campaign
manager this week), but despite that, she’s still my number one supporter.

While I carve out some time to spend with Eve later tonight in between
debate preparation and campaign events, I would really appreciate your
help to keep our campaign fundraising on pace in the final days of this
primary election.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1004&akid=5567%2E5257348%2EYjK6HF ]Can you chip in
$10? It
costs millions of dollars to advertise across California — resources we
have built up for more than a year. We need to replenish our resources and
finish this primary with the momentum to win.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=5567%2E5257348%2EYjK6HF ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1008&akid=5567%2E5257348%2EYjK6HF ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1009&akid=5567%2E5257348%2EYjK6HF ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=5567%2E5257348%2EYjK6HF ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I couldn’t do any of this without Eve — or without the support of this
incredible grassroots team. Thanks for pitching in what you can.

— Adam

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: $3. One time. To make sure Democrats have a chance to win this VERY winnable race.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Friends — I am writing to ask if you can rush an urgent contribution to Rudy Salas' congressional campaign in California before the March 5th election.
Because of the unique nature of California's primaries — where top 2 advance regardless of party — we are in DEEP risk of having two Republicans make the general election ... and in a district Joe Biden won by 13 points.
This is a seat Democrats can flip and take us one seat closer to a majority. It would be an absolute disaster if Rudy doesn't have the resources to ensure he makes the general election. So please:
[**Use this link to contribute $3 or whatever you can afford directly to Rudy Salas' campaign so he can put it to work making sure he is in the general election after the March 5 primary.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-salas?refcode=em240220-1-subs&refcode2=1838_4767699_M7oqCe&akid=1838%2E4767699%2EM7oqCe)
$3.
One time. For Rudy Salas. To make sure Democrats have a chance to win this VERY winnable race.
$3 because we need Speaker Mike Johnson out of power and control of the House could run through this seat.
$3 because in the nightmare scenario in which Trump wins, Republicans likely win the Senate as well and only winning the House can stop total Republican rule.
$3 because we have it within our power to help Rudy get to the general. If he has the resources, he will. And if he does, it will be a very, very winnable race.
[**So please: Use this link to contribute $3 directly to Rudy Salas' campaign for Congress in California. Your donation today could very well win a seat for Democrats in November. But Rudy has to get out of the primary first.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-salas?refcode=em240220-1-subs&refcode2=1838_4767699_M7oqCe&akid=1838%2E4767699%2EM7oqCe)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-salas?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em240220-1-subs&refcode2=1838_4767699_M7oqCe&akid=1838%2E4767699%2EM7oqCe)**
---
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-salas?express_lane=true&refcode=em240220-1-subs&refcode2=1838_4767699_M7oqCe&akid=1838%2E4767699%2EM7oqCe)**
---
The future is not something to witness, it's something we must manifest. And if we want control of the House, we all have a role in making it happen.
Thank you,
Gavin Newsom
[CONTRIBUTE TO RUDY SALAS](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-salas?refcode=em240220-1-subs&refcode2=1838_4767699_M7oqCe&akid=1838%2E4767699%2EM7oqCe)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1838%2E4767699%2EM7oqCe).

Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: Happy Presidents' Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

As we celebrate Presidents’ Day, we are reminded of the remarkable legacies of two of America’s most revered leaders: George Washington and Abraham Lincoln. Originally established to commemorate George Washington’s birthday, this holiday has evolved into a time to honor both Washington’s and Lincoln’s contributions to our nation.

Washington and Lincoln each faced extraordinary challenges during their presidencies, ones that shaped the course of American history. Washington offered leadership in forming the democracy we know today, while Lincoln helped our nation navigate the tumultuous Civil War period.

In this time of political division, let’s remember the leadership and vision of these remarkable leaders. Despite their differing circumstances, these presidents sought to uphold the ideals of freedom, unity, and democracy. As we enjoy this holiday, let’s also reflect on what unites us as a nation and strive to uphold those values.

Thank you, and best wishes for a terrific Presidents’ Day.

Raja
Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
Raja for Congress
PO Box 681202
Schaumburg, IL 60168
United States

Fellow Conservative,

Jon Tester is already breaking records for ad spending in this Senate race. He is fundraising like the career D.C. politician he is and putting together a formidable campaign.

Winning this race is going to be quite a challenge. But a challenge I am up to. _**I can and will defeat Jon Tester by offering Montana a new brand of conservative leadership that stands up to the socialist left and fights for the principled solutions our state and country need.**_

But I need you on my team if we're going to get this done. Your support for my campaign will mean victory or defeat. **[I’m writing to ask you to please consider donating to my campaign today. Every day we're not hitting our goals, we're losing.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=04d95c61ad394c3c8c8755b7b56ac4b2&_e=l5TCSiD7bpapIC7_aGcNKsqI_bGkeceuJjf0KIWbCRQfyhBaz9TRGkb9f95x6lxznejSgvvYsHVbpcjfgOJZ_0Behm0Bap06q_ER0SR-Qyh2sPvp-lPLCXtL6qMeJeog8L0OJCuxePcWht3r_V6Ep8gCq2wuBAIM5z86Kma67wniq1Lu1RZaa7qwQ2aSGTx4-XbDnKr75YjpmTQgtDgu7cZBqJIBx-IQMPkafz0Yaw1LFumtcMz55_syfKVnKbdJRe6QXjc0en1_uJmeqNMUFjQH9T_AfudDfYHekr-aSfD6uodUL9_T3B6U1jFyowP6hKukybrrulJXvLEjNdqpuOgSLSmbLuiL26svWkbchFIMt-vWiRkmKu7KBWQ9SS1egyYY3PHSQaKQHOar3i6ajpYTHlU_hL3AHUwcAp_BSF0%3D)**

This campaign is going to get even more expensive than it already is, which is to say **very, very expensive**. We’re already getting outspent by millions of dollars! And those millions are being spent on attack ads that smear my record of success and my conservative credentials.

That's why it's critical for me and my campaign to keep our own ads on air defending my record as a successful businessman and principled conservative. Every day we're not on air, _**Jon Tester will attempt to define me on his own terms.**_

Those ads will be costly.

clean_body: This race is shaping up to be the most expensive Senate race in the country. We need to get our fundraising going if we want any chance of winning. | | Fellow Conservative, Jon Tester is already breaking records for ad spending in this Senate race. He is fundraising like the career D.C. politician he is and putting together a formidable campaign. Winning this race is going to be quite a challenge. But a challenge I am up to. I can and will defeat Jon Tester by offering Montana a new brand of conservative leadership that stands up to the socialist left and fights for the principled solutions our state and country need. But I need you on my team if we're going to get this done. Your support for my campaign will mean victory or defeat. This campaign is going to get even more expensive than it already is, which is to say very, very expensive. We’re already getting outspent by millions of dollars! And those millions are being spent on attack ads that smear my record of success and my conservative credentials. That's why it's critical for me and my campaign to keep our own ads on air defending my record as a successful businessman and principled conservative. Every day we're not on air, Jon Tester will attempt to define me on his own terms. Those ads will be costly. Let’s get this done. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Republican for U.S. Senate, Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. body:
If you knew that chipping in $3 could win a Senate race and defend our majority, wouldn’t you chip it in right away?
#

If you knew that chipping in $3 could win a Senate race and defend our majority, wouldn’t you chip it in right away?
If $3 could defeat election deniers and dangerous authoritarian politicians like Kari Lake and Donald Trump, wouldn’t that be some of the best money you’ve ever spent?
And if $3 could put a fighter in the Senate — somebody who isn’t afraid to stand up for what’s right, even when it’s tough — wouldn’t you want to send him?
It might not seem like $3 can do any of that on its own, but it’s actually the only thing that can.
When you chip in your $3 it pushes Trump, Lake, and the rest of the GOP back. And when hundreds or even thousands of people join you, it adds up really fast. Really.

name: Better Report
subject: What Is Inflammation, Anyway?
body:
You stub your toe, so it turns red. Pollen levels are high, so your nose is itchy. You have a fever, so your body starts to sweat. These are all examples of our body’s normal inflammatory response when viruses, bacteria, and germs try to invade.

[Cell phones go with us everywhere — which is why they are one of the dirtiest items we come in daily contact with. Power down your phone, remove the case, and use a bleach-free, technology-safe disinfecting wipe to wipe away grime and germs. Avoid wiping the inside of charging and headphone ports, and never spray your phone directly. ](https://track.betterreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s93zhj&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&sub_level=L0)

[You stub your toe, so it turns red. Pollen levels are high, so your nose is itchy. You have a fever, so your body starts to sweat. These are all examples of our body’s normal inflammatory response when viruses, bacteria, and germs try to invade. The word “inflammation” is often used broadly, but it is a complex response that every human can experience. ](https://track.betterreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s93zhj&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&sub_level=L0)

[What's one investing secret that billionaires like Jay-Z and Ken Griffin know that you don’t? A market whose prices grew at an annualized rate of 18.2% from 1984 to 2022, outpacing the S&P; 500, and stocks like Berkshire Hathaway and Walmart: Basquiat. That’s right, the market for Jean-Michel Basquiat’s art. And now, for the first time, everyday investors are getting in on the action. Thanks to Masterworks, the award-winning platform for investing in blue-chip art. When Masterworks sells a painting – like the 20 it's already sold – investors can realize a return. All of their offerings are limited, and shares can sell out in just minutes, but Better Report readers can skip the waitlist with this exclusive link.

[The appliances we rely on to clean things in our homes need to be kept clean and in good working order — dishwashers are no exception. Detergent, mineral residue from hard water, and plain old dirt can build up inside your favorite labor-saving appliance, causing it to clean less efficiently and allowing odors to accumulate. Fortunately, cleaning the machine that makes your dishes sparkle is pretty straightforward. ](https://track.betterreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s93zhj&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&sub_level=L0)

name: Bob Casey
subject: Did you know this?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2041%2E552475%2EbY4OoE)
Happy President’s Day, Peter.
Here’s a fun piece of trivia for you: Which president invented the swivel chair?
Find the answer here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240219-1?refcode=em20240219-1](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240219-1?refcode=em20240219-1&recurring=1&refcode2=2041_552475_bY4OoE&akid=2041%2E552475%2EbY4OoE)**
Here’s another piece of presidential trivia: **Pennsylvania has helped decide 10 out of the last 12 presidential elections over the past 48 years.**
Our Commonwealth has a long history of deciding U.S. elections, and 2024 will be no different. What happens here will decide what happens across the Nation, and we can’t afford a single misstep.
That’s why your support is so important.
[**Can I count on you to chip in $2.50 or $5 today? If everyone who reads this email chips in, we’ll be able to keep PA, the Senate, and the White House blue.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240219-1?refcode=em20240219-1&recurring=1&refcode2=2041_552475_bY4OoE&akid=2041%2E552475%2EbY4OoE)

Thank you.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: A true patriot’s endosement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | Peter, I am so excited to receive an official endorsement from Lt Col. Oliver North (Ret.).

Ollie is a a retired Marine Colonel who has dedicated his life to defending our country, both abroad from foreign enemies and at home from the radical Left.

But I don’t want you to just hear from me, here’s what Ollie had to say:

**_“Hung Cao won’t run from a fight. He never has. He never will. Though possessed of true humility, he won’t ‘play it safe’ or deliver meaningless speeches or strive to be ‘politically correct.’ We, our children and grand-children deserve to have Hung Cao, an American Hero, a man of faith, integrity, and proven courage in mortal combat, representing us and our values in the U.S. Senate.“_**

I am so happy to have this true patriots endorsement. Will you join him?!

name: TonyEvers.com
subject: We have to save American democracy together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, did you see
Cassi’s message about the importance of Wisconsin in the 2024 election? We
have the potential to save American democracy by defeating MAGA
Republicans, led by Donald Trump, this fall.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2231?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Feb2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.6&t=1001&akid=6610%2E1827488%2E6UBb02 ]The stakes are higher than ever, and we can’t afford to fall short.
Please pitch in here before our mid month fundraising deadline. We need to
close our budget gap so we can make important investments to win
Wisconsin.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Begin forwarded message:

Derek,

As Tony’s campaign manager, I’ve worked tirelessly with Tony and the team
to win several close elections, not unlike the one we’re sure to face
during this November’s election.

I won’t lie, we’re up against a strong Republican opposition with a
seemingly endless stream of fundraising. But my experience has shown me
that every dollar we receive from generous supporters like you makes a
difference.

With both abortion rights and fair elections on the ballot, we must be
strategic with our efforts to preserve our democracy. There is no room for
error in a state like Wisconsin that has the potential to determine the
entire course of the election outcome.

As we gear up to November, we must keep making critical investments now.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2231?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Feb2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.6&t=1002&akid=6610%2E1827488%2E6UBb02 ]Can Tony and I count on you to donate $10 or any amount
to help us reach our mid month fundraising goal before the deadline to
ensure we have the strength to defeat MAGA Republicans this fall?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=20836%2E4449941%2E9FEjub). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=20836%2E4449941%2E9FEjub).**

name: Ted Cruz
subject: FWD: Leftwing Protesters Outside My House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
This is disgraceful – but I won’t back down...

| | | Did you see this message below? \- Ted
---
|
---
From: Ted CruzTo: All Supporters Date: Saturday, February 17, 2024 Subject: Leftwing Protesters Outside My House
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, For the second time this week, far-left agitators have come to my house early in the morning chanting hateful slogans, ringing bells, and shouting at the top of their lungs. They claim to be protesting Israel’s actions in Gaza, _but their real goal is to wake up my neighbors, harass my family, and attempt to intimidate me_. **I won’t be intimidated by these lefty malcontents and their liberal paymasters- but I need your help to stand strong and fight back. Will you chip in right now to let me and my family know you’re with us? >> [https://secure.winred.com/stand-with-ted-cruz-and-family-now](http://trk.tedcruz.)** Sadly, this is now common in American politics thanks to the far-left non-profits that fund political agitators seemingly everywhere on every issue- we see protesters blocking traffic, interrupting campus speeches, screaming hatred on the streets, and even attempting to vandalize artwork in museums. _ Now they’ve come to my home... _
---
****[****DONATE NOW TO HELP ME FIGHT BACK >>****](http://trk.tedcruz._nYkwicIUTFP3KA)****
---
**Why is this happening?** Because the left isn’t able to tolerate any dissent. And the far-left has always used physical violence and intimidation in order to put pressure on their political opponents. Now this tactic is common in within the Democratic Party. It’s wrong. Please know that _I’ll never bow to these disgraceful tactics_. I’ll stand strong for Texas and the United States of America- always. When I look outside my window at the screaming mob, I only grow more resolved and committed to fight for what’s right. Thank you.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
---
[**SHOW THE FAR-LEFT YOU STAND WITH TEAM CRUZ**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
| | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
---
| | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701

name: Sen. Dianne Hesselbein
subject: [BREAKING]: New maps are OFFICIAL
disclaimer_text: paid for by the State Senate Democratic Committee, Jeff Smith, Treasurer
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240219_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP&amount=33 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240219_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP&amount=33]
Did you see the news today?
Governor Evers just signed new legislative maps into law.
While this has been a confusing process, one thing is clear: these maps provide a clear path to a Democratic majority.
We have to start fundraising NOW in order to win in November. We're halfway to reaching our New Maps Digital Goal of $33,000 – can you chip in NOW so that we can take back the majority in the State Senate? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240219_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP&amount=33]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20240219_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP_]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=20240219_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP_]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20240219_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP_]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20240219_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP_]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20240219_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP_]
Another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240219_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP_]
After the old maps were struck down, Senate Dems fought hard for fair maps.
It's been over a decade since we've run campaigns in fair districts.
2024 is our chance to win BIG and finally pass the legislative change we've been advocating for. From reproductive rights to public education, there is so much at stake in November.
I'll be honest, this is going to be a lot of work. We must defend all of our current incumbents and flip a few extremist-held seats.
This is going to take a massive grassroots coalition, and that's why we've set an ambitious New Maps Digital Goal of $33,000.
Your contributions to the Wisconsin Senate Democrats will empower us to take back the majority and plot a pro-choice, pro-democracy path forward.
I'm asking you: can you chip in $33 or whatever you can to our New Maps Digital Goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240219_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP&amount=33]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240219_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP&amount=33]
In solidarity,
Sen. Dianne Hesselbein
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240216_em_fr_b1_AW_NGP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240216_em_fr_b1_AW_NGP]
The Wisconsin State Senate Democratic Committee (SSDC) is working around the clock to elect more Democrats to the Wisconsin State Senate. And with a fair, impartial State Supreme Court coupled with the prospect of fair legislative lines, we’re ready to Win Wisconsin and take back our Democratic majority, finally giving a voice to Wisconsin voters who for so long haven’t had one in our legislature.
2024 is going to be a crucial election year. But we need your help if we’re going to take back our majority.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Wisconsin SSDC
P.O. Box 164
Madison, WI 53701
SUPPORT SENATE DEMS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240219_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP&amount=33]
Authorized and paid for by the State Senate Democratic Committee, Jeff Smith, Treasurer.
Wisconsin State Senate Democratic Committee
P.O. Box 164
Madison, WI 53701
United States

name: Carolina at United We Dream Action
subject: ICE and CBP agents and higher-ups are using slurs against migrants
body:
Just another example of the rampant hate infecting the agencies. | | | Peter, ICE and CBP agents were just caught using derogatory slurs against migrants. Through a Freedom of Information Act discovery, border patrol agents and even higher-ups in Washington were found to be using racial slurs against the people they over-police and brutalize. This just goes to show the casual racism and hate that infects every level of ICE and CBP — and adds to the list of reasons why these agencies must be defunded. Congress has a fundraising deadline coming up in a couple of weeks, and they’ll likely be pushing to increase funding to these agencies even MORE. Now is the time to dial up the pressure on Congress to keep that from happening. These agencies have inflicted irreparable damage on our communities through family separation, cruel detentions, and deportation. **Enough is enough — that’s why we’re asking you to make a $10 donation today to aid our efforts in finally defunding ICE and CBP:** **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8L1uBQJOVv6GWPrKzaLvV7UAOgiqKt9Twio-hACIVji5Y9pTbb79-hb_VvabEAQCjD-QM2HIcEoIhOcMXssDyfjZv8i1b2sSAS2s4kl1zNKoIgFONO6QfsC6iv_ZVnhMf4D8EepGtZ6xjsAdThGe51kTIw5kmaeB4NzX6CyHjzu9037xh_xRDAwxP9U2mAoOChOz-9r_P3Jbevg_9K2rAAUCT9cR8eeV4vfNu_i0AiCkhUQZ49t7n999nz-pE2ILizLfkRK7fvpbuBxFXTo5nbxxMUZGKzyimGj8HGhXKfQ9PkmfXokIWyrCrrB6KPGJWZbKwfz9aaaUYJEfaZ9_iCmHxMTr0nAEjbyYdPhYHnBc6GGLFo2gzcPgMRaD4jjAOw1B16iJqznmVtVt7ZS-KNThOQr10uejfSy8llPyRKar_TioVwVVnDYdLJhghpT0omoBAbhlbaLmsYSImJpKnFIf5iAzIMDtRu5ukCeZNdap5eIMtUNIphGb53gN-ZJCz/43z/Np804OfXSEGaopT-LI0VrQ/h0/GUAkCHcmT89-hrpXV0gAWn4TCPKwjjv61JdqaH4CRvI)

Friend, **
** Today is a holiday that has always been one of my favorites.

Because of my love for service, it has always been extra special to me.

And I’ve always thought every President deserves to be celebrated and honored for their accomplishments.

But in today’s world that is really hard to do.
**[Ever since Biden took office — there is not much to celebrate anymore.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=8955390407574d979c3cf0d2d85e3458&_e=nWPpUU3LXtvTK-wn6DkoDM2UW9JR3OqvTa4r3SD6NtTEHphG0k-P-vWTuD13Ph-TQ06YnmucUimnHAqONHZ8NasVzowogWFzGj1c-LrrfTOugQzxfpKptopFkO5rBmH3-E4JmYSj9a4Mnfk_9WR2SKsvJlX92v6Z7yYTTXCFsA5y_iI6IJwAIHpPqg6WG_zAKwKTooAZbUM9Hpp4V6GyHkqL8XwWpgOHSwDStLPEefdKPidQ1NBJcmRBwcW11_5EYHJe83VYvH36PLOIjPvO-nD-JzdqYldb1mbOZ-d_Oe3vNa63pQsVe-tWRnk9VF1ja-GBAxkUId4ACwPMvJSesuolNy8bI7gRNXw86wXXv-0JfdaWiUiz_LCOGnVhuAZ_6IcSk25v9j7Ck2HsfqR3fJl2g_q_GIU_0nQ6Xvknm-Q0wen38QLp7D8EmxyO_ln4)** The sad reality is that our nation is one in decline. Friend, how are we supposed to enjoy this day when our current President is failing us? He has done nothing but create chaos. We now have:
* An unsafe southern border — allowing illegal immigrants, murderers, and cartel members to flood into our country
* A fentanyl crisis — killing more than 70,000 Americans a year
* Record high inflation rates — So high that Americans can’t even afford their essentials
* The Chinese Communist Party spying on us — allowing them to have access to our children's lives

---
** _It is time for a change._** It is time for a **RED** Senate again. **[But unfortunately, Joe Biden and his posse are ready for a fight — so it’s going to be anything but easy.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=8955390407574d979c3cf0d2d85e3458&_e=nWPpUU3LXtvTK-wn6DkoDM2UW9JR3OqvTa4r3SD6NtTEHphG0k-P-vWTuD13Ph-TQ06YnmucUimnHAqONHZ8NasVzowogWFzGj1c-LrrfTOugQzxfpKptopFkO5rBmH3-E4JmYSj9a4Mnfk_9WR2SKsvJlX92v6Z7yYTTXCFsA5y_iI6IJwAIHpPqg6WG_zAKwKTooAZbUM9Hpp4V6GyHkqL8XwWpgOHSwDStLPEefdKPidQ1NBJcmRBwcW11_5EYHJe83VYvH36PLOIjPvO-rAucQduYdEAZWQpH7KMmHdOQCnmJfGyt5EaLL1MTbbicOeVnOP6QIfNadP2Z4lODnww4Yr3wFnG44-vUO0-W1-AJOu5MOUI3ztWcGUpUHGpFTckcmWLbj_r3n3TfPXJ8iD1wON32bddiqMWE3TQhxU6qk2EuJ__hdFGMsXd9E7Z)** They have **MILLIONS** of on-hand cash to take us down. To fight back I am going to need as much help as I can get from supporters like you, Friend!

I really do hate asking for money but it gives us a better chance at defeating Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.
**_[Friend, would you consider donating whatever you can today to help me take down the radical Left?](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=8955390407574d979c3cf0d2d85e3458&_e=nWPpUU3LXtvTK-wn6DkoDM2UW9JR3OqvTa4r3SD6NtTEHphG0k-P-vWTuD13Ph-TQ06YnmucUimnHAqONHZ8NasVzowogWFzGj1c-LrrfTOugQzxfpKptopFkO5rBmH3-E4JmYSj9a4Mnfk_9WR2SKsvJlX92v6Z7yYTTXCFsA5y_iI6IJwAIHpPqg6WG_zAKwKTooAZbUM9Hpp4V6GyHkqL8XwWpgOHSwDStLPEefdKPidQ1NBJcmRBwcW11_5EYHJe83VYvH36PLOIjPvO-tABTotO1FjTPxEIFuptt3FlssqfnAcRJN8w0vj84pa6eLAFwi2r00HLA0IhdJu7GO5m3AakRxPssWkfc7ikPCt7D30_h3CxpaIlGXEYZRNfsnct2bxo9negArTbRUTFxUR1FcBkPeUvMTq6Wfnf7CoVvy3VwERZb_Ko6RcXNSos)_** Thank you,

Mike Rogers

Fellow Conservative,

Jon Tester is already breaking records for ad spending in this Senate race. He is fundraising like the career D.C. politician he is and putting together a formidable campaign.

Winning this race is going to be quite a challenge. But a challenge I am up to. _**I can and will defeat Jon Tester by offering Montana a new brand of conservative leadership that stands up to the socialist left and fights for the principled solutions our state and country need.**_

But I need you on my team if we're going to get this done. Your support for my campaign will mean victory or defeat. **[I’m writing to ask you to please consider donating to my campaign today. Every day we're not hitting our goals, we're losing.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fc5745c34afd4373972adf2dd7d9e2b8&_e=39HI-e3H87zg83DkEgbw1yFnia5CsieX_cG3DMJn2ReFMPsf_mWPZtBTHM3oEfvXzfcVE_PfrhngypGO1dhWO6K3wmdeUIjMVQiQanPWuQK6XryV72s1P2qZGmFoqOpIohi3OBcCtr_QE-HLSM0vRribzntEJYsusyJT-kFXM7ywKkRYpUYw88h2qE7jE0nLbCfeBkGjjK0PetKPWDifuHQ5hMAFxT4aoieDvTcPWWlwJWFj8R-163blVLWFppV9wTLhCXj400ySSAtzFI8N7a8co_XdESlQjlqlRuJ-Ow4RAQwrJmmsLSlzihEFeTqNn3CkTjqSwQ7oGGJWliPbo6nMvF9IPfGjOp_akaj29B699Ak6h0NKGnXzp1jaPaFKVnXHYX41X4xQn9Oep3aoZK0SKO5WA9jKVHqQui-q6Vw%3D)**

[**HELP TIM TODAY ->** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fc5745c34afd4373972adf2dd7d9e2b8&_e=39HI-e3H87zg83DkEgbw1yFnia5CsieX_cG3DMJn2ReFMPsf_mWPZtBTHM3oEfvXzfcVE_PfrhngypGO1dhWO6K3wmdeUIjMVQiQanPWuQK6XryV72s1P2qZGmFoqOpIohi3OBcCtr_QE-HLSM0vRribzntEJYsusyJT-kFXM7ywKkRYpUYw88h2qE7jE0nLbCfeBkGjjK0PetKPWDifuHQ5hMAFxT4aoieDvTcPWWlwJWFj8R-163blVLWFppV905Qq5797-Ok__oqxGtIMPT2S0KQpf0cuaBt-udAxHHY0ugi2__VfG2TDDL5HCbkHvVU6i9DzJX4Kyrwt-vyjc1wtMsb6P0DaJEkasaGD5tCSnrvfeCpIH5sS2FE-6EGCENIfDlnP81-Wj0xGF4CwdpG2bTj0K49dBFtJ5ade70U%3D)
This campaign is going to get even more expensive than it already is, which is to say **very, very expensive**. We’re already getting outspent by millions of dollars! And those millions are being spent on attack ads that smear my record of success and my conservative credentials.

That's why it's critical for me and my campaign to keep our own ads on air defending my record as a successful businessman and principled conservative. Every day we're not on air, _**Jon Tester will attempt to define me on his own terms.**_

Those ads will be costly.

**[Can I count on you to donate to my campaign today?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fc5745c34afd4373972adf2dd7d9e2b8&_e=39HI-e3H87zg83DkEgbw1yFnia5CsieX_cG3DMJn2ReFMPsf_mWPZtBTHM3oEfvXzfcVE_PfrhngypGO1dhWO6K3wmdeUIjMVQiQanPWuQK6XryV72s1P2qZGmFoqOpIohi3OBcCtr_QE-HLSM0vRribzntEJYsusyJT-kFXM7ywKkRYpUYw88h2qE7jE0nLbCfeBkGjjK0PetKPWDifuHQ5hMAFxT4aoieDvTcPWWlwJWFj8R-163blVLWFppV9FDq2gaC3w7HnNqIpo8ZacRwlaVBZHpE8cKY3ElidVmNay2YvnMPNVC0Biokphxuc9uhBj84IEyq0f26u7WVnjHtM2SIjTJyj4WAXrAVQjSYZwWCJ522HiD3yFJd03C_duxIdTq54HSyeU2nMPjRGGF4S3tIdqjZ0FMrbqubEtmc%3D)**

_**Let’s get this done.**_

For America's Future,
Tim Sheehy
Republican for U.S. Senate, Montana

[**JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP
