name: Sarah McBride
subject: Delaware’s own
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79304075/456070727/-735822927?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20240219_rsvp_PresidentsDay_cand_oc_act_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjliZGE4Yy00MGNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xt63xJNaNEZfhMtNBQqtCIHzEc02eBwKZfUHcEDRxR0=)
---
When I came out, I heard from a lot of friends and family, and some of the most wholehearted responses I got were from the Biden family. Beau said “I'm so proud of you. I love you, and you're still a part of the Biden family.” Joe shared the same sentiments in private. Since then, I’ve been so proud to watch Delaware’s Own Joe Biden become one of the staunchest allies in national politics for equal rights, declaring “love is love is love” on Meet the Press and calling trans rights the equal rights issue of our time. I am so lucky and thankful that the Bidens embraced me without hesitation and made it possible for me to live my dreams. They have been role models on how to lead a life of purpose by serving people. Joe Biden often quotes his dad when he says: **Everyone is entitled to be treated with dignity and respect** They are simple words but essential. And they don’t stop with issues of equal rights. Dignity and respect must be at the heart of our politics. We owe it to our democracy to respect everyone, including those who live, look, and, yes, think differently than you or I do. And we owe it to ourselves and our neighbors to pursue policies that uplift the dignity of every person in every way. The dignity of work and worth. The dignity of choice. And the dignity to determine our future. That’s why Joe, Delaware Democrats, and I are fighting for **good paying jobs with real benefits, strong unions, universal health care, reproductive freedom, gun safety, and, yes, equal rights for all.** On this President’s Day I am taking a brief moment from the campaign trail to reflect on the very core of Joe Biden that makes him the leader we need in the current political climate. Joe understands that each of us yearns to have our dignity seen and affirmed. With your help, I’ll be proud to have my name on the same ballot as Joe in our great state (the very best state, if I say so myself). I hope this email finds you well and, if you’re lucky enough to have a three-day weekend, that it’s doing everything you need it to. Thanks friends, — Sarah | | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. clean_body: | = When I came out, I heard from a lot of friends and family, and some of the most wholehearted responses I got were from the Biden family. Beau said “I'm so proud of you. I love you, and you're still a part of the Biden family.” Joe shared the same sentiments in private. Since then, I’ve been so proud to watch Delaware’s Own Joe Biden become one of the staunchest allies in national politics for equal rights, declaring “love is love is love” on Meet the Press and calling trans rights the equal rights issue of our time. I am so lucky and thankful that the Bidens embraced me without hesitation and made it possible for me to live my dreams. They have been role models on how to lead a life of purpose by serving people. Joe Biden often quotes his dad when he says: Everyone is entitled to be treated with dignity and respect They are simple words but essential. And they don’t stop with issues of equal rights. Dignity and respect must be at the heart of our politics. We owe it to our democracy to respect everyone, including those who live, look, and, yes, think differently than you or I do. And we owe it to ourselves and our neighbors to pursue policies that uplift the dignity of every person in every way. The dignity of work and worth. The dignity of choice. And the dignity to determine our future. That’s why Joe, Delaware Democrats, and I are fighting for good paying jobs with real benefits, strong unions, universal health care, reproductive freedom, gun safety, and, yes, equal rights for all. On this President’s Day I am taking a brief moment from the campaign trail to reflect on the very core of Joe Biden that makes him the leader we need in the current political climate. Joe understands that each of us yearns to have our dignity seen and affirmed. With your help, I’ll be proud to have my name on the same ballot as Joe in our great state (the very best state, if I say so myself). I hope this email finds you well and, if you’re lucky enough to have a three-day weekend, that it’s doing everything you need it to. Thanks friends, — Sarah | | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware McBride for Delaware P.O. name: Trump Train News
subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9thqqec5pj21fhbhelef6jjv13r4qq7ovslchr0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spjm6ob4c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
You probably don’t know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor’s wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement.
You see, this generous donor left money to his alma mater to teach free-market economics and asked Hillsdale to make sure his wishes were honored.
Well, I won’t bore you with the details of the case, but let’s say we had differing interpretations of free-market economics.
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions, many founded along the same lines as Hillsdale. Maybe your alma mater is one of them. But it’s a sad fact that too many of them have departed from their founding missions and are pursuing...something else.
Is it any wonder that, on many college campuses free speech is under threat, as conservative speakers or faculty are harassed or even assaulted!
That’s why I want to hear from you today. What do you think about higher education today? Is your alma mater, or are other schools in your state staying true to their original mission?
And are they doing enough to provide their students with a proper understanding of American history and government—including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution?

## Are you concerned that political correctness negatively influences what young Americans are learning?
[Yes](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlivu9aqq0g32f2snopjmkfj6s091od15h8n5tqg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spjm6ob4c5h2bs) [No](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs3ct6j6nvlkfg973j7af5v511d4bmnd2oh2nir0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spjm6ob4c5h2bs) [Not Sure/Undecided](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6rjno5c70i8v31q7ce3rlbi6jjhjfn78nforvj0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spjm6ob4c5h2bs)
[We want your opinion, so please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your thoughts on education today.»](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi6aqb10er67h2fsvkshqc15kuqfbavv2fbfdo7g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spjm6ob4c5h2bs)
Hillsdale College stands firm, rooted in its original mission, and faithful to the intent of its founders. And in response to the trends I mentioned, we have to do even more to **reach** and **teach** millions on behalf of liberty. So, we need your input, to make our work more effective.
That’s why I hope you will please take our brief higher education survey using this secure link:
[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7kbl7jqnl8ghujotkb3ig89j8obfgolv4j09pso_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spjm6ob4c5h2bs)
As you may know, we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government money—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. We do this precisely to preserve our founding mission. This uncompromising stand frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations that other colleges must accept (maybe even your alma mater!)
But you should know that this independence comes at a cost, and we must rely on the support of our friends like you to do our work.
So after completing your survey, please consider making a generous tax-deductible gift to help us **reach** and **teach** millions more citizens nationwide.
I hope I’m not too presumptuous in saying this...but perhaps you can even spare a few dollars that you were going to give to your alma mater.
Thank you again for your faithful partnership with us and your unwavering support of liberty and education.
Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College |

| Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrt9no8u24h2e893j8ldvomir6c2lmsscm2b2lgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spjm6ob4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9gm4o37c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcgeb8akvh37pt0ai0u908hq7cqrfeum49h1jfm8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30spjm6ob4c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk251t59bt2c08beks6ooqs39185885pg2334mv0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0c3j6eor1chgm49fg)

body:

| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/339?t=2&akid=14090%2E53494%2EPSII7f)
---
| | Hi There,

I'm Eva, and I'm the email production manager at Evergreen. You may not hear from me much, but I'm behind the scenes of each and every email from Evergreen, making sure these messages reach you.

Every click, share, and action you take helps us build a thriving and just clean energy economy, together. So, thank you for being with us on this journey.

**Because we value and respect your participation, I wanted to let you know that our emails might look a little different the next time you hear from us.** We're working on some improvements to these messages and will be trying out some new ideas along the way. Rest assured, we're still going to be the same Evergreen—laser-focused on delivering you key action opportunities and the latest climate policy analysis.

If something doesn't look quite right in the coming days or if you're having trouble taking action, reach out to us at [hello@evergreenaction.com](mailto:hello@evergreenaction.com "hello@evergreenaction.com") or reply directly to this email. I'm always happy to help!

With gratitude,

Eva Piatek
Email Production Manager

clean_body: I ousted McCarthy. Here is my next target. | POLITICO: Gaetz ousted McCarthy: Now he 's moving on to another House GOP target. Patriot, You read that right. I EJECTED Kevin McCarthy from the speakership, and now I 'm going RINO hunting. My next target is Mike Bost of Illinois - a total FAILURE of a representative for our MAGA Movement who needs to exit stage left , IMMEDIATELY. | I took down RINO Liz Cheney when she blocked our conservative agenda and attacked President Trump. I took down Kevin McCarthy when he LIED to our faces and cut back room deals with the Radical Left. Now I 'm going after Mike Bost - another feckless RINO, masquerading around D.C. pretending to represent conservative values. We need leaders who will take action and fight the corrupt Deep State. RINOs are a cancer to our movement, and I'm on a mission to Drain the Swamp and put D.C. back to work for YOU. I'm going RINO hunting, Patriot. Thanks, Matt Gaetz Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz Copyright (C) 2024 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved.

In fairness, if I were drowning in as much legal debt as he is, I'd be selling the shirt off my back. _Which he's actually doing. 👇_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79305771/456074158/571933754?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.19_B1_TrumpQVC_Actives_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmExOGIwNy00MmNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I2fxn1Zq-ufNcqPfUwsW05QPANMol2y8tO5pMzmlbgI=) Donald Trump really would make one hell of a salesman. One day, the guy's selling phony college degrees. By supporting our work, you are supporting state Democrats who will fight to BLOCK the GOP’s dangerous agenda and PROTECT your fundamental freedoms. ➡️The DLCC is the only party organization dedicated to electing Democrats to statehouses nationwide. But we rely on grassroots donations from Democrats like you to put our strategy into action. ➡️State Dems are facing ultra-competitive special elections right now , with nearly two dozen already on the books. These races are critical opportunities to build Democratic power in the states – your investment today could be the difference between victory and defeat. name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: A solution to end the MIGOP divide.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/migop.org/a-solution-to-end-the-migop-divide?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| | Good Morning Fellow Republicans,

Last week was pivotal because a lot of information came to light that will impact the future of the Michigan Republican Party. I encourage each of you to consider the following:
* My administration has obtained more concrete evidence of the RNC leadership colluding with the “political lynch mob” to try and eliminate me as Chairwoman.
* Pete Hoekstra and his “hoaxster” organization are fraudulently soliciting funds while impersonating the MIGOP. **According to their bogus website, all funds they receive are being deposited into the** **[MICHIGAN GOP RED PAC](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=3084d2d907&e=a2af77507c)** **account.**
* The majority of the MIGOP State Committee members and Precinct Delegates have made it clear that they support me as Chairwoman, and they will not be deterred by the sinister schemes of Pete Hoekstra and his fellow “hoaxsters.”
* The Michigan Republican Party is a legal entity. Prominent individuals and organizations other than the Michigan Republican Party State Central Committee, proclaiming Pete as the chair, have no legal standing. He cannot legally conduct business, which includes a convention on behalf of the Michigan Republican Party. As the legal MIGOP Chairperson, only I can do that.
* Pete Hoekstra is claiming that he is going to hold a separate convention. The fact is, he is wrong! His claim that he has the legal authority to do so is not only unethical, but it also creates mass confusion amongst the MIGOP County Chairs and Precinct Delegates. His audacity shows a complete lack of respect for the dedicated Republicans who worked hard to plan and organize the March 2nd MIGOP District Convention at Huntington Place. The Calls to Convention have gone out stating it would be held in Detroit, and the convention venue has already been paid for.

As the duly elected and twice reaffirmed Chairwoman of the MIGOP, I urge Pete Hoekstra to join me at the 2024 MIGOP District Convention in Detroit on March 2, 2024. This is an excellent opportunity for us to convene in the same room, stand in front of approximately 2000 delegates, and **end this divide with a vote**! From that point, we should both agree to respect the results of the vote and put an end to this manufactured “dispute” once and for all.

By uniting the Party via the outcome of this legitimate vote, we can do the following:
* Be victorious in 2024.
* Strengthen our ability to better serve _We The People_.
* Protect Michiganders from the pernicious agendas of Democrats.

If we consider the alternative, no one who emerges from two conventions will enjoy even a veneer of unity, and Michigan Republicans will know there is still a huge divide within the Party. This is important because our state will play a critical role in deciding who will win the 2024 Presidential election.

The bottom line is, let the delegates decide! This is the only possible way to move forward at this point.

In Liberty,

**_Kristina Karamo _**
_Chairwoman_
**Michigan Republican Party**
Click here to donate to the Michigan Republican Party:
[**https://secure.anedot.com/michigan-republican-party/general-fund**](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=c178b5d6ac&e=a2af77507c)
---

3450 Alpine Ave. NW

Grand Rapids, MI 49544

You can [update your preferences](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f72dfc23a2&e=a2af77507c&c=8e663950f2) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f72dfc23a2&t=b&e=a2af77507c&c=8e663950f2).

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=39455473d8764a1baaca89e596bf4a4f&_e=RwnY4og4NIEUTxxOv4cANi5NtGjqJynNyaR87wPN7CKBLMdcm_sJc50FjjYd_M65jF7Adijj6wiwt4XC92nY2uj9j_lBLjQkLcs24J4sEvPsmLoDzd33ri9YBectGvoZuvm1nTu9nBmWgfD6M2oAmf5AGIgSkIpaY2BpL3461EQydrvgSXLQbYDQZgAoafgHzDbaqJDlMamH_DNqFws4AlB6e-HyZ0ow5CeaQoTl2nyEP-aWyWapj6FdMCAjy2muudqhWUXw0kCPWFXki-J62V2X8YhxJ6yLQH7Ooq14FFWvyZpzxzbrnwWg7cJGBUVhlIxcLtjTG0n_EdKR04UyHgAkBvITJo4E_1BW-nJs8fxJ1fZ1z5BcxHeC62MKFPk0whd1DRAf9QiHXnIE4Ar14_h_RqIfMCI8eBX-lC70qts%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=39455473d8764a1baaca89e596bf4a4f&_e=RwnY4og4NIEUTxxOv4cANi5NtGjqJynNyaR87wPN7CKBLMdcm_sJc50FjjYd_M65jF7Adijj6wiwt4XC92nY2uj9j_lBLjQkLcs24J4sEvPsmLoDzd33ri9YBectGvoZuvm1nTu9nBmWgfD6M2oAmf5AGIgSkIpaY2BpL3461EQydrvgSXLQbYDQZgAoafgHzDbaqJDlMamH_DNqFws4AlB6e-HyZ0ow5CeaQoTl2nyEP-aWyWapj6FdMCAjy2muudqhWUXw0kCPWFXki-J62f7G-DopS9KdR24RtvVcB5545sThiIsuuurbe65P0jwzU9TM8B6jFpNvMGf9ucJM3olfujobBNY61Yhtpnhg28vHD_5WWacq_Qqj0IMV9UwUXYqFRQZNm0QFStK6zW4FxkuoTXly1MqSJbQPk9Ss3uw%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=39455473d8764a1baaca89e596bf4a4f&_e=RwnY4og4NIEUTxxOv4cANi5NtGjqJynNyaR87wPN7CKBLMdcm_sJc50FjjYd_M65jF7Adijj6wiwt4XC92nY2uj9j_lBLjQkLcs24J4sEvPsmLoDzd33ri9YBectGvoZuvm1nTu9nBmWgfD6M2oAmf5AGIgSkIpaY2BpL3461EQydrvgSXLQbYDQZgAoafgHzDbaqJDlMamH_DNqFws4AlB6e-HyZ0ow5CeaQoTl2nyEP-aWyWapj6FdMCAjy2muudqhWUXw0kCPWFXki-J62exmpNqMpwI5OiMwn6s3e9731ygfVoshW64TPqeUTUii3qce3Zhddgjd0Hq2qW3PN_a4-IFnpUoLB4n9gw5WVAhLha6Uo6er4xMXUhL6pDb-R3hwqNW27zc2mYHM53PiaRbjNK9mkZyYG2sIV73vbv8%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. name: Debbie
subject: Rick Scott is calling me a liar every chance he gets.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
He knows he's more vulnerable than ever before
| | |
---
Listen, I need you to hear this: My opponent, Rick Scott, has already spent $3 MILLION running attack ads.
Not only has he spent more than any other GOP Senate candidate so far, he's calling me a liar every chance he gets. He just went on the record to say that I lied about his stance on abortion.**Let me make this clear:** _Rick Scott voted for a 15-week national abortion ban._ **I am unapologetically pro-choice, and his accusations don't scare me. I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom.** His spending and his blatant attempts to smear me and this campaign might look like a sign of strength at first glance. But that couldn't be further from the truth.
**In reality, Rick Scott is terrified. Honestly, I don't blame him — polling shows our team in the lead, and experts at _CNN_ just ranked Florida as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip blue.**

Scott knows that he's more vulnerable than ever before. Last time around, he had to outspend his Democratic opponent by $50 MILLION to just barely win this seat — that race came down to just 10,033 votes. Now, he's trying to pull the same trick again in a desperate last-ditch effort to save his campaign. We can't let him get away with it: **[_So, friend, if you have anything extra to spare today, will you chip in to help us win in Florida and defend Democrats' Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79307661/456078200/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk822-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZjNzJhMWUtNDRjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fAAKvNbW-rq2gwQPDu64-33KVePUAs9uC2kzZyJvGGs=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79307662/456078201/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk822-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZjNzJhMWUtNDRjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fAAKvNbW-rq2gwQPDu64-33KVePUAs9uC2kzZyJvGGs=)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79307663/456078202/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk822-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZjNzJhMWUtNDRjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fAAKvNbW-rq2gwQPDu64-33KVePUAs9uC2kzZyJvGGs=)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79307664/456078203/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk822-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZjNzJhMWUtNDRjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fAAKvNbW-rq2gwQPDu64-33KVePUAs9uC2kzZyJvGGs=)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79307665/456078204/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk822-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZjNzJhMWUtNDRjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fAAKvNbW-rq2gwQPDu64-33KVePUAs9uC2kzZyJvGGs=)
---
Listen, friend, we cannot let these attacks go unanswered. He is lying, and he is spreading disinformation.
Rick Scott knows that he can't win this race by telling the truth about his record. He built his fortune as the CEO of a hospital chain convicted of what the Justice Department called the largest Medicare fraud scheme ever. He made off with millions, pled the Fifth, and faced no consequences. Now, he's pushing a far-right agenda that would ban abortions, raise taxes on working families, and end Social Security and Medicare.
My story is different. As a teen immigrant from Ecuador, I fought hard to create my own American dream. In high school, I worked early morning shifts to help my family afford rent for our one room apartment.
I studied hard to earn a scholarship that made college possible for me and dedicated my career to public service. Eventually, I ran for Congress, flipped a battleground district blue, and became the first South American immigrant elected to the House. In Congress, I fought tirelessly to expand Medicare access, lower the cost of living, end gun violence, and protect families like yours.
**I've spent my life giving back to the communities that gave me so much and fighting to protect the opportunities that made my story possible. Rick Scott has spent his career getting rich and leaving working families behind. That's why I'm running for Senate to defeat him — because Floridians will suffer if he wins six more years.**
**But every day that we allow these ads to go unanswered, his lies and disinformation are reaching more and more voters, undermining our message, and jeopardizing our campaign. We've got to fight back, and I can't do that without your help:[So I'm personally asking — if you've made it this far, will you please chip in $5 to help us tell the truth about Rick Scott's record and flip Florida blue? With your help, this race is truly ours to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79307666/456078205/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk822-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZjNzJhMWUtNDRjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fAAKvNbW-rq2gwQPDu64-33KVePUAs9uC2kzZyJvGGs=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79307667/456078206/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk822-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZjNzJhMWUtNDRjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fAAKvNbW-rq2gwQPDu64-33KVePUAs9uC2kzZyJvGGs=)
---
With immense gratitude,

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79307668/456078207/-31196584?refcode=jtk822-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZjNzJhMWUtNDRjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fAAKvNbW-rq2gwQPDu64-33KVePUAs9uC2kzZyJvGGs=)
---
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Bloated ankles
subject: The ROOT cause of swollen feet?
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Your lymphatic system acts as a
one-way detox channel for your body…
It filters and carries cellular
waste and harmful bacteria into your bloodstream for your liver &
kidneys to process and flush out…
It also plays an important part
in delivering essential nutrients all the way from your brain to
the bottoms of your feet.
Over time, these lymphatic
channels can break down, age, and congest - rendering them
USELESS… often resulting in swollen tissue around your
legs, ankles, and feet.
If you've noticed your ankles are
a little puffier… your shoes feel tighter… or your
socks are leaving a red ring around your ankles…
You may find relief when you feed
your body UNIQUE FATTY ACIDS recently found to support healthy
lymphatic function… help to remove clogs… and
increase lymphatic flow.
⇒ eat THIS fat once a day to
relieve swelling & pain
As always-to being & staying on
The Path together.

-Dr. Chad Walding
DPT, ISSA Nutrition Specialist &
NativePath Co-Founder

Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

Friends –
Happy Presidents’ Day! This holiday reminds us to reflect on the visionary leaders who have shaped the course of our history and the principles that bind us as a united people. Today, we honor the dedication and service of those who have led with courage, compassion, and a steadfast commitment to the well-being of all Americans.
As someone who’s worked under two presidential administrations, I've seen firsthand just how much goes into holding our nation’s highest office.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/flipncnickel?refcode=240219-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/flipncnickel?refcode=240219-email]
Today we honor every leader who has taken on the role of leader of the free world.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/flipncnickel?refcode=240219-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/flipncnickel?refcode=240219-email]
As we celebrate, let us pay respect to the leaders of the past while recommitting ourselves to supporting candidates this year who are committed to the values that make our nation exceptional – unity, justice, and the pursuit of a more perfect union.
Wishing you and your loved ones a happy Presidents' Day!
Wiley Nickel

clean_body: [] Friends – Happy Presidents’ Day! This holiday reminds us to reflect on the visionary leaders who have shaped the course of our history and the principles that bind us as a united people. Today, we honor the dedication and service of those who have led with courage, compassion, and a steadfast commitment to the well-being of all Americans. As someone who’s worked under two presidential administrations, I've seen firsthand just how much goes into holding our nation’s highest office. [] Today we honor every leader who has taken on the role of leader of the free world. [] As we celebrate, let us pay respect to the leaders of the past while recommitting ourselves to supporting candidates this year who are committed to the values that make our nation exceptional – unity, justice, and the pursuit of a more perfect union. Wishing you and your loved ones a happy Presidents' Day! Peter,

Jon Tester is already breaking records for ad spending in this Senate race. He is fundraising like the career D.C. politician he is and putting together a formidable campaign.

Winning this race is going to be quite a challenge. But a challenge I am up to. _**I can and will defeat Jon Tester by offering Montana a new brand of conservative leadership that stands up to the socialist left and fights for the principled solutions our state and country need.**_

But I need you on my team if we're going to get this done. Your support for my campaign will mean victory or defeat. **[I’m writing to ask you to please consider donating to my campaign today. Every day we're not hitting our goals, we're losing.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=23527993d01740bb8150918a00227887&_e=Prj5Bdts7Am8smS45PMP9smTD6JrRiksy88BW6D7djypqIs3vbge8yfMi8QPaNYqTDFnPDb8OnEhWd9-Z8TSoPhc2aDtNmuCK8XGePfENcYA-acA9TLwzFFIPsZVFyN04aujzty-v0idwWIsyXsMPfTwcbrZvRvjB1kuTwJpx-FCqid7n53csJmqkIvYngc9Bs4TZR099P3a8FOcuTvxucwRDog5mU8tQxuXtafg1OjxfJNapAXVSYKZT6-YjUOvh6ds_cKt3PJ2ZMHOkSYofSeXyNpyOzD_ACkmrVMl-tmPlDw30Vo46uxzE_2fIUBGwmeRzY4rZgqw6ZDTUaSs4fnfIidCwIeQmV87zGwsGCb12B5GI4DIts57UB18594ePefoJBwHULRLt4rFqA35KBkr5OWguA2CQE9gBpG12pw%3D)**

[**HELP TIM TODAY ->** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=23527993d01740bb8150918a00227887&_e=Prj5Bdts7Am8smS45PMP9smTD6JrRiksy88BW6D7djypqIs3vbge8yfMi8QPaNYqTDFnPDb8OnEhWd9-Z8TSoPhc2aDtNmuCK8XGePfENcYA-acA9TLwzFFIPsZVFyN04aujzty-v0idwWIsyXsMPfTwcbrZvRvjB1kuTwJpx-FCqid7n53csJmqkIvYngc9Bs4TZR099P3a8FOcuTvxucwRDog5mU8tQxuXtafg1OjxfJNapAXVSYKZT6-YjUOvKYJmRFQjRNEipdiiEjtgOBUUQfnvbflMi-TU6FJdOsGYCCKEkxpVRbSMyn9hCh-CaKWJHpYNDnM27YdiWrAYdnd7cFRnrPVGWizpJvUvyM0kvVSJdwlwopQs_8VMNOPFOxwhGGOilbYBNASZ-Tc7IdJd91BkOLmo2yNnXs8DcPI%3D)
This campaign is going to get even more expensive than it already is, which is to say **very, very expensive**. We’re already getting outspent by millions of dollars! And those millions are being spent on attack ads that smear my record of success and my conservative credentials.

That's why it's critical for me and my campaign to keep our own ads on air defending my record as a successful businessman and principled conservative. Every day we're not on air, _**Jon Tester will attempt to define me on his own terms.**_

Those ads will be costly.

clean_body: This race is shaping up to be the most expensive Senate race in the country. We need to get our fundraising going if we want any chance of winning. | | Peter, Jon Tester is already breaking records for ad spending in this Senate race. He is fundraising like the career D.C. politician he is and putting together a formidable campaign. Winning this race is going to be quite a challenge. But a challenge I am up to. I can and will defeat Jon Tester by offering Montana a new brand of conservative leadership that stands up to the socialist left and fights for the principled solutions our state and country need. But I need you on my team if we're going to get this done. Your support for my campaign will mean victory or defeat. This campaign is going to get even more expensive than it already is, which is to say very, very expensive. We’re already getting outspent by millions of dollars! And those millions are being spent on attack ads that smear my record of success and my conservative credentials. That's why it's critical for me and my campaign to keep our own ads on air defending my record as a successful businessman and principled conservative. Every day we're not on air, Jon Tester will attempt to define me on his own terms. Those ads will be costly. Let’s get this done. name: Andrei Cherny
subject: Presidents (and me!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona** | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U
body:
Working for Bill Clinton and Barack Obama, I learned important lessons I carry with me every day and shaped how I think about the world |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79312660/456090785/41388607?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240219_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyMzkwNmEtNGFjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IBcjIEoxV0q8Q-EOSg7igO5RjuVdKE1EVRNUYps0Cf0=)
---
Peter, When I was seven years old, I got a book called “Mr. President” about all of the great leaders of our past. I still have that book. Growing up in a small apartment as the son of struggling immigrant parents, I never imagined I’d meet a president, much less work in the White House. Today, on Presidents’ Day, I’d like to share the lessons I learned in that time — and how those experiences shape how I’ll fight for Arizona. [**This is a longer than usual email so, before I jump into sharing my past work with these incredible Democratic leaders, can I count on you to chip in to my campaign so I can bring our fight for our future to the U.S. Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79312661/456090787/-106617006?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240219_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyMzkwNmEtNGFjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IBcjIEoxV0q8Q-EOSg7igO5RjuVdKE1EVRNUYps0Cf0=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79312662/456090789/-106617006?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240219_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyMzkwNmEtNGFjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IBcjIEoxV0q8Q-EOSg7igO5RjuVdKE1EVRNUYps0Cf0=)
---
Though my job was to advise the Presidents I worked with, the truth is I learned a lot more from them than whatever good or bad advice I gave them.
I started my career in public service working in the Clinton White House — joining the administration right after college. **I learned from Bill Clinton that progress _is_ possible.**
That doesn’t mean it is easy. I’m not sharing any secrets here to let you know that Bill Clinton and Newt Gingrich were _not_ best buddies. But they worked together, across party lines, they compromised to get things done, and were able to balance the budget for the first time in 30 years and run a budget surplus. We accomplished this milestone while helping to create millions of new jobs, bringing health care to eight million kids, and expanding college aid for working families.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79312663/456090790/-106617006?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240219_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyMzkwNmEtNGFjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IBcjIEoxV0q8Q-EOSg7igO5RjuVdKE1EVRNUYps0Cf0=)
_My White House colleague in the background here, Elena Kagan, is still doing important work_
I also worked with Vice President Al Gore (who would have been president but for Republicans on the Supreme Court) to sound the alarm on the issue we were calling “global warming.” **Seeing Gore wage a courageous and sometimes lonely struggle for action on the climate crisis taught me to never back down from what’s right when there’s a need for real change.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79312664/456090792/-106617006?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240219_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyMzkwNmEtNGFjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IBcjIEoxV0q8Q-EOSg7igO5RjuVdKE1EVRNUYps0Cf0=)
_Vice President Gore would ask tough questions because it was so important to get things right_
When Vice President Gore ran for president in 2000, I led the drafting of the Democratic Party Platform, and then, in 2008, I worked with President Barack Obama to write his campaign policy plan, _Change We Can Believe In._
In meetings with policy experts, I watched as he worked hard to understand their points of view — even if he ultimately disagreed. He thought there was something he could learn from everyone. **From President Obama, I was reminded of the lesson that the decisions made in Washington aren’t abstract and not just for political show, they affect the lives of millions of people.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79312665/456090794/-106617006?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240219_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyMzkwNmEtNGFjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IBcjIEoxV0q8Q-EOSg7igO5RjuVdKE1EVRNUYps0Cf0=)
_President Obama is an incredible listener who learns from everyone he speaks with_
I’m sharing these stories on Presidents Day because we’re in unprecedented times. Extremism is threatening our freedoms. I’m running for Congress because, as I learned working with these leaders, to make our democracy work, **we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines.**
[**Peter, if you’re with me in this fight to achieve even more progress and defeat extremism at every level of government, please chip in whatever you can to help us keep our momentum going and win this fall. Together, we can ensure we have an economy that works for all, solutions for the climate crisis, and robust protections for our democracy and freedoms.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79312666/456090795/-106617006?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240219_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyMzkwNmEtNGFjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IBcjIEoxV0q8Q-EOSg7igO5RjuVdKE1EVRNUYps0Cf0=)

clean_body: Working for Bill Clinton and Barack Obama, I learned important lessons I carry with me every day and shaped how I think about the world | = Peter, When I was seven years old, I got a book called “Mr. President” about all of the great leaders of our past. I still have that book. Growing up in a small apartment as the son of struggling immigrant parents, I never imagined I’d meet a president, much less work in the White House. Today, on Presidents’ Day, I’d like to share the lessons I learned in that time — and how those experiences shape how I’ll fight for Arizona. = | = Though my job was to advise the Presidents I worked with, the truth is I learned a lot more from them than whatever good or bad advice I gave them. I started my career in public service working in the Clinton White House — joining the administration right after college. I learned from Bill Clinton that progress is possible. That doesn’t mean it is easy. I’m not sharing any secrets here to let you know that Bill Clinton and Newt Gingrich were not best buddies. But they worked together, across party lines, they compromised to get things done, and were able to balance the budget for the first time in 30 years and run a budget surplus. We accomplished this milestone while helping to create millions of new jobs, bringing health care to eight million kids, and expanding college aid for working families. = My White House colleague in the background here, Elena Kagan, is still doing important work I also worked with Vice President Al Gore (who would have been president but for Republicans on the Supreme Court) to sound the alarm on the issue we were calling “global warming.” Seeing Gore wage a courageous and sometimes lonely struggle for action on the climate crisis taught me to never back down from what’s right when there’s a need for real change. = Vice President Gore would ask tough questions because it was so important to get things right When Vice President Gore ran for president in 2000, I led the drafting of the Democratic Party Platform, and then, in 2008, I worked with President Barack Obama to write his campaign policy plan, Change We Can Believe In. In meetings with policy experts, I watched as he worked hard to understand their points of view — even if he ultimately disagreed. He thought there was something he could learn from everyone. From President Obama, I was reminded of the lesson that the decisions made in Washington aren’t abstract and not just for political show, they affect the lives of millions of people. = President Obama is an incredible listener who learns from everyone he speaks with I’m sharing these stories on Presidents Day because we’re in unprecedented times. Extremism is threatening our freedoms. I’m running for Congress because, as I learned working with these leaders, to make our democracy work, we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = In your service, Andrei Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States ** | mailto:info@andreiforarizona.com | Paid for by Andrei for Arizona | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U.S. Navy Reserves. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Navy Reserves, the Department of the Navy, or the Department of Defense. ---|---

name: Kristine Kemp
subject: Voting Starts Tomorow!
body:
Good afternoon!

We are going to do a mass email campaign and we need your help! This is the easiest way to get information out to all your friends and family in District 26!

There are several things you can do. First, please send the attached graphic by email or text to remind everyone voting starts tomorrow. Second, forward this link which contains all the early voting information: [John Huffman Voting Information](https://johnhuffman.com/voting-information/).

Another way to help is to sign up to volunteer at the polls! The late afternoons are the best time to catch voters! Also, if you have already signed up for the polls, please re-check the hours on the signup genius. Each district has different hours, so I made some adjustments to the open hours. Here's the polling sign up:

[Volunteer Poll Sign Up](https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0C4BAAAA23AAF94-47984332-lets#/)

The next email you receive from me will be one you can forward to everyone you know in District 26! It will contain these graphics and links.

As always, please contact me if you have any questions.

Thanks so much!
\--

Kristine Kemp
_Campaign Manager_
_John Huffman for Congress_
_817.301.6841_
---

One year has passed since I wrote this urgent email to patriots across the country.

Please take a moment to read it ... then take action.

**Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 terrorist from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.**

Majid Khan worked directly for Al Qaeda senior leader Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, who planned the deadly September 11th terrorist attacks.

Khan has been moved to Central America.

**Meanwhile in Washington, D.C., innocent Americans are abused and tortured as political prisoners and domestic terrorists in the Washington, D.C. jail.**

As you recall, I emailed you a few months ago about the heartbreaking letter signed by 34 of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters jailed there.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

**Here are just a few examples of what they 're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):**

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either won't flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for YEARS...in AMERICA.

**They end their desperate letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

**That 's why I've filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 41 years.

You've seen me on Fox News, One America News, Newsmax and other cable news outlets.

I'm proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the "Gestapo" U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or even more.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b8db45adcf14fa996f6045ca3d67d72&_e=Pq44LRjkCHlc1dvKWvpll3nz0x3HdiVBy9XoXwDHVh2ZIJ0jlQYx6HV29Nw2utLaqiHjAVjO9z_YXqr4rQsxpDCjRcYu_-GqOcKJgg0U4cI3yDE8KCFddp13Xj45w6MghOAUVyyG5W9pJhQVezmE7KaXvJfTK_9ryrtMjPth_IGFA7SosHmBW_QVX14dA0Ei99NmTUqbFRTeISQMVdAth3_MKbQG2oTA7SCX7v1zGi_Aoak7FQX_4FU6atGkBaSi_Pgxy1dq0-nTt3Tr6CtM83RopXhH6ViO9Amx-aYxQnxK_TW_oBQSAPgs-dLamWo1hRq1qTf6zHKgrX0fGiHergia4uKAm03uuCE7E2-lkP-Hn4g_ax-MUr5KxBozlzLT)**

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, one year ago Joe Biden let a top 9-11 terrorist out of prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ... while peaceful patriots rot in jail in Washington, D.C.** These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners and domestic terrorists in a Third World dictatorship!

Friends,

That’s all we are asking for today. That’s right, just $5. Here are 5️⃣ reasons why:
1. We need to make sure Robert holds this seat so he can continue his fight for working families across America.
2. Every donation before the deadline helps us show the GOP that this grassroots movement has enough strength to fend off whatever attacks come our way.
3. As a member of leadership, Robert has a critical role to play in supporting other House Democrats and our Democratic recruits who can flip the House majority blue.
4. We need Robert to continue fighting for accountability of extremist lawmakers like Marjorie Taylor Greene in Congress.
5. The California primary election is quickly approaching on March 5th and we need your help to ensure voters can make it to the polls to vote for Robert.

body:

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
One of the candidates in this race remembers having to make do with water in her cereal before school because there wasn't enough in the budget for milk | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79314398/456095064/-2036188668?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240219_fr_silverspoonresend_team_mf_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmYxZjlmOS00ZGNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CsgmiGuw4LNPhCfirww1IuT58mst9jndxdu34MRWbJc=)
---
One of the candidates in this race remembers having to make do with water in her cereal before school because there wasn't enough in the budget for milk. She remembers the stress on her mother’s face when bills were due. She remembers laying awake late at night trying to find a way up. The other was born with a silver spoon in his mouth. Brian Fitzpatrick comes from a political dynasty with the connections and access to power very few people ever come close to having. His brother – a real moderate – previously held this congressional seat, and Brian rode his coattails into office. He's never had to make the tough decisions so many Pennsylvania families make every day. Ashley grew up in a single-parent household, lived in government housing, and bounced around southeastern Pennsylvania with her brothers. She joined the Army at 17 so she could afford college. Ashley worked hard to graduate from West Point and pilot Apache helicopters – one of the most advanced, lethal helicopters on the battlefield. **There are enough Brian Fitzpatricks in Congress – good ole boys who are used to getting their way without much effort.** So let's replace him with someone who knows what it's like to have the odds stacked against you, who will fight for the little guy because she's been one, too. [**If you agree, chip in $10 (or whatever your can) to help Ashley defeat Fitzpatrick and flip PA-01. name: Spokespups for Schiff
subject: We’re cheering on Adam!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5519%2E5257348%2ESoShYY ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Woof Derek! We
are Spokespups for Adam Schiff, the doggy committee hoping to get Adam to
the U.S. Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20240219_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=5519%2E5257348%2ESoShYY ]Adam posing with a puppy

We are a coalition of pups of all different sizes, ages, breeds, and more. Some
of us are older — like Annabelle, who knows Adam is a proven leader who has
delivered on lowering health care costs, securing funding to help build
affordable housing, and defending our democracy.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20240219_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=5519%2E5257348%2ESoShYY ]Adam posing with Annabelle, an older dog

Some of us are young puppies, maybe not old enough to vote but wise enough to
know Adam is the best candidate to represent California in the U.S. Senate (and
that he’s a great back-scratcher)!

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20240219_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=5519%2E5257348%2ESoShYY ]Adam posing with a supporter and a puppy

name: Kristine Kemp
subject: Early Voting Starts February 20
body:
Hi everyone!

I know you have seen all of the road signs up about the current primary election! I just want to remind you to please vote for my friend, John Huffman for US Congress, District 26. His website is [www.johnhuffman.com](http://www.johnhuffman.com/) if you would like to learn more. We need to send experience to Washington, DC. John is the ONLY candidate with any recent and relevant experience. He is the current Mayor of Southlake and previously served on City Council for 6 years. He has worked closely with regional mayors and cities in District 26. He knows what this area needs for representation, has put the work in and is ready to continue this work on Day 1. We would so appreciate your vote!

Early voting starts TUESDAY - February 20th, so please vote for John! Election Day is March 5th. We are hoping for a huge turnout for John and appreciate your support. You can go here for early voting location sites and times: [District 26 Voting Information](https://johnhuffman.com/voting-information/).

Thank you!

---

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily.

[**That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=734de55b24a14e1ea4fdfb228a32e8e0&_e=Nq_JZGjusbgGKKpSu_julegP8IP5C4hKWlSA5i_cQl61D6zZUVSYbodrCZPXKjkQSIOBlVk1av5E7EEPvsNYG3OBSyDFwyPDc76M7gyfDlIjcCVcG2yVwxOB0xfUj4I1qBo77GIoHiiBXNIP-AHQU_z4zFBpsbQzP5XQY2O2Num3e0KUwxX-VsCf_Yxvzp81NoS9jq_RQukuTAZJvVhj7jMytBSWqhzOvnXBoUhndd-6n2AIXCT1GnhKOjo3zMFRVck6711yK9wWP-GYDoc_Asg_gDjwrIY4RIqn-Jjk0huZgi7by2hKf6-Sl8dAu6ZlnwGodDpV-54TsGrUjVu1PYwHE7CDs5_sbxDTIhJR0Hw1J1yNFJZW1HPOUAGOKU9Wx2rnogOac9fISZVKY4L0eg%3D%3D)
I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=734de55b24a14e1ea4fdfb228a32e8e0&_e=Nq_JZGjusbgGKKpSu_julegP8IP5C4hKWlSA5i_cQl61D6zZUVSYbodrCZPXKjkQSIOBlVk1av5E7EEPvsNYG3OBSyDFwyPDc76M7gyfDlIjcCVcG2yVwxOB0xfUj4I1qBo77GIoHiiBXNIP-AHQU_z4zFBpsbQzP5XQY2O2Num3e0KUwxX-VsCf_Yxvzp81NoS9jq_RQukuTAZJvVhj7jMytBSWqhzOvnXBoUhndd-6n2AIXCT1GnhKOjo3zMFRG8bmmBLFu4Cku0JLy0AXRO18VnXiQM4QbxoxG7sK6l4TeHqJOABWYIN_g_0tJYK13JeohQCOZzymIzk7hnpe9XVvc6eTYt2Ptapf_Tw2vYcofoFAt0BFzAsPYnzqOKvI1OJX6eacbdWtcFdsYrR1VA%3D%3D)

Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today.

I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily. I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today. I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

subject: The gloves are off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
I always call it like it is.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3CknSZGLAww0zBQQe98rjw~~/AARclAA~~)
---

_Rolling Stone_ magazine had this to say about me:
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3CknSZGLAww0zBQQe98rjw~~/AARclAA~~)
---

Friend, I'm not sure how much you know about me, but if it's anything, know this: **I always call it like it is.**

During a speech on the House floor addressing oversight of government investigations, I called the Deep State exactly what it is - _a swamp_.

You know you must be doing something right when the Fake News media starts to attack. I exposed their collusion and corruption playbook, and they got **TRIGGERED**.

And they're not just coming after me in the media. Democrats and Washington operatives are targeting my campaign in order to torpedo my chances of keeping this seat in 2024.

The last thing they want is another 2 years of MAGA Republicans calling the shots, and exposing their crimes and corruption to the American people.
**[Friend, I told you that I 've come to Washington to drain the swamp. Now that I'm here in the fight, I need all the support I can get. Please send a $25 donation TODAY to help me fight back against these swamp rats and put America First >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0182xSnjOMWCs9UTTelZeg~~/AARclAA~~~ "Friend, I told you that I’ve come to Washington to drain the swamp. Now that I’m here I need all the support I can get. Please send a $10 donation TODAY to help me fight back against these swamp rats and put America First >>")**

---
| | [HELP RYAN FIGHT BACK NOW](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3CknSZGLAww0zBQQe98rjw~~/AARclAA~~)
---

The gloves are off, and there's no putting them back on - **I 'm counting on your support today.**

Sincerely,
Ryan Zinke
_Patriot in Congress_

* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $41,300/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Biden Victory Fund does not accept contributions from corporations or their PACs, unions, federal contractors, national banks, those registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA, SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies, or foreign nationals.

Peter,

Jon Tester is already breaking records for ad spending in this Senate race. He is fundraising like the career D.C. politician he is and putting together a formidable campaign.

Winning this race is going to be quite a challenge. But a challenge I am up to. _**I can and will defeat Jon Tester by offering Montana a new brand of conservative leadership that stands up to the socialist left and fights for the principled solutions our state and country need.**_

But I need you on my team if we're going to get this done. Your support for my campaign will mean victory or defeat. **[I’m writing to ask you to please consider donating to my campaign today. Every day we're not hitting our goals, we're losing.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8830d85cd7784f5c96f72fad7caeaed3&_e=U9HIhkKqTnPIedePW8lcnGnCCdvNNwa_--lH-SflLhImq5MhP3HywbUR2-7wV61BC19EypHE5v5on41WmnxYf1h2sHIRnp2COziQSKUQzC2SQ9yj2hXCoLUkUwvS8JsRZ_G9g7y7pr2NxNlczoBauWfV6fwfsHdzIyWt3jDFi0c6BIynHjR9hkyiimKC-hu1Yem-fGUkLI5IbmMcyFgTfE39ZteRC8p1J-hvR_h7oidltMiSd5BhK8dZK7i4utO9O2uf_XzoFBV50_k-y-kzqezZ7FohmGTRhOaLpMz82YP9CaldUxtlgDChe-RS4TIGZdjB5bj6AUw1H50qo0FOaGhlAKIaFIRSg6syRG79X0LiLk0AAdOTylJ9jHvUS0-KiuOd4rrCqz6DvwU6WGDIO6700GCpZ_KIiS0DSaEdb2o%3D)**

[**HELP TIM TODAY ->** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8830d85cd7784f5c96f72fad7caeaed3&_e=U9HIhkKqTnPIedePW8lcnGnCCdvNNwa_--lH-SflLhImq5MhP3HywbUR2-7wV61BC19EypHE5v5on41WmnxYf1h2sHIRnp2COziQSKUQzC2SQ9yj2hXCoLUkUwvS8JsRZ_G9g7y7pr2NxNlczoBauWfV6fwfsHdzIyWt3jDFi0c6BIynHjR9hkyiimKC-hu1Yem-fGUkLI5IbmMcyFgTfE39ZteRC8p1J-hvR_h7oidltMiSd5BhK8dZK7i4utO9O2uf_XzoFBV50_k-y-kzqbTO9dxTYsxQwObtBSte0iazjpYnima8zNFjfJUzFU-n1R3fAuhbwZy0yqp0o-HEPRWtoeyiR_8dCkjEr4DSo5WDY3mZHp8SRctDJXFtCAPm0fV-0j7l_4J94uoy26fzvipEo77s3I-QPyy8cMiVKCI%3D)
This campaign is going to get even more expensive than it already is, which is to say **very, very expensive**. We’re already getting outspent by millions of dollars! And those millions are being spent on attack ads that smear my record of success and my conservative credentials.

That's why it's critical for me and my campaign to keep our own ads on air defending my record as a successful businessman and principled conservative. Every day we're not on air, _**Jon Tester will attempt to define me on his own terms.**_

Those ads will be costly.

**[Can I count on you to donate to my campaign today?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8830d85cd7784f5c96f72fad7caeaed3&_e=U9HIhkKqTnPIedePW8lcnGnCCdvNNwa_--lH-SflLhImq5MhP3HywbUR2-7wV61BC19EypHE5v5on41WmnxYf1h2sHIRnp2COziQSKUQzC2SQ9yj2hXCoLUkUwvS8JsRZ_G9g7y7pr2NxNlczoBauWfV6fwfsHdzIyWt3jDFi0c6BIynHjR9hkyiimKC-hu1Yem-fGUkLI5IbmMcyFgTfE39ZteRC8p1J-hvR_h7oidltMiSd5BhK8dZK7i4utO9O2uf_XzoFBV50_k-y-kzqSUQkKPb3jJaCm1lCeFg8uLBPRorjKGbwhFJkTns5ND3HLXQAkrYlYEG1wA5DdfSC1yxDEIyQRD4cOwDD-3KJ12IeLwEkYcNxfIDri6qIuGMHnN5iPzG1uWHABqWyTx5dR40xDUjmYQ_KK5FWyr_ADs%3D)**

_**Let’s get this done.**_

For America's Future,
Tim Sheehy
Republican for U.S. Senate, Montana

February 19, 2024 Bringing _you_ the latest news, updates and what you _need to know_ about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio
---
|
---
# Three Things to Know This Week:
---
1. Early Voting Begins February 21st! Make a Plan to Vote!

2. Dolan Touts Conservative Record, Policy Agenda That Will Defeat Sherrod Brown.

3. Tune In Tonight for the Second Ohio Republican U.S. Senate Debate.

---
# Get up to speed...
---
| | |
---
_**Early Voting Begins February 21st! Make a Plan to Vote!**_
* Election Day is March 19th, but Ohioans can begin voting via absentee ballot and in-person beginning Wednesday, February 21st.

* Make sure you are registered to vote by TOMORROW, February 20th. * Matt Dolan stressed that the top priority as a US Senator will be securing America’s southern border. “We have got to secure and seal the border, building a wall where appropriate and bringing border control back,” Dolan said.

name: Full Mag News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bacae06dbe22439e8a102bac2fcde022&_e=2rPNECCjfnYAzUZpT54YXtilCtA_BPrY0TDmrQjomRyFbfiNXwW0t9DQSSSAjDzO683LCbeApFsYnNdneZA0bIDbmP0en-xVM7sNPOI4actfyLg46cxzX-Vc69otrSTNbwrT76VaGM4oF6R7GOrejPaIiPtY5YxEGYjyVmlB0EKQtSBgl8AuKHjimnUZejFmGiW-UR9yyKaKRoyyY4Ow9LMwbwKJyFtOHl7Y-lWgSrc43zwFksnTLYnLP9la0ZHLtBRspE8iDZ5p3gz1NJuolIi6n2zg9Aci2UJnPHdeubxXXYQMy9XaRI00eUP1hSd7ar-ZjhARiaP2Vsbq0iYb8MFjnDrSgFYxtkGxvBKVL9tKKffdiVX-e-tf8qvG1Gl5kEMhXojGjbyp5-Jqg_D3MKPMitSPrt9e2PmjOVff2-o%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bacae06dbe22439e8a102bac2fcde022&_e=2rPNECCjfnYAzUZpT54YXtilCtA_BPrY0TDmrQjomRyFbfiNXwW0t9DQSSSAjDzO683LCbeApFsYnNdneZA0bIDbmP0en-xVM7sNPOI4actfyLg46cxzX-Vc69otrSTNbwrT76VaGM4oF6R7GOrejPaIiPtY5YxEGYjyVmlB0EKQtSBgl8AuKHjimnUZejFmGiW-UR9yyKaKRoyyY4Ow9LMwbwKJyFtOHl7Y-lWgSrc43zwFksnTLYnLP9la0ZHLtBRspE8iDZ5p3gz1NJuolGb7d8qT6_-Wmcy-kwHMOifbvjXVFyKnrhDBxO1GOVby6K9EBQy5NjpayRsPHMzbUJ6_mw-qMBc_u--ASBJISDp_ojYxKz8_OIZqnN6zxu1nF5DNPyRg3Xw4rnQ042DCKysZ85612Uui_fwIROkPZvU%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bacae06dbe22439e8a102bac2fcde022&_e=2rPNECCjfnYAzUZpT54YXtilCtA_BPrY0TDmrQjomRyFbfiNXwW0t9DQSSSAjDzO683LCbeApFsYnNdneZA0bIDbmP0en-xVM7sNPOI4actfyLg46cxzX-Vc69otrSTNbwrT76VaGM4oF6R7GOrejPaIiPtY5YxEGYjyVmlB0EKQtSBgl8AuKHjimnUZejFmGiW-UR9yyKaKRoyyY4Ow9LMwbwKJyFtOHl7Y-lWgSrc43zwFksnTLYnLP9la0ZHLtBRspE8iDZ5p3gz1NJuolAdvRrr_TwicaRpyBz0LFqh5NyDbpLqstT7CCcg43cPuRep5UdsinNNC8EaHDmk-rtq6msS28tT1LHjy5WKUcrzHh7AM1JidnJ9TVsVZ8fXxOBbYl1bYoGWveloCWPLk8Wxm-Df5fDpz2ii4Nk4uz7Q%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

One year has passed since I wrote this urgent email to patriots across the country.

Please take a moment to read it ... then take action.

**Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 terrorist from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.**

Majid Khan worked directly for Al Qaeda senior leader Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, who planned the deadly September 11th terrorist attacks.

Khan has been moved to Central America.

**Meanwhile in Washington, D.C., innocent Americans are abused and tortured as political prisoners and domestic terrorists in the Washington, D.C. jail.**

As you recall, I emailed you a few months ago about the heartbreaking letter signed by 34 of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters jailed there.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

**Here are just a few examples of what they 're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):**

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either won't flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for YEARS...in AMERICA.

**They end their desperate letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

**That 's why I've filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 41 years.

You've seen me on Fox News, One America News, Newsmax and other cable news outlets.

I'm proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the "Gestapo" U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or even more.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dd8b10720eba4d3bb959249aad75ebeb&_e=zNWCPV8lmPmKOwiuSDZ9zKPHPbeRgVBPWo98lkJTCwJBanqRHmtoqRUvbMxgDB7HigeBiKRVh9d1xwcntjsBGYNkVuiL6tQrGfPNgud5IvDPixLTLiCXDygaVMzC1-YbqjfESlnTW21l3Z8O3uxxKHrFxjG1OGTdRN-3qCsN015Y86BjnM6yT08NAt5ESgYqf_IspJfz6hryBS2vXAlzpUnbvrS_NMnc_jI4G5qNlRuwpthYJH1t_OK5kkZWsh8HHHCcgimxjICdXvkyK3xNjJNOAGjI_CMZ_wSW6HFDhpIcD9gIm9HQT2zC_wDlN4ClsT0j08ErL_l43iD188CRAAbBZee8yLs_CGD-8x-p-11rtztUaaKRxJPSn9ScOqJB)**

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, one year ago Joe Biden let a top 9-11 terrorist out of prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ... while peaceful patriots rot in jail in Washington, D.C.** These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners and domestic terrorists in a Third World dictatorship!

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dd8b10720eba4d3bb959249aad75ebeb&_e=zNWCPV8lmPmKOwiuSDZ9zKPHPbeRgVBPWo98lkJTCwJBanqRHmtoqRUvbMxgDB7HigeBiKRVh9d1xwcntjsBGYNkVuiL6tQrGfPNgud5IvDPixLTLiCXDygaVMzC1-YbqjfESlnTW21l3Z8O3uxxKHrFxjG1OGTdRN-3qCsN015Y86BjnM6yT08NAt5ESgYqf_IspJfz6hryBS2vXAlzpbyRsMj3KCi_p7ypr5yrmng_1XalL-pllSWAYsKC8icD6uSLlA7154mxBSWccmTy7ugGQss0sDCXkDoJ0F2_MLF3h7Wx3Y77lmh6cfjXeXbiHO831gsySTX9FAU-UXKW9lj13Gtx2XQqMsiwAVD2IBgA5psu8b-GtKzMRwxGoo83)**
