name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: What do you think about higher education today?
body:
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e55ee17425b44c99ad0b13c5d46f9264&_e=KLM33_etMbUhDAyL_QYPInKFRxTMYm8oXg2CRqdMnsh6qdLtiZRTyYqVH9rG2N4loGXGoBzE4ySsXG0uhk4JgE6cjcNwcR_SeOUgJ5Y0wRVsbTnRLkynloeYzS01bJ2yTVdiWuE42Ry-PbwgiTsBMlFghDJj2_VPG2OkQMsg2CBSL9mdlFE7vdfH-Y8xr9t7zwRfLwdsO_RU4v7_AZ_LVo-FVZ-YdGA7JgwAigRq3NLN1Yna8a7_HmCX764qACYIHoXuDXmZ7EpEtKlZqJzcvz-S0Us279EbIB_3cwJncKn4li0N4BI3ils7vuwaVxDniwJGIa2nmvzXIDMCh2WDNAFbEoCwuZ9ZL3vZx1qG-rRh4khyLSuH3RgObozHV-jQEFLvk8NljU2LPRk3TJVmensZFleUgwiEVm-S2piPKsM%3D) Dear Fellow American,
You probably don’t know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor’s wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement.
You see, this generous donor left money to his alma mater to teach free-market economics and asked Hillsdale to make sure his wishes were honored.
Well, I won’t bore you with the details of the case, but let’s say we had differing interpretations of free-market economics.
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions, many founded along the same lines as Hillsdale. Maybe your alma mater is one of them. But it’s a sad fact that too many of them have departed from their founding missions and are pursuing...something else.
Is it any wonder that, on many college campuses free speech is under threat, as conservative speakers or faculty are harassed or even assaulted!
That’s why I want to hear from you today. What do you think about higher education today? Is your alma mater, or are other schools in your state staying true to their original mission?
And are they doing enough to provide their students with a proper understanding of American history and government—including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution?

## Are you concerned that political correctness negatively influences what young Americans are learning?
[Yes](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e55ee17425b44c99ad0b13c5d46f9264&_e=KLM33_etMbUhDAyL_QYPInKFRxTMYm8oXg2CRqdMnsh6qdLtiZRTyYqVH9rG2N4loGXGoBzE4ySsXG0uhk4JgE6cjcNwcR_SeOUgJ5Y0wRVsbTnRLkynloeYzS01bJ2yTVdiWuE42Ry-PbwgiTsBMlFghDJj2_VPG2OkQMsg2CBSL9mdlFE7vdfH-Y8xr9t7zwRfLwdsO_RU4v7_AZ_LVo-FVZ-YdGA7JgwAigRq3NLN1Yna8a7_HmCX764qACYI4suaxOL5m2pUr1RGbXsJnqMHcmWDtCxJa4EtrJzhMQyGLYbr79nfQsJzrI5bvqC5KWFjOLxVBEAKbG64eLQhK6ZlXIrXa4QgaJ6K1kchdyTM3UuPSVZ9tFqQzJ0_cqXRbYBjdy2kIYbfE2uLbfeM6T-Bkilw_B5f_jfyxDiLMDc%3D) [No](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e55ee17425b44c99ad0b13c5d46f9264&_e=KLM33_etMbUhDAyL_QYPInKFRxTMYm8oXg2CRqdMnsh6qdLtiZRTyYqVH9rG2N4loGXGoBzE4ySsXG0uhk4JgE6cjcNwcR_SeOUgJ5Y0wRVsbTnRLkynloeYzS01bJ2yTVdiWuE42Ry-PbwgiTsBMlFghDJj2_VPG2OkQMsg2CBSL9mdlFE7vdfH-Y8xr9t7zwRfLwdsO_RU4v7_AZ_LVo-FVZ-YdGA7JgwAigRq3NLN1Yna8a7_HmCX764qACYITWbawFAMa5ckNo7uBCTE9R1zESFrLmk4w5UIuUW0Fms4SI-7FYgppQJ4gggmC3P1qw5S6im4LKRTlZp4_1ZVa5QlLqq_XtRHWynXjnCJg0WoU5KzVnaAVxeum_Eurv4oM6On8Er75G8-cXcZx-6Et2YpkS3R3Lrj7FyubWvFktk%3D) [Not Sure/Undecided](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e55ee17425b44c99ad0b13c5d46f9264&_e=KLM33_etMbUhDAyL_QYPInKFRxTMYm8oXg2CRqdMnsh6qdLtiZRTyYqVH9rG2N4loGXGoBzE4ySsXG0uhk4JgE6cjcNwcR_SeOUgJ5Y0wRVsbTnRLkynloeYzS01bJ2yTVdiWuE42Ry-PbwgiTsBMlFghDJj2_VPG2OkQMsg2CBSL9mdlFE7vdfH-Y8xr9t7zwRfLwdsO_RU4v7_AZ_LVo-FVZ-YdGA7JgwAigRq3NLN1Yna8a7_HmCX764qACYIACvTDOc0IJB0QIaTZfIUF_NeFrMOH3qTxdzleXfXTauukykaK4HJhQ2qfxuBCDWh0f7KORanD7fXEs0QIF5JJT62hj_LhmhSoVdSv7xYQfj2TJNUI-fY-Jm5i1l2b-3U5i4Ul6cpa7ghNxWCEgOC-2X0nW1suO4DJzaGBGt9-Kw%3D)
[We want your opinion, so please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your thoughts on education today.»](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e55ee17425b44c99ad0b13c5d46f9264&_e=KLM33_etMbUhDAyL_QYPInKFRxTMYm8oXg2CRqdMnsh6qdLtiZRTyYqVH9rG2N4loGXGoBzE4ySsXG0uhk4JgE6cjcNwcR_SeOUgJ5Y0wRVsbTnRLkynloeYzS01bJ2yTVdiWuE42Ry-PbwgiTsBMlFghDJj2_VPG2OkQMsg2CBSL9mdlFE7vdfH-Y8xr9t7zwRfLwdsO_RU4v7_AZ_LVo-FVZ-YdGA7JgwAigRq3NLN1Yna8a7_HmCX764qACYIWxhIr82WPjBrAdFZvXltNolqGyh0lYGl-xL46SHZMzAZHJ0ewtxnSGrUyHJd7O284L68U6M0PYAuutXSSgBNlHbfSCOtbyBD0SEsLLbAFioYi6d7lltasKZkcfUSG8M4nNdOrHJNSItPzeSQwXt0QVY8Usiwhuu-6MuO5OM10EA%3D)
Hillsdale College stands firm, rooted in its original mission, and faithful to the intent of its founders. And in response to the trends I mentioned, we have to do even more to **reach** and **teach** millions on behalf of liberty. So, we need your input, to make our work more effective.
That’s why I hope you will please take our brief higher education survey using this secure link:
[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e55ee17425b44c99ad0b13c5d46f9264&_e=KLM33_etMbUhDAyL_QYPInKFRxTMYm8oXg2CRqdMnsh6qdLtiZRTyYqVH9rG2N4loGXGoBzE4ySsXG0uhk4JgE6cjcNwcR_SeOUgJ5Y0wRVsbTnRLkynloeYzS01bJ2yTVdiWuE42Ry-PbwgiTsBMlFghDJj2_VPG2OkQMsg2CBSL9mdlFE7vdfH-Y8xr9t7zwRfLwdsO_RU4v7_AZ_LVo-FVZ-YdGA7JgwAigRq3NLN1Yna8a7_HmCX764qACYI1c6Q6gr2fbBNP30agfkijkXqS2esukduiWVtLBY_N3kdHoXI2_mMSw2RLnIQjAcUAvFVS-oUJCtTcrJhAZ036oRJ5stH20NX15PXzwzHEfpSk0xnT3Dw97L7yqfNJRGrNu3EfqZne6-cLdZFRoJL0V3Kn4Riz7L2TJD_XfQGWHw%3D)
As you may know, we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government money—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. We do this precisely to preserve our founding mission. This uncompromising stand frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations that other colleges must accept (maybe even your alma mater!)
But you should know that this independence comes at a cost, and we must rely on the support of our friends like you to do our work.
So after completing your survey, please consider making a generous tax-deductible gift to help us **reach** and **teach** millions more citizens nationwide.
I hope I’m not too presumptuous in saying this...but perhaps you can even spare a few dollars that you were going to give to your alma mater.
Thank you again for your faithful partnership with us and your unwavering support of liberty and education.
Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College |

| Freedom Nation Today
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

clean_body: The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, You probably don’t know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor’s wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement. You see, this generous donor left money to his alma mater to teach free-market economics and asked Hillsdale to make sure his wishes were honored. Well, I won’t bore you with the details of the case, but let’s say we had differing interpretations of free-market economics. The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions, many founded along the same lines as Hillsdale. Maybe your alma mater is one of them. But it’s a sad fact that too many of them have departed from their founding missions and are pursuing...something else. Is it any wonder that, on many college campuses free speech is under threat, as conservative speakers or faculty are harassed or even assaulted! That’s why I want to hear from you today. What do you think about higher education today? Is your alma mater, or are other schools in your state staying true to their original mission? And are they doing enough to provide their students with a proper understanding of American history and government—including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? Are you concerned that political correctness negatively influences what young Americans are learning? Hillsdale College stands firm, rooted in its original mission, and faithful to the intent of its founders. And in response to the trends I mentioned, we have to do even more to reach and teach millions on behalf of liberty. So, we need your input, to make our work more effective. That’s why I hope you will please take our brief higher education survey using this secure link: As you may know, we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government money—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. We do this precisely to preserve our founding mission. This uncompromising stand frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations that other colleges must accept (maybe even your alma mater!) But you should know that this independence comes at a cost, and we must rely on the support of our friends like you to do our work. So after completing your survey, please consider making a generous tax-deductible gift to help us reach and teach millions more citizens nationwide. I hope I’m not too presumptuous in saying this...but perhaps you can even spare a few dollars that you were going to give to your alma mater. Thank you again for your faithful partnership with us and your unwavering support of liberty and education. Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College | | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# [Teachers' Unions Attack the IL Freedom Caucus](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=141822612&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxODIyNjEyLCJpYXQiOjE3MDgzNjYxNjIsImV4cCI6MTcxMDk1ODE2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hh72MqE9zBA0qsmcYFWq-Q75-Pihmv4AnLxEMqbV9Lg)
### We need your help to fight back
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/89aa24f0-3da4-4d76-8011-a5969bffec35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvc2Zjbi9wL3RlYWNoZXJzLXVuaW9ucy1hdHRhY2stdGhlLWlsLWZyZWVkb20_.T7DBqr8oRVlH24s3K9-MpIAtBSwT0NwzqNFfAAS9njw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/teachers-unions-attack-the-il-freedom?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Friends,
Republican primaries are quickly approaching and our state Freedom Caucus members are already under attack from the radical left like never before.
**Let me explain:**
We all know that teachers' unions despise school choice. The COVID debacle revealed them for what they really are - a craven special interest group that has zero desire in helping parents find the best educational opportunities for their children.
A perfect example of this is a since-deleted 2020 tweet from the Chicago Teachers Union:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fc24d1b2-f187-4f20-872b-0b21c0db5f93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Historically, teachers' unions have donated almost exclusively to Democrats. But with the huge increase in support for school choice all across the country, they have decided to infiltrate Republican primaries in order to elect malleable, squishy RINOs that will do their bidding.
**We 're seeing that now in Illinois. Teachers' Unions are currently funding "Republican" candidates against two of our Illinois Freedom Caucus members, Reps. Adam Niemerg and Blaine Wilhour, in the upcoming March 19 GOP primaries. And they are pouring in a TON of money in order to defeat them.**
**State Freedom Caucus Action** was created to help our state Freedom Caucus members defend themselves from these highly-motivated political attacks. If we want to continue to expand and grow our Network of state freedom caucuses, we MUST fight back against these liberal assaults. The teachers unions hate educational freedom, they hate that school choice is growing in support, and they will stop at nothing to keep our kids in failed government-run schools.
Please consider giving [$50, $100, $1000, or even $5000](https://substack.com/redirect/3f959707-e1d6-4b28-92ed-2355feb1ce1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to help State Freedom Caucus Action support and defend our state freedom caucus members.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/3f959707-e1d6-4b28-92ed-2355feb1ce1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We are under attack and we must fight back!
**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/3f959707-e1d6-4b28-92ed-2355feb1ce1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
_Contributions to State Freedom Caucus Action are not deductible for federal income tax purposes as charitable contributions._
PAID FOR BY STATE FREEDOM CAUCUS ACTION

If you enjoy State Freedom Caucus Network, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe.
[Invite Friends](https://substack..gAbFVI_4aewtRPKMOvq-NzE-yx_aaq9W04hhFpEei3o?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Emily=20Busch?=
subject: Thoughts and prayers aren't enough for my son
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Busch for Congress
body:
That's why I'm running for Congress | |
---
| | [ ](https://milwaukeedems.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e61dc0cbc36b6b9ece6e4cb38&id=79d79b9082&e=4d37f34e0f)
---
| | I launched my campaign for Congress just over a year ago, and with that much time hearing from folks, I wanted to take a second to reintroduce myself.

_**I'm Emily Busch, and I'm running against John James in Michigan's 10th District.**_

Whether you've heard a little about me, seen me at an event, or you've never met me before, I want to make one thing clear:
**I'm running for Congress on behalf of our children.**
**_I know a lot of candidates will tell you they're doing this for our kids, but this is a deeply emotional and personal fight for me._ **[**If you don't have time to read my whole story, consider making a contribution to the pro-choice Democrat who can flip this seat >>**](https://milwaukeedems.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e61dc0cbc36b6b9ece6e4cb38&id=f18bf38976&e=4d37f34e0f)

I'd like to tell you about the day that changed everything. This is my son:
---
| [ ](https://milwaukeedems.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e61dc0cbc36b6b9ece6e4cb38&id=911f8cfc21&e=4d37f34e0f)
---
| _**On November 30, 2021, he ran for his life from a school shooter.**_

While my son's teacher heroically led him and his classmates to safety, eleven people were shot that day – including the murder of four kids.

Our community was traumatized. I was sad, scared, but more than anything, I was angry.

In the year after the shooting, elected officials did _**nothing**_ to address the obvious issue we had with gun control, except offer their "thoughts and prayers." [**With your help, we can do so much more – chip in today >>**](https://milwaukeedems.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e61dc0cbc36b6b9ece6e4cb38&id=36a63e03fc&e=4d37f34e0f)

Republicans in our federal government did nothing. In fact, people like my opponent are supported by the very same gun industry which has profited off of tragedies in our communities. 🚩

🚩 **NOTHING** has been done to prevent this in the future.

🚩 **NOTHING** has been done to dig into the deep-rooted causes of gun violence, especially in marginalized communities.

🚩 **NOTHING** has been done to help us all heal. _**Where is John James?**_

I hope you feel the sadness, fear, and anger I feel. Inaction isn't enough for me. In response, I did what moms do: rolled up my sleeves and went right to work.

Now, I've spent months making sure folks across the district know about my plan to push the needle on gun laws in our country and keep the horrific and tragic events at Oxford from happening again.

_**This is a competitive district. We have a real chance to flip a seat in Congress and actually do something about abortion rights, gun violence, and so many other challenges and opportunities.**_

[**To make this long-term change, we need a change of leadership in Congress. Your contributions will help us beat the Republicans and win this race. Will you join our team with a contribution of any amount today?**](https://milwaukeedems.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e61dc0cbc36b6b9ece6e4cb38&id=7d9fa2ef8a&e=4d37f34e0f)
---
| [DONATE](https://milwaukeedems.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e61dc0cbc36b6b9ece6e4cb38&id=f8cc4166c7&e=4d37f34e0f "DONATE")
---
| Thank you,
Emily Busch
---
| | | Emily first learned the importance of community and helping others from her mom, a nurse, and dad, a manufacturing representative, while growing up in a tight-knit, middle-class Midwestern family.

The proud product of public schools, Emily worked hard in and out of the classroom, balancing her studies and interest in performing arts with an after-school job as a cashier at Ace Hardware. She went on to earn her B.A. in Biology from Indiana University and Masters from Michigan State University.

Now, Emily is running for Congress in Michigan’s 10th District to keep our kids safe, protect our rights, and lower costs for Michigan families.

Emily chose to move to Oakland County two decades ago because it was the place she wanted to raise her family – a place with friendly neighbors, good schools, and safe neighborhoods.

She and her husband, a retired firefighter and Marine, enjoy camping, fishing, and visiting national parks in their free time.

**Prefer to donate via mail?**
Address a check to Emily Busch for Congress
PO Box 80744

clean_body: That's why I'm running for Congress | | | | | | I launched my campaign for Congress just over a year ago, and with that much time hearing from folks, I wanted to take a second to reintroduce myself. I'm Emily Busch, and I'm running against John James in Michigan's 10th District. Whether you've heard a little about me, seen me at an event, or you've never met me before, I want to make one thing clear: I'm running for Congress on behalf of our children. I know a lot of candidates will tell you they're doing this for our kids, but this is a deeply emotional and personal fight for me. I'd like to tell you about the day that changed everything. This is my son: | | On November 30, 2021, he ran for his life from a school shooter. While my son's teacher heroically led him and his classmates to safety, eleven people were shot that day – including the murder of four kids. Our community was traumatized. I was sad, scared, but more than anything, I was angry. In the year after the shooting, elected officials did nothing to address the obvious issue we had with gun control, except offer their "thoughts and prayers." Republicans in our federal government did nothing. In fact, people like my opponent are supported by the very same gun industry which has profited off of tragedies in our communities. 🚩 🚩 NOTHING has been done to prevent this in the future. 🚩 NOTHING has been done to dig into the deep-rooted causes of gun violence, especially in marginalized communities. 🚩 NOTHING has been done to help us all heal. Where is John James? I hope you feel the sadness, fear, and anger I feel. Inaction isn't enough for me. In response, I did what moms do: rolled up my sleeves and went right to work. Now, I've spent months making sure folks across the district know about my plan to push the needle on gun laws in our country and keep the horrific and tragic events at Oxford from happening again. This is a competitive district. We have a real chance to flip a seat in Congress and actually do something about abortion rights, gun violence, and so many other challenges and opportunities. | "DONATE" | Thank you, Emily Busch | | | Emily first learned the importance of community and helping others from her mom, a nurse, and dad, a manufacturing representative, while growing up in a tight-knit, middle-class Midwestern family. The proud product of public schools, Emily worked hard in and out of the classroom, balancing her studies and interest in performing arts with an after-school job as a cashier at Ace Hardware. She went on to earn her B.A. in Biology from Indiana University and Masters from Michigan State University. Now, Emily is running for Congress in Michigan’s 10th District to keep our kids safe, protect our rights, and lower costs for Michigan families. Emily chose to move to Oakland County two decades ago because it was the place she wanted to raise her family – a place with friendly neighbors, good schools, and safe neighborhoods. She and her husband, a retired firefighter and Marine, enjoy camping, fishing, and visiting national parks in their free time. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to Emily Busch for Congress PO Box 80744 Rochester, MI 48308 | "JOIN TEAM EMILY" | | Paid for by Emily Busch for Congress | | Our mailing address is: Emily Busch for CongressPO Box 80744Rochester, MI 48308-0744 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: My opponent and the president he supports
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
This was my opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman over the weekend, in full display of supporting Donald Trump.
actblue.com/donate/about-bob [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Far too much is at risk; if we don't commit to change in districts like ours, this duo could be dismantling American democracy next Presidents' Day.
PREVENT BERGMAN & TRUMP [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
This year, not even the Detroit News endorsed Donald Trump in the GOP primary. Why? Because character matters. Trump lacks honor; he does not commit to the truth and is willing to say or do anything to benefit himself, not the Nation.
Trump and Bergman have shown little respect for the rule of law and have only made attempts to cling to power while destroying our institutions.
Bergman is a loyal supporter of Trump; he votes with him nearly 100% of the time, and we must work twice as hard this year to defeat them both.
The kind of presidents we should be honoring today have integrity.
*
A
strong
vision
for
the
country's
future,
a
sense
of
service,
and
a
positive,
active
personality
working
to
make
life
better
for
all
*
Effective
communication
skills
rooted
in
honesty,
truth,
and
transparency
*
A
bold,
articulate
leader
with
a
great
deal
of
charisma
*
The
fortitude
to
make
unpopular
decisions
while
respecting
and
trusting
the
American
people.
*
Crisis
management
skills
and
ability
to
deliver
results
on
issues
of
vital
importance
*
An
ability
to
work
with
Congress
and
make
wise
appointments
*
Moral
principles
–
wisdom,
kindness,
justice,
and
courage
This next election is critical for our state and our Nation.
Democracy is in danger.
Friend, Jack Bergman has never faced a second-time challenger, and with your help, I'm ready to bring him the most intense political fight of his life and send him home to Louisiana.
To do it, I need you in my corner today.
Early voting for Michigan's presidential primary has begun. Let's choose wisely. In August and November, I would be grateful for your support as a Congressional candidate who values integrity over demagoguery.
Yours,
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01

PREVENT BERGMAN & TRUMP [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] Friend, This year, not even the Detroit News endorsed Donald Trump in the GOP primary. Why? Because character matters. Trump lacks honor; he does not commit to the truth and is willing to say or do anything to benefit himself, not the Nation. Trump and Bergman have shown little respect for the rule of law and have only made attempts to cling to power while destroying our institutions. Bergman is a loyal supporter of Trump; he votes with him nearly 100% of the time, and we must work twice as hard this year to defeat them both. The kind of presidents we should be honoring today have integrity. A strong vision for the country's future, a sense of service, and a positive, active personality working to make life better for all Effective communication skills rooted in honesty, truth, and transparency A bold, articulate leader with a great deal of charisma The fortitude to make unpopular decisions while respecting and trusting the American people. Crisis management skills and ability to deliver results on issues of vital importance An ability to work with Congress and make wise appointments * Moral principles – wisdom, kindness, justice, and courage This next election is critical for our state and our Nation. Democracy is in danger. Friend, Jack Bergman has never faced a second-time challenger, and with your help, I'm ready to bring him the most intense political fight of his life and send him home to Louisiana. To do it, I need you in my corner today. Early voting for Michigan's presidential primary has begun. Let's choose wisely. In August and November, I would be grateful for your support as a Congressional candidate who values integrity over demagoguery. Yours, -Dr. Bob Bob Lorinser Candidate for US Congress Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula Democrat, MI01 DONATE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] Or send a check to: "Friends of Dr. Bob" PO Box 936 Marquette, MI 49855

name: Justice Democrats
subject: “The GOP Megadonor Movement to Knock Out the Squad"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

A new article from Slate reveals that nine out of AIPAC’s top ten donors
are aligned with the GOP — including former Home Depot CEO and Trump
megadonor Bernie Marcus, an LLC associated with New England Patriots owner
and Trump supporter Robert Kraft, as well as Paul Singer, a Nikki Haley
and Rudy Giuliani donor who notoriously took crooked Supreme Court Justice
Samuel Alito on luxury vacations.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240219.6L2APe&refcode=em20240219-33366&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=33366%2E1203867%2EQuqy_Y ]Tweet from Alex Sammon: I ran the FEC files of the top 10 donors to
AIPAC’s United Democracy Project PAC, which only spends in Dem races.
There’s only *one* Democratic funder. The majority: Trump megadonors,
Republicans, billionaires. Will Dems seriously let them decide elections?

Why is a group mostly funded by Republican millionaires and billionaires
spending tens of millions of dollars in Democratic primaries?

Because they want to sabotage our movement and unseat the most progressive
members of Congress fighting to hold them accountable and change the
status quo.

In 2022, AIPAC’s super PAC United Democracy Project spent more than any
other outside group in Democratic primaries to support conservative
candidates. This year, AIPAC’s network could spend upwards of $100 million
to take down as many Justice Democrats incumbents as they can.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240219.6L2APe&refcode=em20240219-33366&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=33366%2E1203867%2EQuqy_Y ]We’re relying on this grassroots, people-powered movement to help us
fight back. Will you rush $3 or more to fuel our work to
defend the Squad against AIPAC’s right-wing megadonor network in the 2024
primaries?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240219.6L2APe&refcode=em20240219-33366&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=33366%2E1203867%2EQuqy_Y ]Contribute $3

AIPAC and its affiliates have spent tens of millions of dollars against
the Squad before, but we the people defeated them by coming together. This
is a critical moment for the fate of the Democratic Party and our
progressive movement, so we hope we can count on you again.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=33366%2E1203867%2EQuqy_Y ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=33366%2E1203867%2EQuqy_Y ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240219-33366-footer&t=1024&refcode2=33366_1203867_Quqy_Y&akid=33366%2E1203867%2EQuqy_Y

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=33366%2E1203867%2EQuqy_Y

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Senator Laphonza Butler
subject: Angela Alsobrooks has the total package
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10685?t=1007&amount=25&akid=1078%2E52803%2EQUTRrS ][IMG]

Hi there, Peter! Laphonza Butler here, U.S. Senator for
California.

I’m reaching out today because, like you, I’m a proud member of Team
Alsobrooks. And I’m supporting Angela for the same reasons you
are, Peter: She’s
smart, hardworking, compassionate, courageous – the total package.

Angela’s a leader in her community and a proven champion for choice,
equality, and working families. As a lifelong Marylander and working mom,
she’s faced the challenges most Marylanders face. And as an accomplished
public servant, Angela has a plan to tackle those challenges.

There’s only one problem: Unlike her opponent, Angela Alsobrooks is not a
millionaire. She doesn’t have private wealth to pour into her campaign.
Instead, it’s generous grassroots supporters like you that make her
campaign possible.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10685?t=1008&amount=25&akid=1078%2E52803%2EQUTRrS ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to
elect Angela Alsobrooks to the Senate. Every dollar helps her connect to
more Marylanders, build broader support, and pull ahead in this
competitive race.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44eb3726f3d5492fab08939caa8f5264&_e=j9yeaW0mRogvW2WOq0E8iMP-9PTcCNF0ocaNcbh8ZsSJ5pjpeX3WKbyAH0xlcxJ_nKd4yjEV5ms7s9wiis-Vy5Cu8DoPj1X_Y9hKI48WUP4SX7SU8EpURw_Wk61WChviPW7VdTghGiXcppHNaI0BoclzDVQcXj-zo-G1w8rkujfVq-PJUgDAwcL1GNTopYdyn6OhJlAD0MzilhLDoWgL1WD65cA3MyQzVm-qsLtPF1yJ3hKHc5eLKyOD4FFCQRMJi0xdiprb4TfQ4PhZU7iEIOIsYoiH39jRhhOMdQtqdJ101G62n1MzIXy-2Zd9kRbdPgRD9EsG45VCkmJI_v3DjYbI4oJOKGugTiT8b_wn-HSJQqaPj0XW4ua1TidiFK8_FYrktAyvzprUkFt86mhRg_97ir4tPF7so7eOqi9Azas%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44eb3726f3d5492fab08939caa8f5264&_e=j9yeaW0mRogvW2WOq0E8iMP-9PTcCNF0ocaNcbh8ZsSJ5pjpeX3WKbyAH0xlcxJ_nKd4yjEV5ms7s9wiis-Vy5Cu8DoPj1X_Y9hKI48WUP4SX7SU8EpURw_Wk61WChviPW7VdTghGiXcppHNaI0BoclzDVQcXj-zo-G1w8rkujfVq-PJUgDAwcL1GNTopYdyn6OhJlAD0MzilhLDoWgL1WD65cA3MyQzVm-qsLtPF1yJ3hKHc5eLKyOD4FFCQRMJi0xdiprb4TfQ4PhZU7iEIAYy2t0L6m5hbFUqpHrGRuiB7Vv695aJirXN_szXVIbcNe6Jw-m9XWQFXO-m98Db5BQ5YBDFgnMFo5-i5ECT0YLPW-JkUnSyf4CCBmGFtihf8PmVKxiFNaBgq787kYZ0-_n3rA4wxy6Ljf_UhPXb35s%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44eb3726f3d5492fab08939caa8f5264&_e=j9yeaW0mRogvW2WOq0E8iMP-9PTcCNF0ocaNcbh8ZsSJ5pjpeX3WKbyAH0xlcxJ_nKd4yjEV5ms7s9wiis-Vy5Cu8DoPj1X_Y9hKI48WUP4SX7SU8EpURw_Wk61WChviPW7VdTghGiXcppHNaI0BoclzDVQcXj-zo-G1w8rkujfVq-PJUgDAwcL1GNTopYdyn6OhJlAD0MzilhLDoWgL1WD65cA3MyQzVm-qsLtPF1yJ3hKHc5eLKyOD4FFCQRMJi0xdiprb4TfQ4PhZU7iEIFGIaKpT_R9-ctx6ub2PXXeL2roAosettUFs_eL8qv4oIMClzeDBNxPvatPJWmgNJK2Q-UauiB-U9Q9g5JHfbjJJuvW2GAAvOUXl4YEhTLoF8cEcNztIR50MTlJZKJLfm7CxqsUanZHtkCJ7HynlEU0%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I'm not asking for money - just your personal endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Hey, It’s Jim Jordan with a very important request for you. My primary is in 29 days and I’m building as much support for our campaign as I can before Election Day. It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0d8854b394094b7da871e34cc6855e3a&_e=VmaOlonaFFQTyr_RiY7Nl9JxSpqvfBLSgVc2Yi87fgGFGKJLBe5mp653FSgF2spSA_ZQm-hYMNP0JvuoOaw72d7S6YZuLHqmqlFWb8M35jm4ZfF91Ra5raRCtpNtcUmwLp5mGzYcUrfOVQ-0n-bAqjvI0_I8CzfMwAiTIcLK_Fx-c30HyUBJZQDrJ6HJjlq5jc-o7dUG49_cgDQc0cmyk03uSP-SvALzkB0D5hxdyxTGx7gHk2VUs5K7KWUIrsPMgkqIh3_oZwTr9ED6mRJbY47uv3aWGSd1n1ee7kh_Okki701W1ibUNlIRjnXxTFi7eqWqGLoFqXfo9bCtATAOrTRD-JFGWxIqJRQ1sT0KeQrBFZbpUO7auQWBg3dRJKgAsFf5UuVt7tF-UdGLwYdeRXIdcF1W9IoemEZXnb99QmMYIfBia8O27ntscEHMgAWcPQa9dabeB50Ch6pE5U0iZQ%3D%3D)

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0d8854b394094b7da871e34cc6855e3a&_e=VmaOlonaFFQTyr_RiY7Nl9JxSpqvfBLSgVc2Yi87fgGFGKJLBe5mp653FSgF2spSA_ZQm-hYMNP0JvuoOaw72d7S6YZuLHqmqlFWb8M35jm4ZfF91Ra5raRCtpNtcUmwLp5mGzYcUrfOVQ-0n-bAqjvI0_I8CzfMwAiTIcLK_Fx-c30HyUBJZQDrJ6HJjlq5jc-o7dUG49_cgDQc0cmyk03uSP-SvALzkB0D5hxdyxTGx7gHk2VUs5K7KWUIrsPMgkqIh3_oZwTr9ED6mRJbY47uv3aWGSd1n1ee7kh_OkkGT9gwGSn3J34VK8ZTZxBpGolrDfEZqLkpMmHV01eFjHVfZzSGHLmtknu7FOxWU6cR-wqbSeqTPLhhR2PBsP9dRGWy_YrfH1-vJrkcVlNWPjrAPDH5V9wQMrZOEhh1bTOKlFKujoAjLt1WdDR3PPryi4J_yR9O_mWJ7GA-GYRp3A%3D%3D)

Friend,
---
Joe Biden’s wide open southern border is starting 2024 exactly how 2023 finished – **with a record high number of migrant encounters.**
---
_**176,294 illegal migrants crossed our southern border in January.**_
---
**_That’s more than the entire population of Kenosha County._**
---
More illegal migrants have arrived under Biden than **any other President in this nation’s history.**
---
And unless we can keep our House majority, take back the Senate, and win the White House, there is no end in sight to this crisis.
---
Just like the last 4 election cycles, Wisconsin is going to play a major role in determining power in D.C. and shaping America’s future.

I need your help to defend Wisconsin.

Friend,
---
Here are some troubling facts about Biden’s Border Crisis:
---
1. In December, more than 302,000 illegal immigrants were documented attempting to cross our southern border.

---
**That’s larger than the populations of Kenosha, Racine, Janesville, and Beloit combined.**
---
1. If these numbers remain steady, over 600,000 illegal immigrants will attempt to cross our southern border every 2 months.

---
**That’s more than the entire population of Milwaukee.**
---
Joe Biden and the Democrats have facilitated a complete crisis at our southern border.
---
The Biden Administration refuses to adopt common-sense policies to secure our border, which **emboldens drug cartels** and **makes our communities less safe.**
---
We have a big opportunity coming this November to rid ourselves of the far-left open border policies that caused this mess to begin with.
---
Until then, I’m going to continue doing everything in my power to SECURE the southern border and put an end to this humanitarian disaster.
---
But **dark money** liberal groups are continuing to target me for supporting these common-sense policies and standing up to the Biden-Harris immigration agenda.
---
I need your support so I can keep fighting to secure our southern border.
---

clean_body: | Friend, Joe Biden’s wide open southern border is starting 2024 exactly how 2023 finished – with a record high number of migrant encounters. 176,294 illegal migrants crossed our southern border in January. That’s more than the entire population of Kenosha County. More illegal migrants have arrived under Biden than any other President in this nation’s history. And unless we can keep our House majority, take back the Senate, and win the White House, there is no end in sight to this crisis. Just like the last 4 election cycles, Wisconsin is going to play a major role in determining power in D.C. and shaping America’s future. I need your help to defend Wisconsin. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rep. If these numbers remain steady, over 600,000 illegal immigrants will attempt to cross our southern border every 2 months. That’s more than the entire population of Milwaukee. Joe Biden and the Democrats have facilitated a complete crisis at our southern border. The Biden Administration refuses to adopt common-sense policies to secure our border, which emboldens drug cartels and makes our communities less safe. We have a big opportunity coming this November to rid ourselves of the far-left open border policies that caused this mess to begin with. Until then, I’m going to continue doing everything in my power to SECURE the southern border and put an end to this humanitarian disaster. But dark money liberal groups are continuing to target me for supporting these common-sense policies and standing up to the Biden-Harris immigration agenda. I need your support so I can keep fighting to secure our southern border. - Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a0a04c99bfaf4fedb4cdb9371d690c19&_e=E5sCEz9s6Bls0f6rcwQZMMS8WVVcLiTsc3vjuenGeSTY57WD3WzmWNQ_GXyuQfDFUVJEaVdxcKZuXfGwFp2I6CPcxts7xvi7JXWi6j0huCep9HYmcs0Pxzu3kgolhix1Ivbdzw5Ddd_HmsSJrBpM326KhDn0eY5x67x9rgX_Kkd4b7vEB1I_HvgGYD0RXDT5ao0w-IckST9e5m27_Q-DJD_DUYR9_P_4vsKS5WpFVASJ3aqDguX_24rg8LcwsFOFGNDXDIeI7bYbNtWbYRS-fRn2orDeIYpttMkKUefq20lwxLi0sBSbFLvEVk1FNRBk9bKhV3oNalfJX2g0uZFV3Hc4iODMxlM1aoXT6FXmOJgjcKY8rk0YRfGkdzpEiCrwJg9HOuW3XX66b4rFQDvUxfZt8Pfi7ZQO_Xel1j8WV9I%3D)

| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a0a04c99bfaf4fedb4cdb9371d690c19&_e=E5sCEz9s6Bls0f6rcwQZMMS8WVVcLiTsc3vjuenGeSTY57WD3WzmWNQ_GXyuQfDFUVJEaVdxcKZuXfGwFp2I6CPcxts7xvi7JXWi6j0huCep9HYmcs0Pxzu3kgolhix1Ivbdzw5Ddd_HmsSJrBpM326KhDn0eY5x67x9rgX_Kkd4b7vEB1I_HvgGYD0RXDT5ao0w-IckST9e5m27_Q-DJD_DUYR9_P_4vsKS5WpFVASJ3aqDguX_24rg8LcwsFOFGNDXDIeI7bYbNtWbYRS-ffizTCl3IkOs97yuA7zPDBoVGdRy2c4zMf22ueW6QG3IPdd8FlkO2Pwk5a3hoKZKwaPWLfMN0NEgoFDjbJ3a_2sKxYQnp0iOmIdwK8QOHyCZyMnDkspWJ7-OawKWgg1Ma2Jqh4fKpogE818GEBffWlQ%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Happy Presidents' Day, Peter!

Today is more than just a well-deserved day off. It's a day to remember the presidents who have fought to defend our nation's democracy.

However, this year's Presidents' Day is a little different. With a presidential election right around the corner, Republicans are choosing to throw their weight behind the first **twice-impeached** president in U.S. history, Donald Trump. Not only did he orchestrate the deadly insurrection on our nation's capital, but his policies and platforms don't align at all with what we believe in as Americans.

And we've already seen what's in store with a Trump presidency. Another four years of Donald Trump would mean a renewed push for a total abortion ban, more tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy, and cuts to Medicare and Social Security. That's why, this Presidents' Day, we must all recommit our efforts to stopping Donald Trump and defending our democracy by ensuring frontline Democrats like Kim win. Can I count on you to chip in $15 before midnight, match Don Bacon’s special-interest millions, and win this race? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79317666/456105623/1698357921?refcode=20240219_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2M4YmFlNS01NGNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jg49CKPqzLKZt-p11ZPbTn86C1knZP8NHLpQKuVQ7gs=) Unlike Don Bacon, I’m not a wealthy DC insider. I’m a lifelong public servant. If I win this race, I would become the first Latino member of Congress from Nebraska. Peter — Tammy needs your support today, but first let us tell you why:

**THEN:** A story broke confirming that ANOTHER right-wing megamillionaire — Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate, Eric Hovde — will announce his Senate campaign to flip Tammy’s seat _this week._
**NOW:** We need a surge of grassroots support before these potential Republican opponents launch their campaigns and make this one of the nation’s most competitive Senate races.
But we’re not asking you for money today. **Instead, we’re asking for your personal endorsement.**
**[Will you add your name to personally endorse Tammy Baldwin for Senate? This race is heating up, so Tammy needs to know if you stand with her.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2402_endorsetammy/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240219_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2037%2E35263%2EUV1T2c)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Haneefah?=
subject: This Week in Indiana's Black History...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah _
body:
Special Message from Haneefah Khaaliq on Indiana's Black History | | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement
**>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq**
Former Candidate for U.S. Senate (Indiana)

**This week in Indiana’s Black History...**
**On February 18, 2022, during Black History Month, the first two African American women to run for the U.S. Senate in Indiana, Haneefah Khaaliq and Dr.****Valerie McCray, ****were removed from the ballot by Indiana Election Commission (IEC) members: Paul Okeson, Suzannah Wilson, Karen Horseman, and Litany Pyle. ** **The Commission refused to list their names on the ballot after the women’s signature counts were challenged by fellow Democrat, Attorney Scott Yahne of Valparaiso, IN. ****Yahne was a close friend and ally of Thomas McDermott, Jr., Mayor of Hammond, IN, who became the Democratic Nominee for the 2022 U.S. Senate race.**

**McDermott's campaign manager, Kevin Smith, in a statement to the Associated Press earlier that year, hinted that, like so many others, he would use Indiana's much-despised ****unconstitutional**** signature collection system as a weapon to clear the way for McDermott. In the end, the McDermott campaign was successful in removing what would've been great primary competition. **

**Shortly after ballot removal, ****[Khaaliq opened a private investigation](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=1d9134a831&e=a49cb82bb3)****into the IEC and discovered staff member, Matthew Kochevar, had been making campaign political contributions to her political opponent long before the hearing. Fair hearings cannot and should not be conducted by staff members who show pre-mature favoritism toward candidates. **

**To worsen matters, longtime IEC staff member and co-director, Angela Nussmeyer, gave Khaaliq just five (5) pages of evidence before the hearing. During the hearing, however, Ms. Nussmeyer presented an astounding 400 pages of evidence.

Although commission members knew Khaaliq had just been presented with the new pages of evidence, they allowed no additional time for review and voted to remove her from the ballot. ** **When Khaaliq sought an appeal from the decision, Nussmeyer improperly informed Khaaliq on where to file her appeal. Due to this, Khaaliq's case was ultimately dismissed, and unfortunately, she ****was never afforded an appeal from the IEC's decision to remove her from the 2022 ballot.

Despite this harsh treatment, Khaaliq fulfilled her promise to supporters and ultimately finished the senate race by filing to run as an Independent (Write-In) candidate in Indiana's general election. She only secured 148 votes, but in doing so, became the first African American to run for U.S. Senate in Indiana in a General Election.

Visit haneefahkhaaliq.org for more information. **
---
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=3eda986ada&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
I was a strong candidate in the 2022 U.S. Senate race in Indiana. Check out my documentary [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=2cbd824abf&e=a49cb82bb3)!
|
---
|
---
| **_First African American to Qualify to Run for U.S. Senate in Indiana!_**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=5e8dd5c74c&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
Dr. Valerie McCray, the first African American to meet Indiana's ballot access laws to run in the primaries for the U.S. Senate. [Visit the official website of Dr. Valerie McCray for U.S. Senate](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=26494b41c5&e=a49cb82bb3)!
| **In 2022, Dr. Valerie McCray was unfairly removed from the ballot by the Indiana Election Commission. This week, she became the first African American to meet Indiana's strict ballot access requirements to run in the primaries. No matter who you decide to support in the primaries, let's give a shout-out and round of applause to this brave woman for her persistence in continuing in her effort to bring significant change to Indiana. Every step counts! **
---
|
---
| _**First African American Woman
Files to Run for Governor in Indiana!**_
---
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=1e70ccd7f4&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
Tamie Dixon-Tatum of Anderson, IN, is a civil rights and human rights agency director and is well-known for her community activism. [Visit her website](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=0369c12051&e=a49cb82bb3)!
| **This week, longtime Democrat from Anderson, IN, Dixon-Tatum became the first African American woman in Indiana's history to file to run for governor. Unfortunately, her candidacy is being challenged by a fellow Democrat, Kelly Whittman, Ph.D. of Speedway, IN. Whittman is a strong supporter of new Democrat, Jennifer McCormick for Governor. McCormick appointed Whittman to an executive position in the state house when she became superintendent years ago.**** **

**The Indiana Election Commission will decide whether or not to keep Dixon-Tatum on the ballot during its public meeting to be held at 10:00 a.m. EST on Tuesday, February 27, 2024, in Conference Room B at the Indiana Government Center located at South, 402 W. Washington Street, Indianapolis. I'm wishing Dixon-Tatum all the best for her efforts! **
---
|
---
| **_An Opinion on Filing Challenges Against Candidates by Haneefah Khaaliq_**
---
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=91993139d2&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
In 2022, [Khaaliq published a mini-documentary based on an investigation into the Indiana Election Commission](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=24865a8436&e=a49cb82bb3) in which she shares how the system of removing candidates is unfair, unconstitutional, and suffers from extreme bias.
| **_An Opinion on Filing Challenges Against Candidates by Haneefah Khaaliq_**

**Dear Hoosiers, it is my conviction that competition is a sufficient and necessary condition for democracy to thrive in our country. Studies have shown that where competition exists, there's greater quality, more interest, more innovation, and politically, more drive for candidates to show why voters should vote for them. **

**Absent a truly egregious reason to eliminate a candidate, such as criminal activity...using an old, archaic process, such as Indiana's outdated signature collection system, prone to errors, to get rid of what would otherwise be good competition, is****senseless**** and cowardly.

In my book, no candidate who ever resorts to such low means to get rid of their opponent instead of facing them head-on ****will ever be a true winner or deserving of their desired political title. **
---
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=73bc888427&e=a49cb82bb3)

clean_body: Special Message from Haneefah Khaaliq on Indiana's Black History | | | | | | | Announcement From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq Former Candidate for U.S. Senate (Indiana) This week in Indiana’s Black History... On February 18, 2022, during Black History Month, the first two African American women to run for the U.S. Senate in Indiana, Haneefah Khaaliq and Dr.Valerie McCray, were removed from the ballot by Indiana Election Commission (IEC) members: Paul Okeson, Suzannah Wilson, Karen Horseman, and Litany Pyle. The Commission refused to list their names on the ballot after the women’s signature counts were challenged by fellow Democrat, Attorney Scott Yahne of Valparaiso, IN. Yahne was a close friend and ally of Thomas McDermott, Jr., Mayor of Hammond, IN, who became the Democratic Nominee for the 2022 U.S. Senate race. McDermott's campaign manager, Kevin Smith, in a statement to the Associated Press earlier that year, hinted that, like so many others, he would use Indiana's much-despised unconstitutional signature collection system as a weapon to clear the way for McDermott. In the end, the McDermott campaign was successful in removing what would've been great primary competition. Shortly after ballot removal, the IEC and discovered staff member, Matthew Kochevar, had been making campaign political contributions to her political opponent long before the hearing. Fair hearings cannot and should not be conducted by staff members who show pre-mature favoritism toward candidates. To worsen matters, longtime IEC staff member and co-director, Angela Nussmeyer, gave Khaaliq just five (5) pages of evidence before the hearing. During the hearing, however, Ms. Nussmeyer presented an astounding 400 pages of evidence. Although commission members knew Khaaliq had just been presented with the new pages of evidence, they allowed no additional time for review and voted to remove her from the ballot. When Khaaliq sought an appeal from the decision, Nussmeyer improperly informed Khaaliq on where to file her appeal. Due to this, Khaaliq's case was ultimately dismissed, and unfortunately, she was never afforded an appeal from the IEC's decision to remove her from the 2022 ballot. Despite this harsh treatment, Khaaliq fulfilled her promise to supporters and ultimately finished the senate race by filing to run as an Independent (Write-In) candidate in Indiana's general election. She only secured 148 votes, but in doing so, became the first African American to run for U.S. Senate in Indiana in a General Election. Visit haneefahkhaaliq.org for more information. | I was a strong candidate in the 2022 U.S. Senate race in Indiana. Check out my documentary ! | | | First African American to Qualify to Run for U.S. Senate in Indiana! | | Dr. Valerie McCray, the first African American to meet Indiana's ballot access laws to run in the primaries for the U.S. Senate. ! | In 2022, Dr. Valerie McCray was unfairly removed from the ballot by the Indiana Election Commission. This week, she became the first African American to meet Indiana's strict ballot access requirements to run in the primaries. No matter who you decide to support in the primaries, let's give a shout-out and round of applause to this brave woman for her persistence in continuing in her effort to bring significant change to Indiana. Every step counts! | | First African American Woman Files to Run for Governor in Indiana! | Tamie Dixon-Tatum of Anderson, IN, is a civil rights and human rights agency director and is well-known for her community activism. ! | This week, longtime Democrat from Anderson, IN, Dixon-Tatum became the first African American woman in Indiana's history to file to run for governor. Unfortunately, her candidacy is being challenged by a fellow Democrat, Kelly Whittman, Ph.D. of Speedway, IN. Whittman is a strong supporter of new Democrat, Jennifer McCormick for Governor. McCormick appointed Whittman to an executive position in the state house when she became superintendent years ago. The Indiana Election Commission will decide whether or not to keep Dixon-Tatum on the ballot during its public meeting to be held at 10:00 a.m. EST on Tuesday, February 27, 2024, in Conference Room B at the Indiana Government Center located at South, 402 W. Washington Street, Indianapolis. name: Micah, Team Waltz
subject: Here’s what sets Mike apart
body:
| | | [_**DEFEND AMERICA**_](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=90a9cb0b8bf946f6a44a2e41ae1b358f&_e=Ch7QFP-6zcLseiquHk9jvPmUdmX9xVLek0HL2N43i4EEQ8KIJS7pubCzDZYGduH373vAydNz0N-NqUXk2yhq7Cy4pAJ21W4v3u24q7Mh5u-ve_95KVQjZWqOIjXOnFtmlCZcMttw7bILtOmGyEgYR7XI_s1R-x0U_K67W2XqPwzzJtpltNlVueJ8nA2ADP7UF-LrvfaJiOLWxr3eebE4gPypnaA2kTtodlYf9lFzJByUjd94mnRXtOK55wxSGTa27GVa5fySjg49VCIjIy_RsVpq5NTSQyjGL2NnSG73bg_aCWXvAjOqN0e9TD_JhomxZopaEDdr3w65nZ_sZ6DhcpSRdEmfm6CWEBd2UnIGe9dvYHFo6msuFD9Eil4EHnOe)
---
**As a Green Beret, my job meant I served as both a Special Forces warrior _and_ a battlefield diplomat. ** I fought the Taliban head-on in more firefights than I care to remember -- as mortar rounds impacted around me and bullets "snapped" in my ear as they almost hit me. I don't want to think about many of the horrific battles I survived defending our nation, **because many of my friends simply did not.** **_But I will tell you that I’ve seen what the Taliban and America's other radical jihadist enemies -- like Iran -- are fully capable of._** And while President Trump unleashed American military might to crush the ISIS caliphate, with President Biden, **_I fear our enemies will look for the next chance to kill innocent Americans without reservation._**
---
[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=90a9cb0b8bf946f6a44a2e41ae1b358f&_e=Ch7QFP-6zcLseiquHk9jvPmUdmX9xVLek0HL2N43i4EEQ8KIJS7pubCzDZYGduH373vAydNz0N-NqUXk2yhq7Cy4pAJ21W4v3u24q7Mh5u-ve_95KVQjZWqOIjXOnFtmlCZcMttw7bILtOmGyEgYR7XI_s1R-x0U_K67W2XqPwzzJtpltNlVueJ8nA2ADP7UF-LrvfaJiOLWxr3eebE4gPypnaA2kTtodlYf9lFzJBwuf7uUx8ZXgeUtEl0S8D7KHR625832i4tsPC3nFGQrdulHhuP-cKAC0qMveSQTjQIYRa_npzwKHTBOCfJ3XxWDF9NknuzNBBAxRitnU-owycQQUMHRR6kDXywqc06nEOo0Km7pAueiEFmEHBvA7qFN)
---
As far as I've been told, I’m the _only_ Member of Congress who knows what it’s like to****_**shape policy in the White House**_ , _**execute it at the Pentagon**_ , then actually _**go into battle against America’s radical Islamic enemies**_ in life-and-death situations. I’m asking for your personal support for my reelection campaign so I can continue to provide the strong military leadership the American people need and deserve in Congress — __**They will NOT get it from Joe Biden**_._ I know how to create and execute a winning strategy on the battlefield and on the campaign trail. But my electoral strategy depends on patriotic Americans like YOU to succeed. So, be it $2,800, $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or $50, please stand with me as I work to defend America against Joe Biden's willingness to coddle communist China and the befriend the terrorism-exporting Iranian regime. [](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=90a9cb0b8bf946f6a44a2e41ae1b358f&_e=Ch7QFP-6zcLseiquHk9jvPmUdmX9xVLek0HL2N43i4EEQ8KIJS7pubCzDZYGduH373vAydNz0N-NqUXk2yhq7M1iBKs2XhaVysYSrhvLWAtcN_wea00fbdgUfZUqjTu-J44kJ0mJX6fOom5nuhjT0hCyKHKArxOTKTf-S6dwbjhJCJd2wGe1znZdMcLQc4G1EhuBvRcOKGWmAPim_h5XTdiE3w_N0xvRnHNPnrqndbnoth3qUU8Ab3QblkcWWgqDtl6KslLmQqFnw3-BKcMAJwbvMnpxfFQcv2ZyZoTUVjNpq1nqJpJTga_vRxHqFDqkdOTl2_aSk67Nfpw2YYGofiWYVhS8eLMOyMztkVnD2HKrFFhk-h7uBxzVjimFic8c)
---
[_**ANSWER THE CALL**_](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=90a9cb0b8bf946f6a44a2e41ae1b358f&_e=Ch7QFP-6zcLseiquHk9jvPmUdmX9xVLek0HL2N43i4EEQ8KIJS7pubCzDZYGduH373vAydNz0N-NqUXk2yhq7Cy4pAJ21W4v3u24q7Mh5u-ve_95KVQjZWqOIjXOnFtmlCZcMttw7bILtOmGyEgYR7XI_s1R-x0U_K67W2XqPwzzJtpltNlVueJ8nA2ADP7UF-LrvfaJiOLWxr3eebE4gPypnaA2kTtodlYf9lFzJBxyh6xGPsRU_iGEC8EJ6ELoL_o-iMcjAr5KmmiUrDYLsXzVFszCA2hx9v3MopbFxyDtC_Nnipwt4Cu1_R3l6HEcF1BoKlawIlwWpGE9la6YhwncNv19joVGYXfIN3_TQc2e3RIyGBq-ditD73kUHqHB)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56e0d458a35f44bebd8895b31b405fdb&_e=swc6rlQUsnn3vyU2Yi_W18yYzJruXH-jRKQ7Ddpkk0zlqPu7x_g8yRgbqQFFxul0RjxQLHt9gaVQ5i9aH1bs_NfA3NOJAqGTFsHqmDafBz5Rj9Jt3JaV65a7GrJdqpB1kc2rdXRoswVn5a09PVk2BZT37zw_Wy9kp6tmjkSYPZ6NmU3aRhsWiunpJEqgqKxJFaIGxepj8SHeVXLl0MHBrqEvjI4eXUu_BkDAf70esMU90tMsHLNTfLmVjTxtsyv7pI3EHEkjUAc7WkyidiJh-zEZ8-iFJua0ZWtj5KoxsDQ4YfvU96tEA_rYwztsMHRQZci4mtGPDDJpiEEtHSTMB7O-exROZKMR6Bn-cwevu3EQgymKfRj8Zq2PoHQ4t5MGApvnoB_AlCo6QerbzMyYmYvDpAKFzEzk44BGYD36R_Y%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56e0d458a35f44bebd8895b31b405fdb&_e=swc6rlQUsnn3vyU2Yi_W18yYzJruXH-jRKQ7Ddpkk0zlqPu7x_g8yRgbqQFFxul0RjxQLHt9gaVQ5i9aH1bs_NfA3NOJAqGTFsHqmDafBz5Rj9Jt3JaV65a7GrJdqpB1kc2rdXRoswVn5a09PVk2BZT37zw_Wy9kp6tmjkSYPZ6NmU3aRhsWiunpJEqgqKxJFaIGxepj8SHeVXLl0MHBrqEvjI4eXUu_BkDAf70esMU90tMsHLNTfLmVjTxtsyv7pI3EHEkjUAc7WkyidiJh-xxRGN0pZDYqTdRvjAsIFIu8dXkg-nkj70MUTYAnU2V_PSuxWMggWLMkHAB-9OJw7gCzFwV9TMB_0IU7aN7jcYjOVNMM0VvohcnBjZsjvU4gOhLZcBULbgXmPobvau1JKihnjG4F98EHdcDwifmjLW8%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. name: Wes Moore
subject: This Presidents’ Day
body:
Friend, this President’s Day, I’m reflecting on leadership.

True leadership means choosing to unite, not divide. It means reminding us there is no limit to what we can accomplish as Americans when we come together.

It means service — lifting everyone up, and making sure we’re not leaving anyone behind. It means increasing opportunities for our families to thrive. It means ensuring the safety and care of our neighborhoods.

Today, I’m especially inspired by the leadership of President Biden and forever grateful for his service to our country. President Biden has consistently worked in partnership with communities across our country to deliver real results.

That’s what true leadership looks like.

The policies of this presidency are working. We’re seeing historically low unemployment rates throughout the country, including right here in Maryland. We’re building billions of dollars of infrastructure projects across the country. President Biden is fighting for the future of this country, unlike Donald Trump.

There is still so much work to be done, but today, I want to pause to celebrate this administration’s historic achievements and say how proud I am to be part of the fight to re-elect President Biden come November.
Happy Presidents’ Day!

Elevate,

Wes Moore

---

# **[Special Counsel Interview Didn't Ask Controversial Question Says Report](http://trk.libertyledger.-SDMLHpZUBw)**
---
In a recent article published by NBC News, President Joe Biden came under fire for his reaction to a line in the special counsel’s report on his handling of classified documents. The report, written by Robert Hur, was released last week and concluded that while Biden had mishandled classified material, there was not enough evidence ..

# **[Speaker Johnson Comments On McConnell](http://trk.libertyledger.-JefCA8SBbwxdYw)**

Through an early morning session of debates and negotiations, Senate Republicans had finally passed a $95 billion foreign aid package to send to the House for approval. But shortly after the bill was handed over, Speaker of the House Mike Johnson (R-LA) put the final nail in the coffin, all but guaranteeing the bill’s demise. ..

Peter,

Today I’m not asking you to donate toward my grassroots campaign to keep CA-47 blue. Instead, I’m asking you to endorse our movement.

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2035%2E552475%2EiPuMIv)
Peter, Bob Casey is one of Mitch McConnell’s top targets.
[**Let me explain what it means to be at the top of the GOP’s list. But first, can you chip in $5 or more to keep this seat and our Senate blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240219-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240219-2&refcode2=2035_552475_iPuMIv&akid=2035%2E552475%2EiPuMIv)
Being a top target means that dark money super PACs are going to raise historic amounts of money to flip this seat — a super PAC supporting our opponent already raised $18 million last year, and that’s just the beginning.
It means that Mitch McConnell and his billionaire backers are ready to dump millions upon millions of dollars into PA to flood the airwaves and smear Bob’s record.
It means that Mitch McConnell knows that **if we lose in Pennsylvania, we have no chance of holding our razor-thin Senate majority.**
And it means that we need to meet every single fundraising goal we set to keep up with our mega-millionaire opponent's war chest.
[**That’s why I’m reaching out to ask: If there’s one campaign you donate to today, can you make it Bob Casey’s? With the Senate majority hinging on this race, your contribution will have the biggest impact in PA.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240219-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240219-2&refcode2=2035_552475_iPuMIv&akid=2035%2E552475%2EiPuMIv)

subject: Presidents Day
body:
Honoring our great leaders...
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
# Presidents Day
---
---
On this special day, let’s take a moment to honor the great leaders who have shaped our nation. Whether you’re enjoying a day off or working hard, I wish you all a fantastic Presidents Day! _"...a good moral character is the first essential in a man...It is therefore highly important that you should endeavor not only to be learned but virtuous." George Washington 1790_ May we continue to learn from their wisdom, dedication, and vision. Marc Flores

body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**$7.** That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** There are _seven_ special elections next month in states like Alabama, Kentucky, and New Hampshire – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re battling Republican mega-donors who are dumping millions into races nationwide. But when enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps our candidates compete against the GOP money machine. **Reason #3:** Losing means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states – so $7 can help defeat extremists who are determined to tear down abortion rights and ballot access. [So what do you say? name: Chrissy
subject: President Biden needs our help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Derek: I continue to wholeheartedly stand with President Biden and Vice President Harris.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79321692/456119446/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGJmZTU3NS02MWNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fp2Oo93q_FaVj-HIpD23qMSQ8CL2BDQYc1c2JlHdoQ=&emci=c9afa519-3dcc-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=28bfe575-61cf-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek, did you know that more Presidents were born in Virginia – Ohio is a close second – than any other state? Actually, yeah, that makes sense. And did you know that two U.S. Presidents were born in Pennsylvania? On this Presidents' Day, I want to talk about one of them.
Our very own President Biden has made an unprecedented amount of progress during his first term in office. He:
* Passed the largest climate bill in history
* Lowered drug prices
* Appointed the first Black woman to the U.S. Supreme Court
* Rebuilt our roads and bridges
* Brought semiconductor manufacturing back to the United States
* And so much more

This president has fought hard to make life better for everyday people – especially here in Pennsylvania.

**And, Derek: I continue to wholeheartedly stand with President Biden and Vice President Harris.** They are the best choice to serve all Americans and for the future of our democracy – and I’ll do everything I can to help in his mission for progress.
**This is no easy task – Donald Trump is winning every GOP primary and he’s 5 POINTS ahead of President Biden in the polls.** It’s going to take every Democrat and ally to stand up and do their part – **and that’s why I need your help.**
As I face off against my own Republican opponent, I’m counting on this team to help me defend my seat, drive up voter turnout for the **_whole_** ticket, and enable both a Democratic President and a Democratic House to continue working for the American people. **[So I’m asking: Will you chip in now so that I have the resources to resist GOP attacks and reach voters across PA-06?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79321693/456119448/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk952-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGJmZTU3NS02MWNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fp2Oo93q_FaVj-HIpD23qMSQ8CL2BDQYc1c2JlHdoQ=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79321694/456119450/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk952-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGJmZTU3NS02MWNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fp2Oo93q_FaVj-HIpD23qMSQ8CL2BDQYc1c2JlHdoQ=)

Together, I believe that we can continue to build a better future for our community and our country.

There’s work to be done,
Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

Actually, yeah, that makes sense. And did you know that two U.S. Presidents were born in Pennsylvania? On this Presidents' Day, I want to talk about one of them. Our very own President Biden has made an unprecedented amount of progress during his first term in office. He: Passed the largest climate bill in history Lowered drug prices Appointed the first Black woman to the U.S. Supreme Court Rebuilt our roads and bridges Brought semiconductor manufacturing back to the United States And so much more This president has fought hard to make life better for everyday people – especially here in Pennsylvania. And, Derek: I continue to wholeheartedly stand with President Biden and Vice President Harris. They are the best choice to serve all Americans and for the future of our democracy – and I’ll do everything I can to help in his mission for progress. This is no easy task – Donald Trump is winning every GOP primary and he’s 5 POINTS ahead of President Biden in the polls. It’s going to take every Democrat and ally to stand up and do their part – and that’s why I need your help. As I face off against my own Republican opponent, I’m counting on this team to help me defend my seat, drive up voter turnout for the whole ticket, and enable both a Democratic President and a Democratic House to continue working for the American people. = | | = Together, I believe that we can continue to build a better future for our community and our country. The old saying in politics is that yard signs don’t vote. While that may
be true, yard signs are HUGE for getting Qasim’s name out there, and
widening our campaign’s reach to brand new voters we may not have
connected with yet.

But, our first order of yard signs went fast, so now we need to put in a
rush order for more signs. We didn’t anticipate having to do this so soon,
and we need your help. [ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5507?t=1003&akid=35166%2E120265%2El2Hgip ]Can you make a contribution right now to help us

Ben

body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkTFv3DAMhX-NvOkgUrZ0N3gIEHhLURQBOgqyxN4JlWVDop303xcOkClTZr73PfLx94t78Smncv_hFxq5sqvN8eFa8FnOPueV5cPXgxo7VNhLhRJuDro49hajNh2NYNVV20EP0D1GAANxNsEPOlwj9DQMdo7xptVM3hjdpfHkKIQbKlBoLyHcQAV1tVFrDX-s6JXPVLld-EGVtn3OKfjC5JdLWJcujw_mrQn9JHASODUKe6XLWyqV4qkQOJ1ied6QGgmc4lp8jk3OvvyV_9a9ymNlkvsWPVM8MXqqJ6amchf6metOAs3Oiwt-2Xy6F6GfP_d2P5_k669XuABoi-gY-kFdUUmwgxFo6N1xit8wfOSshanwGX5Iriw_zQLN-16Or4OujnF7SzmnZs7S7otP-aMh_sYj_wcAAP__XHee8Q "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkTFv3DAMhX-NvOkgUrZ0N3gIEHhLURQBOgqyxN4JlWVDop303xcOkClTZr73PfLx94t78Smncv_hFxq5sqvN8eFa8FnOPueV5cPXgxo7VNhLhRJuDro49hajNh2NYNVV20EP0D1GAANxNsEPOlwj9DQMdo7xptVM3hjdpfHkKIQbKlBoLyHcQAV1tVFrDX-s6JXPVLld-EGVtn3OKfjC5JdLWJcujw_mrQn9JHASODUKe6XLWyqV4qkQOJ1ied6QGgmc4lp8jk3OvvyV_9a9ymNlkvsWPVM8MXqqJ6amchf6metOAs3Oiwt-2Xy6F6GfP_d2P5_k669XuABoi-gY-kFdUUmwgxFo6N1xit8wfOSshanwGX5Iriw_zQLN-16Or4OujnF7SzmnZs7S7otP-aMh_sYj_wcAAP__XHee8Q "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_

These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents. There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts. "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?" I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have 1) a Conservative House Majority, 2) a Conservative Senate, and 3) a Conservative in the White House.
