Guys.

Democrats in Washington and their Socialist Super PACS have too many connections and too much money in their fundraising war chest. **AKA, WAY TOO MUCH POWER!!** The people don't tell you how hard it is to start a campaign from Ground Zero. No war chest. No connections. Just you. Chip in to help me keep going.

**[At this point, if I don't do a complete 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my fundraising efforts, but Republicans may never win a race again. Help SAVE AMERICA now!](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=6c4dbcfa9aa34ad7bcacda9e092dcfee&_e=dMnz9iAcue-Up4yaeDhOugVXcsQ7litdeEAVGirsfZEeUDep5-ZVIBGvaOxym4D0vLAkymE2b0KxRft8OslX80TlAPtorbaVoU3RfzA5K4__qpOPZx7tsYzWBRKgBvj2zgF67Wc_YunJnA5dJu1xZzUKrBYYS8YJSU73SEhQf9tFakEElaIX-lsHdFR5oZPIuwqrEqpeUA9sHW0HrPmi-GXlDGBGmRRQehIa8JBhmT7l4GRcHPKgj5OxP7DC274iaBYYEm02p3fxHrVkNGj9DiD4WDW8VjQFgx5BpIjumxywKnC8AzLRfpNZTrZHvfn2)**
If the Democrats can beat us in November, I can guarantee you Republicans won't have a chance to beat them for a long time.

**Why? Because as a hillbilly and a Marine, I know a fight.**

I'm one of the toughest Republicans in the Senate. Democrats know that--that's why they're dumping money into the upcoming elections to beat conservatives everywhere. If we can't stop them - no one can.

**[If you chip in just $25 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and derail the Biden-Schumer plan to destroy our nation.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=6c4dbcfa9aa34ad7bcacda9e092dcfee&_e=dMnz9iAcue-Up4yaeDhOugVXcsQ7litdeEAVGirsfZEeUDep5-ZVIBGvaOxym4D0vLAkymE2b0KxRft8OslX80TlAPtorbaVoU3RfzA5K4__qpOPZx7tsYzWBRKgBvj2zgF67Wc_YunJnA5dJu1xZzUKrBYYS8YJSU73SEhQf9uZ314C_L9a9rk-PsTdTWtFUGwRjsHNC9BPfQzw2RWKptaq90w74AD3oKUnyglaOMYiZI3TgwPnORH0HWSaoNLqYXsWXnjrgS-jvJctzUZhhU-ssGdcnIzF3Uw6khfT8YD4mNppbKhu4qO29_UkNN4e)**
**I 'm humbly asking you, as someone who has been fighting my entire life, will you help me out?**

Thank you,

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance. If the Democrats can beat us in November, I can guarantee you Republicans won't have a chance to beat them for a long time. Why? Because as a hillbilly and a Marine, I know a fight. I'm one of the toughest Republicans in the Senate. Democrats know that--that's why they're dumping money into the upcoming elections to beat conservatives everywhere. If we can't stop them - no one can. I 'm humbly asking you, as someone who has been fighting my entire life, will you help me out? Thank you, JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. | [H.B. 939](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dBp_pocswcxZk1P_s52uBX_SXO4Ikx5JMOkGt4h6B8tp2dZMwum3MYKNf3R9vCsPlkk710_1uCyd5LunZIxlGAL7CqJKiJrEt-W13bu-ACCe_vIig_KPwJ75wAqDO81rTofvjlvYuuAxAvfKr4CPSOfVDJRtSktDRUvIt5qZ1qpS4rq5O7o4IWC5cEPJtXAlNVRfSy_90Go=&c=BRi9vWr_jeLMls9l0v_WblTtrDHHFfgSdRKPXVaqPTDdPQWCxxjwpQ==&ch=Jg0BtGp4d_bjWHgcc2_I2LxnzmZnAtM9Ig5vLafIaNjMCXquW-2t6w==) Patron: Shin Elections administration; certain activities or conduct prohibited at polling places applicable to locations for absentee voting in person; prohibited possession of firearm within 100 feet of certain locations. Clarifies that the provisions of law prohibiting certain activities or conduct in and around a polling place shall also apply to locations where absentee voting in person is available. The bill also prohibits any person, with certain exceptions, from knowingly carrying a firearm on or about his person within 100 feet of the entrance of a polling place, the building used by the local electoral board to meet to ascertain election results, the building used to conduct a recount of an election, and other additional locations used for voting-related and elections-related activities.. Under current law, this prohibition applies within 40 feet of such entrances. A BILL to amend and reenact §§ [24.2-107](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dBp_pocswcxZk1P_s52uBX_SXO4Ikx5JMOkGt4h6B8tp2dZMwum3MYKNf3R9vCsPs0ZGVjQvDqQJIWVbg0An9lg8eha9vkbbIqN457KUTYhmqClOT8pKskfaQwvlxvfOkrTF_hL5v9K51F6fKn0Ws8gcXNCgYAJnNwZu71Ugr1Q=&c=BRi9vWr_jeLMls9l0v_WblTtrDHHFfgSdRKPXVaqPTDdPQWCxxjwpQ==&ch=Jg0BtGp4d_bjWHgcc2_I2LxnzmZnAtM9Ig5vLafIaNjMCXquW-2t6w==), | [H.B. 62](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dBp_pocswcxZk1P_s52uBX_SXO4Ikx5JMOkGt4h6B8tp2dZMwum3MYKNf3R9vCsPLSqGkTdc5-gOBlbwleq8j9HH12srWXEj8o51hbjkyOhzIvmlAZqYbsXtzyw2_gQ42RpAQgmJggpm_OXMQZaUbXKhhwbonTi5l1CehIe_7pUzFK_lT_rb4Q5LvoNrMCUa906retKty4g=&c=BRi9vWr_jeLMls9l0v_WblTtrDHHFfgSdRKPXVaqPTDdPQWCxxjwpQ==&ch=Jg0BtGp4d_bjWHgcc2_I2LxnzmZnAtM9Ig5vLafIaNjMCXquW-2t6w==) Patron: Campbell Animal Cruelty Conviction List established. Requires the Superintendent of State Police to establish no later than January 1, 2027, and to maintain the Animal Cruelty Conviction List and to make the List available to the public on the website of the Department of State Police. The bill specifies that the List include the names of persons convicted of certain felony animal cruelty offenses on or after July 1, 2024. The bill requires persons convicted of any such offense to pay a fee of $50 per conviction to fund the maintenance of the List. The bill also requires the Department to remove a person's name and information from the List 15 years after its listing if he has no additional felony conviction of any such offense. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding in Article 9 of Chapter 65 of Title 3.2 a section numbered [3.2-6573.1](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dBp_pocswcxZk1P_s52uBX_SXO4Ikx5JMOkGt4h6B8tp2dZMwum3MYKNf3R9vCsPc2cNJ57Ly0y1PkWmvQTfgUj27b61ryXbCPnt1qHcavVteWOl7OJW_hznl42Bez8dsoME2Y1HR7Ln9Q8vFxCOdTp5McLaiCeoAQ2pEa4dPPpnvyYVqV0uYg==&c=BRi9vWr_jeLMls9l0v_WblTtrDHHFfgSdRKPXVaqPTDdPQWCxxjwpQ==&ch=Jg0BtGp4d_bjWHgcc2_I2LxnzmZnAtM9Ig5vLafIaNjMCXquW-2t6w==), relating to establishment of Animal Cruelty Conviction List.24102944D
[H.B. 759](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dBp_pocswcxZk1P_s52uBX_SXO4Ikx5JMOkGt4h6B8tp2dZMwum3MYKNf3R9vCsPRGUwIjp2ZMHcU_d7yo40lCxW2VsdGeRQoKvmFDUEV3qxr3e8Z54LTDZfFZ2uvPRwDuFNfOD0E3PWpiTBuCt_bQzFM-sqt6b8RF4plvsjhLrgrazA-YlFeVWAEAcdP1t93SQzOOoSjQQ=&c=BRi9vWr_jeLMls9l0v_WblTtrDHHFfgSdRKPXVaqPTDdPQWCxxjwpQ==&ch=Jg0BtGp4d_bjWHgcc2_I2LxnzmZnAtM9Ig5vLafIaNjMCXquW-2t6w==) Patron: Freitas Food inspections; private homes; pickles and acidified vegetables; gross sales. Increases from $3,000 to $9,000 the gross sales annual revenue cap for sales of pickles and other acidified vegetables that have an equilibrium pH value of 4.6 or lower and are processed and prepared in a private home without an inspection as otherwise required to operate a food establishment. The bill expands the exemption for private homes where the resident processes and prepares certain food products to allow for such person to sell the food at a temporary event that operates for a period of no more than 14 consecutive days. The bill also clarifies that such person may advertise such food products over the Internet provided that the sale takes place in person and complies with certain restrictions. Friends, Most "good" Republican bills are now dead in both Democrat controlled houses. In fact, many of the Republican bills that did make it over to the other house seem silly and inconsequential. There are a few exceptions.
Most bills remaining are Democrat sponsored bills that are most likely going to be vetoed by Governor Youngkin.
It will be very interested to see which bills of significance actually make it out of the 2024 General Assembly Session and the Governor's veto pen.

clean_body: Participate online or in person here | | | | Senate Bills Up TUESDAY CALL IN REMOTELY OR SHOW UP | | Senate Committee Public Hearings for TUESDAY BILLS TO WATCH Tuesday's Dockets | | == | Not meeting | | == | Not meeting | | == House Bills on Third Reading - Regular Calendar ... == == == == == == == == * == | | == | == Patron: Shin Elections administration; certain activities or conduct prohibited at polling places applicable to locations for absentee voting in person; prohibited possession of firearm within 100 feet of certain locations. Clarifies that the provisions of law prohibiting certain activities or conduct in and around a polling place shall also apply to locations where absentee voting in person is available. The bill also prohibits any person, with certain exceptions, from knowingly carrying a firearm on or about his person within 100 feet of the entrance of a polling place, the building used by the local electoral board to meet to ascertain election results, the building used to conduct a recount of an election, and other additional locations used for voting-related and elections-related activities.. Under current law, this prohibition applies within 40 feet of such entrances. A BILL to amend and reenact §§ ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, and == of the Code of Virginia, relating to elections administration; certain activities or conduct prohibited at polling places applicable to locations for absentee voting in person; possession of firearm within 100 feet of locations used for certain voting-related and elections-related activities; penalty.24106402D == Patron: Sickles Voter registration; list maintenance; data sharing; requiring membership in the Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC). Requires the Commissioner of Elections to apply for, enter into, and maintain membership for the Commonwealth in the Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC). A BILL to require the Commonwealth's participation in the Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC).24100506D | | == | == Patron: Campbell Animal Cruelty Conviction List established. Requires the Superintendent of State Police to establish no later than January 1, 2027, and to maintain the Animal Cruelty Conviction List and to make the List available to the public on the website of the Department of State Police. The bill specifies that the List include the names of persons convicted of certain felony animal cruelty offenses on or after July 1, 2024. The bill requires persons convicted of any such offense to pay a fee of $50 per conviction to fund the maintenance of the List. The bill also requires the Department to remove a person's name and information from the List 15 years after its listing if he has no additional felony conviction of any such offense. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding in Article 9 of Chapter 65 of Title 3.2 a section numbered ==, relating to establishment of Animal Cruelty Conviction List.24102944D == Patron: Freitas Food inspections; private homes; pickles and acidified vegetables; gross sales. Increases from $3,000 to $9,000 the gross sales annual revenue cap for sales of pickles and other acidified vegetables that have an equilibrium pH value of 4.6 or lower and are processed and prepared in a private home without an inspection as otherwise required to operate a food establishment. The bill expands the exemption for private homes where the resident processes and prepares certain food products to allow for such person to sell the food at a temporary event that operates for a period of no more than 14 consecutive days. The bill also clarifies that such person may advertise such food products over the Internet provided that the sale takes place in person and complies with certain restrictions. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to food inspections; private homes; pickles and acidified vegetables; gross sales.24106149D | | == | Not meeting | | == | == Patron: Hope Public pools; regulations. Directs the Board of Health to adopt regulations governing swimming pools and other water recreational facilities operated for public use, including swimming pools and other water recreational facilities operated in conjunction with a tourist facility or health spa. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to public pools; regulations.24100851D == Patron: Price Contraception; right to contraception; applicability; enforcement. Establishes a right to obtain contraceptives and engage in contraception, as defined in the bill. The bill creates a cause of action that may be instituted against anyone who infringes on such right. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding in Title 32.1 a chapter numbered 21, consisting of sections numbered ==, ==, and ==, relating to contraception; right to contraception; applicability; enforcement.24102170D | ACTION, ACTION, ACTION | Friends, Most "good" Republican bills are now dead in both Democrat controlled houses. In fact, many of the Republican bills that did make it over to the other house seem silly and inconsequential. There are a few exceptions. Most bills remaining are Democrat sponsored bills that are most likely going to be vetoed by Governor Youngkin. It will be very interested to see which bills of significance actually make it out of the 2024 General Assembly Session and the Governor's veto pen. YOU can participate remotely with your legislators from the comfort of your home. YOU can watch Senate Committees in action and at the right time, comment to the committee in real time. This is YOUR opportunity to DO SOMETHING. Above I have listed the dockets for THIS TUESDAY'S Senate Committee hearings. By clicking each link you can quickly look over which bills are coming up this Tuesday that are of interest to you. Find a bill that interests you and want to comment remotely? Then click on the link below to the streaming of the committee meeting and follow the directions to either view the committee in real time or comment remotely to the Senate committee members in real time to state your support or opposition to a particular bill. It's that easy to express your support or opposition to a bill coming up on this Tuesday's docket. | | NEXT CHESTERFIELD VA TEA PARTY MEETING | When: Tuesday, March 5 Time: 7pm -8:30pm Where: The Great American Ranch 13995 Raised Antler Circle Midlothian, VA 23112 SPECIAL GUEST: SENATOR BILL STANLEY Legislative Update Overview of bills that passed, failed How to watch committees online | GET REGULAR UPDATES | Thank you to those who have pitched in to help cover my costs to communicate with you each week while the General Assembly is in session. THANK YOU. Many of you have advised me that you appreciate my instructive and informative emails, regarding important bills coming before the Virginia General Assembly. I'm delighted to continue to send you these emails and ask for your continued support so that I may continue to communicate with you. If you haven't done so already, will you please help me offset the cost by pitching in a few dollars? It costs about $400 per month to send out emails to keep you informed about bills coming before the General Assembly. Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly? Thank you in advance for your continued support. After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed. Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 so that I can continue to communicate with you and help you to engage and interact with your representatives to ensure accountability and transparency. | | == | | | | | | | | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | Sent by mailto:amanda@senatoramandachase.ccsend.com powered by

name: Stephen Miller
subject: Maricopa County, AZ Election Lawsuit >>
body:
I have breaking news to share with you...

| | [](http://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkb2K3DAURp9G7jTox7FHhQsTx2l2wrIpAmnEHenaI9CPkeQM8_bBwUmd9tPhwNH9cdM3cN7F9RsEHBafdS46FA2Lp-jRVJciLburWjDRUiYoV5o3dmBc2bZtcOA9u8q-6zvWPAbVW9H31wVUC0xe7_yTvBqQABKNYtY2bjg8THAlmOCcX1THOsUNcBCLAgakZeAx18uSEW0KEK13d8z1lXFLuV5MCo0fHrVuhciRiJmIuaDZM16eLma0B0HEDAGzM0AXl0ulHlfwdEl7tHA0ETEHyM6kDahJe6wv6uF5hNItbRSInPcadEl7Nkjk9IG_vj8gIxHdsRsIG7g1EjmN85u-fR5_0ve0jfqsEycX0Lo9EDl9CeD8OVZD5DS_fdATbv9KU6wYK5HTP9_5AitG8yJyev_a5MFuT-e9K11PWrYe4j-fUv_7fL8DAAD__6Qso6k)
---
Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_[_**_DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS_ >>** _](http://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkb2K3DAURp9G7jTox7FHhQsTx2l2wrIpAmnEHenaI9CPkeQM8_bBwUmd9tPhwNH9cdM3cN7F9RsEHBafdS46FA2Lp-jRVJciLburWjDRUiYoV5o3dmBc2bZtcOA9u8q-6zvWPAbVW9H31wVUC0xe7_yTvBqQABKNYtY2bjg8THAlmOCcX1THOsUNcBCLAgakZeAx18uSEW0KEK13d8z1lXFLuV5MCo0fHrVuhciRiJmIuaDZM16eLma0B0HEDAGzM0AXl0ulHlfwdEl7tHA0ETEHyM6kDahJe6wv6uF5hNItbRSInPcadEl7Nkjk9IG_vj8gIxHdsRsIG7g1EjmN85u-fR5_0ve0jfqsEycX0Lo9EDl9CeD8OVZD5DS_fdATbv9KU6wYK5HTP9_5AitG8yJyev_a5MFuT-e9K11PWrYe4j-fUv_7fL8DAAD__6Qso6k)**We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:****#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_**#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_**#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.**Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring._Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_[_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE >>_**_](http://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkb2K3DAURp9G7jTox7FHhQsTx2l2wrIpAmnEHenaI9CPkeQM8_bBwUmd9tPhwNH9cdM3cN7F9RsEHBafdS46FA2Lp-jRVJciLburWjDRUiYoV5o3dmBc2bZtcOA9u8q-6zvWPAbVW9H31wVUC0xe7_yTvBqQABKNYtY2bjg8THAlmOCcX1THOsUNcBCLAgakZeAx18uSEW0KEK13d8z1lXFLuV5MCo0fHrVuhciRiJmIuaDZM16eLma0B0HEDAGzM0AXl0ulHlfwdEl7tHA0ETEHyM6kDahJe6wv6uF5hNItbRSInPcadEl7Nkjk9IG_vj8gIxHdsRsIG7g1EjmN85u-fR5_0ve0jfqsEycX0Lo9EDl9CeD8OVZD5DS_fdATbv9KU6wYK5HTP9_5AitG8yJyev_a5MFuT-e9K11PWrYe4j-fUv_7fL8DAAD__6Qso6k)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: The Missouri I grew up in taught me to take care of my community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
That’s something Josh Hawley could never understand. Let me explain.
#
Peter,
The Missouri I grew up in taught me how important it is to take care of my community. But that’s not something Josh Hawley could ever understand.
**Please let me explain:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43861?refcode=em20240219-4828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz)
On the right is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on our neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in mid-Missouri — in a community where people took care of each other. That’s us on the left.
When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that make us less safe.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43861?refcode=em20240219-4828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz)
While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve been fighting to take back power for American workers and small businesses.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43861?refcode=em20240219-4828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz)
And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him accountable.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43861?refcode=em20240219-4828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz)
**The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another.** To do your duty. To serve and sacrifice for your fellow Missourians.
**Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and on January 6th, 2021, he showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43861?refcode=em20240219-4828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz)
Josh Hawley hasn't just abandoned our state and our values. He's embarrassed himself and all of Missouri. And embarrassing Missouri... That’s something I can't let go.
**Missourians deserve a US Senator who will stand up and fight for them — and unlike Josh, I'm ready to serve.** If you’re ready to help us make sure every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day, I need your help:
**[Will you chip in any amount you can afford to our campaign right now so we can get our message in front of voters? The only way we’ll be able to flip this Senate seat is if we build a powerful grassroots movement, and support from real people like you is the best way we can do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43861?refcode=em20240219-4828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43862?refcode=em20240219-4828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43862?refcode=em20240219-4828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43862?refcode=em20240219-4828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43862?refcode=em20240219-4828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43862?refcode=em20240219-4828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43862?refcode=em20240219-4828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43861?refcode=em20240219-4828&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz)
---
If we keep working together, we can take back power for working Missourians and everyday people all across the country.
Thanks for all your help,
— Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240219-4828-footer&t=14&refcode2=4828_614464_QHeUzz&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz)**

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=4828%2E614464%2EQHeUzz). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

We've seen book bans put in place, anti-trans bills passed, and taxes cut for the wealthy. But, things didn't just stop there. **Across the country, we've also witnessed some of our most fundamental rights under attack.** That doesn't sit right with us, and we know you don't approve either. So, our team is working to get a bench of progressive leaders elected, but we need your help to do so. [**Big change happens on the ground. clean_body: | | | Kindness, honesty, integrity. That's the recipe for great leaders. And, right now, we're witnessing the aftermath of what happens when not-so-great leaders are elected to office. We've seen book bans put in place, anti-trans bills passed, and taxes cut for the wealthy. But, things didn't just stop there. Across the country, we've also witnessed some of our most fundamental rights under attack. That doesn't sit right with us, and we know you don't approve either. So, our team is working to get a bench of progressive leaders elected, but we need your help to do so. = = It's time to lean in. Lean into change. Lean into the possibilities. Lean into great leaders, because we can't afford to let things keep going the way they are. This past November, we organized in targeted House districts in Virginia, funded local Democratic activists, and sent nearly one million text messages to voters and supporters to help knock out long-time Republican incumbents. But, we've got to keep up the hard work and do it again. = We are paving the way for more and more great leaders to take office, but we can't do this without you. Thanks, Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. |

body:
Can you imagine what would be in store if they won again next year?

| |

---
| | | As I always do, let me give it to you straight:

The Democrats JUST squeaked ahead in the polls and activated their army of Liberal megadonors to grow their lead even further. _**[Unfortunately, I'm left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkTGP2zAMhX-NvMkQKVmOBw-HHrwUVxRdOgqKxDhqZNmQ5OTu3xcOcFOH4jYC5PveI_n7zbzZEEOaf9iFxpvLJhdT76Y4G3m0pRaDAhUXyGEw0PjRD05b3dAIvTjJ_gSAzXUc_Nmf4TR0HXipADrdd9JLKy8g1YVUE8aDIxAGFFIr3Z61kwBCqNPQA16QKWEj5dreiDa3pjlTKZm2_RyDs6l169LE8VrrVph8YTgxnAq5PVP7CCmTPyYYTpXswo_4oRDD6UYpkf_glP6sHzxU_riGSEfx3I5vB0lO-SDlkGYmX2veiaHe62KcXTYb5sTk62d88_OFf__2C1oAqRWaCqoT_aA49J1mqOnd1OC_IHj6rKlSqof5nd9c5p9ihvp9T_d_G00e_fYIMYaie6bEvNgQn0eq_3_j3wAAAP__mTWZdg "Unfortunately, I’m left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.")**_

Look,

The Democrats are working from dawn 'til dusk to force-feed Liberal propaganda in our classrooms, trash the reputations of Conservative Supreme Court justices, re-up mask mandates, leave the border wide open, and woke-ify our military - that's enough to drive folks like you and me up a wall...

**But their Limousine Liberal buddies eat it up. And the huge checks roll in one after another. **

They'd love nothing more than to see the downfall of our House Majority. They know Conservatives would be powerless to stop them if they take full control of Congress.

_I know Mike Johnson reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Newt Gingrich reached out...
I know Byron Donalds reached out...
And I know James Comer reached out..._

But now I'm reaching out ONE LAST TIME because the latest reports show the Radical Democrats with a devastating $8 million lead on us.

_**[If we don't get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. name: Blake Dellinger
subject: Join Laura for a Glendale Meet & Greet this Friday 2/23
body:
Friends,

With 15 days to go until Election Day we are working day and night to get Laura over the finish line.

I just wanted to briefly share with everyone in the Glendale area that we are hosting**one of our last Meet and Greets of the primary at a home in Glendale this Friday 2/23**!

Please see the flyer below and let me know if you'd like to come by!

P.S. If you're interested in volunteering for the final weeks of Laura's campaign, please sign up at the link here: [lauraforcongress.org/volunteer](http://lauraforcongress.org/volunteer).

Thank you,
Blake Dellinger
Laura Friedman for Congress

name: Young
subject: They won.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
I couldn’t believe it...

| |
---
| | | _**- A Personal Note from Congresswoman Young Kim - **_
Dear, Friend,

You may not know me, but this is Congresswoman Young Kim, and I would really appreciate it if you would take a moment to read my story.

I am a Christian, mother, wife, small business owner, and a first-generation immigrant.

When I moved to America, I didn't speak a word of English. But I worked hard, put myself through school, and am now one of the first Korean-American women to serve in Congress. But my road hasn't been exactly easy.

__In 2018, I ran for Congress and I lost my election.__

But I wouldn't let myself give up no matter how hard the Democrats tried to make me. So I ran again in 2020, and despite MILLIONS in spending against me, we won. **Together, we flipped a DEEP BLUE seat RED for the FIRST TIME in 26 years. **

Every year since then, we've continued to defy the odds to stop the woke Democrat machine and keep this seat for House Republicans.

_I 'm nothing special._ Just an immigrant who came to this country - not knowing a word of English - who lived the American Dream. And I've made it my mission on Capitol Hill to help make that same Dream possible for everyone.

But now, the Democrats are once again after my seat. They are angry that I flipped a deep Blue seat Red, and now they want it back. _The far-Left knows that my seat could very well decide the House Majority and they are DESPERATE for revenge. _

---
| | [SUPPORT YOUNG KIM TODAY](http://email.update.truedaily.news/c/eJyUkTGP3CAQhX8N7rBgwHgpXJy0cnenFJFSIgKzNooNFuD1-d9HTnTVVVuP3ve90fv1bt5tWEKcPuyKQ_XR5GK2nIqpT3OmPU60znjSI0UDDCRlQLk2vPED11Zy1eDAe3YTveZMNPMATjgH8qF7JzU6J8QNvVD65mQne8QmDBeHAdfAJJNda61Vyv_uWPdQnIkHkWzfvK3Y1ryjt2E524hHaZZhrnUrRLwRGAmMBd2esT1CzOhbl1YC4__Kf8JKHylTl-KUsRQCY0T09Ex7pjMu2wUQY74AOcSJiPvlIqD2uhpn182GKRJx_6pqfrzRn_cPaDkXPXSmctkxDYxyxjQBhZ-mBv9C4J8nxYqxXvInrT7SrzAB9bnH5_dDkwe_HWFZQlE9kWxabViuz5v6wnZ_AwAA__8IkZpe)
---
| | [DEFEND THE GOP MAJORITY](http://email.update.truedaily.news/c/eJyUkTGP3CAQhX8N7rBgwHgpXJy0cnenFJFSIgKzNooNFuD1-d9HTnTVVVuP3ve90fv1bt5tWEKcPuyKQ_XR5GK2nIqpT3OmPU60znjSI0UDDCRlQLk2vPED11Zy1eDAe3YTveZMNPMATjgH8qF7JzU6J8QNvVD65mQne8QmDBeHAdfAJJNda61Vyv_uWPdQnIkHkWzfvK3Y1ryjt2E524hHaZZhrnUrRLwRGAmMBd2esT1CzOhbl1YC4__Kf8JKHylTl-KUsRQCY0T09Ex7pjMu2wUQY74AOcSJiPvlIqD2uhpn182GKRJx_6pqfrzRn_cPaDkXPXSmctkxDYxyxjQBhZ-mBv9C4J8nxYqxXvInrT7SrzAB9bnH5_dDkwe_HWFZQlE9kWxabViuz5v6wnZ_AwAA__8IkZpe)
---

clean_body: I couldn’t believe it... | | | | | - A Personal Note from Congresswoman Young Kim - Dear, Friend, You may not know me, but this is Congresswoman Young Kim, and I would really appreciate it if you would take a moment to read my story. I am a Christian, mother, wife, small business owner, and a first-generation immigrant. When I moved to America, I didn't speak a word of English. But I worked hard, put myself through school, and am now one of the first Korean-American women to serve in Congress. But my road hasn't been exactly easy. In 2018, I ran for Congress and I lost my election. But I wouldn't let myself give up no matter how hard the Democrats tried to make me. So I ran again in 2020, and despite MILLIONS in spending against me, we won. Together, we flipped a DEEP BLUE seat RED for the FIRST TIME in 26 years. Every year since then, we've continued to defy the odds to stop the woke Democrat machine and keep this seat for House Republicans. I 'm nothing special. Just an immigrant who came to this country - not knowing a word of English - who lived the American Dream. And I've made it my mission on Capitol Hill to help make that same Dream possible for everyone. But now, the Democrats are once again after my seat. They are angry that I flipped a deep Blue seat Red, and now they want it back. The far-Left knows that my seat could very well decide the House Majority and they are DESPERATE for revenge. | | | | They've recruited progressive Liberals to run against me, pledged MILLIONS of dollars in attack ads & smear campaigns, and the White House even named me one of their TOP 18 targets. I don't normally ask for help like this, but my campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters just like you, and I urgently need your help to win my fight, Friend. clean_body: Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make a donation to Adam Frisch’s campaign before midnight tonight? Hello, = What if we told you that in 2022 – after a recount – Adam lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes? What if we told you that it was the closest race in the entire country? What if we told you that after Adam announced he was running again and scared off Lauren Boebert, every political pundit said that Adam absolutely can win this seat in November? And what if we told you that this is a must-win seat, but our fundraising has really slowed down? We know that $5 might not seem like much against the corporate PACs and special interests. But when tens of thousands of grassroots donors like you all chip in, we have something far stronger than any Super PAC. We’ve set a goal to raise another $15,000 before midnight tonight to win this seat and replace Lauren Boebert, and right now we’re still very short. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Your donation now – no matter the amount – means a lot. Hi Derek!
Adam wanted us to reach out to make sure you saw his invitation to our grassroots fundraising event on Thursday, February 22nd.
**[You can RSVP here by purchasing a ticket for $25 or more — let us know if you can join!](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em_event_022224.hrSWgi&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20240219_PM3_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5569%2E5257348%2EIrUMHP)**

---
You won’t want to miss this great opportunity to learn about Adam’s campaign and vision for California. We’re also expecting some special guests to join us!
Learn more about the event from Adam’s original message below:

From: Adam Schiff
Date: Friday, February 16, 2024
Subject: I hope to see you on Thursday, Feb. 22_
Hi Derek,
On Thursday, February 22nd, at 4:30 PM PT, I’m hosting a Zoom fundraising event — and I hope to see you there!
**[If you can make it next Thursday evening, RSVP here by purchasing a ticket for $25 or more on this ActBlue page.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em_event_022224.hrSWgi&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20240219_PM3_V1_S1&t=6&akid=5569%2E5257348%2EIrUMHP)**

This event will be a great opportunity to learn more about the work we’re doing in the final weeks of this campaign.
Whether you’ve been with me since we launched this Senate campaign last January, or if you’re new to the team, it means so much to me to know you have my back.
**Some special guests will be joining us for our fundraising event next week, including Mark Hamill, the Honorable Barbara Boxer, and LA County Supervisor Lindsey Horvath!**
**[If you can make it next Thursday evening, RSVP here by purchasing a ticket for $25 or more on this ActBlue page.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em_event_022224.hrSWgi&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20240219_PM3_V1_S1&t=8&akid=5569%2E5257348%2EIrUMHP)**

---
Thank you, Derek! I look forward to seeing you next week, and I appreciate your continued support.
— Adam

name: =?utf-8?Q?Reagan=20Dunn?=
subject: ICYMI...A win for our state’s lands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jaime for Lands - R_
body:
As many of you know, I’m a sportsman. I’m happiest when... | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f6a3ea433546/saturday-plans-6691976?e=5456f2ac8b)
---

Friends –
As many of you know, I’m a sportsman. I’m happiest hiking the Cascade Mountains, fly fishing onWashington’s rivers or clam digging at the beach. This State is blessed with wonderful natural resources and I believe it’s absolutely critical that we care for the land in a way the ensures our future generations get to enjoy it as much as I do!
That’s why I was thrilled when my friend Jaime Herrera Beutler announced her campaign for Commissioner of Public Lands. Her skillset and her interests are so well suited for this role, I can’t think of a better candidate to put forth.
[Will you join me in making a donation to Jaime’s campaign today?](https://jaimeforlands.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f880cdc0c3e720dcafaf72d5&id=a7edc1e12c&e=5456f2ac8b)
For those of you who don’t know, the Public Lands Commissioner runs the Department of Natural Resources (DNR). All told, DNR sets policy for almost 40% of our state – whether it’s the 3 million acres in the state's land trust, the 2.6 million acres of beaches, tidelands lake and rivers, or the 12 million acres of public and private lands.
Jaime spent a dozen years in Congress and while there, she scored some big victories to improve the way our forests are run and provide resources to fight wild land fires. But there’s a lot more to be done, and frankly, the work must be done right here at home. In fact, her main priority is to help end the cycle of annual forest fires and smoke that has choked our region over the last several summers.
I know from experience, that a Statewide campaign is expensive and down ballot races don’t get the attention others do but are just as critical to the future of our state. That’s why I’m asking all my friends to support her race with a donation. We know she’s going to need about $2 million dollars to reach voters across the State.
When I ran statewide, Jaime was there to help. Politics is a team sport and Jaime is a teammate I’m thrilled to help out. We need her on our Statewide Republican Team. A recent poll shows Jaime leading all seven candidates in this race, regardless of party. I’d like to help make sure she has the resources to get her winning message out across all of Washington so please, [make a donation to her campaign today!](https://jaimeforlands.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f880cdc0c3e720dcafaf72d5&id=1b0f926845&e=5456f2ac8b)
Thank you!
Reagan Dunn
P.S. I forgot to mention –contributions to Jaime’s campaign are limited to $4,800 per person and business. [I hope you’ll be as generous as you’re able!](https://jaimeforlands.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f880cdc0c3e720dcafaf72d5&id=f1ea94210c&e=5456f2ac8b) Thank you so much!

|
---
| [Click here to learn more about Jaime](https://jaimeforlands.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f880cdc0c3e720dcafaf72d5&id=32ff23cb9a&e=5456f2ac8b)
---
| | | _Copyright © 2024 | JaimeForLands.com All rights reserved.
Paid for by Jaime for Lands - R_
Our mailing address is:
P.O. Box 1618 - Battle Ground, WA 98604

You can [update your preferences](https://jaimeforlands.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=0f880cdc0c3e720dcafaf72d5&id=f4b093b684&e=5456f2ac8b&c=7c4d58837b) or [unsubscribe](https://jaimeforlands.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0f880cdc0c3e720dcafaf72d5&id=f4b093b684&t=b&e=5456f2ac8b&c=7c4d58837b)
---

They voted 724 times and passed a whopping...27 bills. That’s more voting and less lawmaking than any Congress in history. So we’d like to congratulate the extremists on this great achievement by promptly kicking these bozos out of office 😊 **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79324740/456128345/-312646747?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4OTM2ZTE1LTZiY2YtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vgsscSs-D6D6pLocKzdRirTUMdyTN4t9DmHgBNrWZ68=&emci=ac82b050-aace-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=88936e15-6bcf-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=15125741)** We think it’s time for a new Congress that actually can pass laws, not just vote for them. That’s the whole reason the Blue Dogs exist, to knock out extremists and put in people who will actually work on policy. * Create decent, good-paying jobs for every kind of American community.
* Pass fiscally responsible policies that make people’s lives better, like better child care or fairer tax policies for the middle class.

| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=baef94f34cc745f3a688ed00a7918c3e&_e=gwsEMPpkjOXoS9yrhe2AUgZF6grM6UZ79z1uuloNdyxIN-tVzXQZB13oQmpFfcKiIfnzrOZ-SxIkB20FhEWpBnrOMIf96aIffQSBObGKRImhFeT2JYhjlLNHmag2bd-NOdfKlzga_OZhIOibC_XVZyiNi1mIsy8XnUOavRMZr8W-mQ7AwfBp3OOlDzs60VnKfpwQ4LybaxsRZxeB9xv1Jin-AnhiCKEGs9VMfHKL3DxYu9UukRCoi9dh1ZCd7LX9VoAc3c1jJZvmzkwSmVRkLDplvYZvsp6uVnZwvkpPiHUqzhouIpShac1nDklmUHCUR4JoJS6426AFkZTAZ_DjZiOpG3cCzgMJu182CvR4wpkzr92atAPUmcrliFUVj93wmJJrsXerilqdOoVqw1tUzg%3D%3D)
---
Peter, Since day one, Hung has been the best husband and father for our family.
I’m so grateful for his dedication to our family and country.

Now, he’s ready to be the best U.S. Senator for Virginia - and here’s how I know he’s up for the job.

Hung always puts others before himself. Whether it’s the sacrifices he made serving in the U.S. Navy to always making time for our five children, he does everything he can to make sure our country and our family are taken care of.

He always says what he means, and he’s not afraid to make hard decisions. Hung isn’t afraid to get the job done - even when it means ruffling feathers.

I admire his honesty, his bravery, and his dedication to defending the American Dream for our children.

**T[his race is going to be one of Hung’s toughest battles yet, and he needs your help. Will you endorse Hung right now?>>](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=baef94f34cc745f3a688ed00a7918c3e&_e=gwsEMPpkjOXoS9yrhe2AUgZF6grM6UZ79z1uuloNdyxIN-tVzXQZB13oQmpFfcKiIfnzrOZ-SxIkB20FhEWpBnrOMIf96aIffQSBObGKRImhFeT2JYhjlLNHmag2bd-NOdfKlzga_OZhIOibC_XVZyiNi1mIsy8XnUOavRMZr8W-mQ7AwfBp3OOlDzs60VnKfpwQ4LybaxsRZxeB9xv1Jin-AnhiCKEGs9VMfHKL3Dw7W161IsnSjggLShUCXAptdSaKbsXKM2cA1JBbPaeOzFcXK-tXmHMvM5iaaYFpRBRDbuQ1atCMOYkzCuJ8J-OC426NQyAq4fXOiywsyPCIpejWAVqJnhDhE72qPYIq5z4cSaduG2n7DR6Ya30s07o6VMtJVui2H9oRWPO5y7B31A%3D%3D)**
---
[**ENDROSE HUNG FOR U.S. SENATE**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=baef94f34cc745f3a688ed00a7918c3e&_e=gwsEMPpkjOXoS9yrhe2AUgZF6grM6UZ79z1uuloNdyxIN-tVzXQZB13oQmpFfcKiIfnzrOZ-SxIkB20FhEWpBnrOMIf96aIffQSBObGKRImhFeT2JYhjlLNHmag2bd-NOdfKlzga_OZhIOibC_XVZyiNi1mIsy8XnUOavRMZr8W-mQ7AwfBp3OOlDzs60VnKfpwQ4LybaxsRZxeB9xv1Jin-AnhiCKEGs9VMfHKL3DylfwGMpxch_D-NP6S3iFDg7PXI9McI6H_rkYV2Drite94i49KQ2fIQiUuH1XycKralAmkA0IrgYJHV2oJ5yDAYnTK4lVtZarpWZif7eeYPQoM1buQjMhn-qySlFSUsFS2t1XYNK2czrzqjSRT4IWakhkXDUMqGFm1ILFkg-FEFsA%3D%3D)
---
This isn’t just about politics for Hung, Peter. This is personal.

Hung knows the American Dream is possible - because he’s lived it.

He came to America not knowing a word of English after escaping Communist Vietnam. By the time he graduated high school, he had a spot at the U.S. Naval Academy.

He owes his life to America, and he’s paid it back every way possible.

But just because his career in the Navy is over doesn’t mean he’s done fighting.

Hung isn’t the kind to stand on the sidelines, and when he saw what Joe Biden with the help of Tim Kaine, was doing to our country, he knew he had to take action.

Now, we need you to take action too.

**[Please, show your support and help send my husband Hung to the U.S. Senate to get our great country back on track.](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=baef94f34cc745f3a688ed00a7918c3e&_e=gwsEMPpkjOXoS9yrhe2AUgZF6grM6UZ79z1uuloNdyxIN-tVzXQZB13oQmpFfcKiIfnzrOZ-SxIkB20FhEWpBnrOMIf96aIffQSBObGKRImhFeT2JYhjlLNHmag2bd-NOdfKlzga_OZhIOibC_XVZyiNi1mIsy8XnUOavRMZr8W-mQ7AwfBp3OOlDzs60VnKfpwQ4LybaxsRZxeB9xv1Jin-AnhiCKEGs9VMfHKL3DxNgOuzM0gIalQqf8i76y3tTJQn4ZiOywWMwH5y2GXJzNUoRAitUBVdYvIDra5S_xGy9uTOMCotkdKu--P0fwmZrfUpgBkQyRU8sDJNe6uM6Asap5b92oK0uhD3oCZl6eWPD1FmO7Kx9-B80q9u6soGkzYZ9K1Q_qmbRwf6LhcGvg%3D%3D)**
---
[**ENDROSE HUNG TODAY!**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=baef94f34cc745f3a688ed00a7918c3e&_e=gwsEMPpkjOXoS9yrhe2AUgZF6grM6UZ79z1uuloNdyxIN-tVzXQZB13oQmpFfcKiIfnzrOZ-SxIkB20FhEWpBnrOMIf96aIffQSBObGKRImhFeT2JYhjlLNHmag2bd-NOdfKlzga_OZhIOibC_XVZyiNi1mIsy8XnUOavRMZr8W-mQ7AwfBp3OOlDzs60VnKfpwQ4LybaxsRZxeB9xv1Jin-AnhiCKEGs9VMfHKL3DwhuS-_gMHjEUWlB72bje9oxAD1DHLDtVaHWwAhHArm3BL5PwGXODZK0hTMFzcpu0vB9BhcjaE4aLMOszLqN0yD_uDhgzwR3i1ZgDHf7jajl_S67UmSaqzOgexa_aM15Lue549Za0IBbxSKcMYBE5RkHlpVgcGAufGK49XoU-uqHA%3D%3D)

Thank you,
---
April Cao

subject: Town of Hamden CEASEFIRE resolution tonight at 7pm & PRESIDENTIAL Ballot Access at 8pm.
body:
Attend in person, rally at 6, or virtually at 7PM. | |
---
| | |
## Ceasefire Resolution being discussed by the Town of Hamden TONIGHT - 7PM

### ATTEND RALLY AT 6PM IN ADVANCE IF YOU CAN - CONTACT PATRICIA VENER-SAAVEDRA AT vener@vener-art.com

CLICK BELOW TO SEE THE AGENDA, RSVP LINK, AND TEXT OF THE RESOLUTION:

[https://www.hamden.com/AgendaCenter/ViewFile/Agenda/_02202024-4242](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=cbd214cb21&e=91a3f04de5)

---
|
---
|
---
|
## Would you like a new President?
A GREEN President?
We need to circulate our Ballot Access Petition and gather 7,500 signatures - we're going to get it done, with YOUR help.

Please come to our President's Day Petition Circulator meeting TONIGHT at 8PM to learn how YOU can help!

### Join By Zoom:
Topic: President's Day - Green Party Petition Circulator's Meeting 8PM Mon 19th
Time: Feb 19, 2024 08:00 PM Eastern Time (US and Canada)

Join Zoom Meeting
https://us02web.zoom.us/j/82630796872?pwd=c1UxVnZHVkp0ejN1YlVpMmMzUUxlUT09

Meeting ID: 826 3079 6872
Passcode: 576176
---
|
---
| Our Chapter Leadership has been very busy this year, organizing the State Party for our petition drive and our Presidential Primary. We apologize for the lack of communication and meetings to date this year. Please stay tuned - we will get back to regular meetings soon!
---
|
---
|
## **We are the Party of People, Planet, and Peace!**
---
|
#### The need for an independent left party is clear. We are an ecosocialist peace party who fight for social, economic, electoral, and environmental justice. Come to our meetings and events to meet us and get involved!
---
| _The Greater New Haven Green Party_ is a chapter
of the Green Party of Connecticut!
Find our chapter Bylaws [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=967038e27b&e=91a3f04de5).
Read minutes of our past meetings [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=78995b5f3b&e=91a3f04de5).
Follow us on Facebook [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=1b66f85c81&e=91a3f04de5).

_**BREAKING: Experts warn that mail delivery will continue to suffer as long as Trump's appointee, Louis DeJoy, heads the USPS.**_
Imagine a world where seniors don't receive their Social Security checks in time, where people can't get their vote-by-mail ballots promptly, or even life saving medication. **That's the grim reality we face if Louis DeJoy remains in charge.** It's clear: Donald Trump's plan to dismantle the USPS is in motion, and DeJoy is his tool for chaos.
We're rallying PA to show their support for the USPS.
_**[Please take a moment to rate your local post office: do you believe they're doing a good job?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79325142/456129763/1539410391?contactdata=en3W24hhp93Uf9Lzq0sO/Ci2XA8SZSOqIllcy2M89mfrUJwbDPLxTHiutLlVy/n1KrqS6ZXi3BJQZdGklL1O4Wqer0lpILT/v+OrzffX+r7M6/8pA3HSfta/ALutqK+5JTPRXUzeIdE9Zg2bWURYbZrE4aFIpZoYujktz7OpPEE=&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240219_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzYjdiNjM3LTZmY2YtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=klw7E-OJ3TZlCkh1YxjUwoJLpGh8a-ofyOI-HIQX_0A=&emci=2ab7b637-6fcf-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=33b7b637-6fcf-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24268976)**_

body:
Can you imagine what would be in store if they won again next year?

| |

---
| | | As I always do, let me give it to you straight:

The Democrats JUST squeaked ahead in the polls and activated their army of Liberal megadonors to grow their lead even further. _**[Unfortunately, I'm left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jAq2rcSlWOKYQh5cKq3YIw~~/AARclAA~-qnUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Unfortunately, I’m left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.")**_

Look,

The Democrats are working from dawn 'til dusk to force-feed Liberal propaganda in our classrooms, trash the reputations of Conservative Supreme Court justices, re-up mask mandates, leave the border wide open, and woke-ify our military - that's enough to drive folks like you and me up a wall...

**But their Limousine Liberal buddies eat it up. And the huge checks roll in one after another. **

They'd love nothing more than to see the downfall of our House Majority. They know Conservatives would be powerless to stop them if they take full control of Congress.

_I know Mike Johnson reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Newt Gingrich reached out...
I know Byron Donalds reached out...
And I know James Comer reached out..._

But now I'm reaching out ONE LAST TIME because the latest reports show the Radical Democrats with a devastating $8 million lead on us.

_**[If we don't get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. That's why I'm asking you to dig deep and kick in just a few bucks to save our House Majority and take back this country of ours.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jAq2rcSlWOKYQh5cKq3YIw~~/AARclAA~-qnUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "If we don’t get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. Let me put it plainly:

**WITH YOUR HELP:** We have a direct path to sweeping the next elections.

**WITHOUT YOUR HELP:** We might as well enjoy our House Majority while it lasts... because the Democrats will crush us in no time.

_**[So can we count on you? This is really, REALLY important.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jAq2rcSlWOKYQh5cKq3YIw~~/AARclAA~-qnUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "So can we count on you? This is really, REALLY important. ")**_

name: Mayra Flores
subject: I don’t usually swear like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Mayra JFC
body:
The next few hours decide everything

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkbGOnDAQhp_GdCB7DF67oDgF0V2UIlJKa7BnOWuxQcbsXt4-Aum6FEk93z__p5lf7_YdwxLS_B0j9Q-Xbd5tedqIvzPa_UWYLXBoaw61MFZUvvfGKVQV9eLGtdSghKg-eiTh70ITOO0ngx2gk964O0xOSw73KvTnHg7CgGi7FhqN3ulJ38gYkOQ5azkulEvzINrcmuZM-55pO6YlOEyNW2O19B-lbDuTbwxGBuNO7sjUvELK5E-CwVgIY335Mxgv94yOTl6O-eRzSDOTQ8kHMVAY1yMVJgfJGaijROswbhjmxOTwpWx_vNXDz2_QCCE7c7NFtJ3gnaglbyUDRZ-2BP8fgatnTYWu6vKsHy5D_ZVmoD6P9PzLpMq9315hWcKubqzlc8SwXKcp__C9PwEAAP__eZiWdw)

---
Friend,

I don't usually swear this much.

But I swear I won't shame you or question your party loyalty. I swear I won't exploit you with made up fundraising goals. I swear I won't badger you with these messages if you ask them to stop.

But this message is truly heartfelt & I swear it is worth reading.
My name is Mayra Flores. I'm the America First candidate in TX-34.

A seat that has been a Democrat stronghold for over 100 years until we flipped it red in a stunning upset against Biden & Pelosi in the June special election last year. And it was with your help last summer that I became the first Mexican-born Congresswoman in U.S. history.

But then Biden & the Democrats spent millions to erase our victory & they narrowly flipped it back to blue in the November general election.

But as a product of the American Dream & proud conservative, I don't surrender to anyone- especially the radical left who are hellbent on destroying everything that makes America great.

[**STAND WITH MAYRA FLORES**](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkbGOnDAQhp_GdCB7DF67oDgF0V2UIlJKa7BnOWuxQcbsXt4-Aum6FEk93z__p5lf7_YdwxLS_B0j9Q-Xbd5tedqIvzPa_UWYLXBoaw61MFZUvvfGKVQV9eLGtdSghKg-eiTh70ITOO0ngx2gk964O0xOSw73KvTnHg7CgGi7FhqN3ulJ38gYkOQ5azkulEvzINrcmuZM-55pO6YlOEyNW2O19B-lbDuTbwxGBuNO7sjUvELK5E-CwVgIY335Mxgv94yOTl6O-eRzSDOTQ8kHMVAY1yMVJgfJGaijROswbhjmxOTwpWx_vNXDz2_QCCE7c7NFtJ3gnaglbyUDRZ-2BP8fgatnTYWu6vKsHy5D_ZVmoD6P9PzLpMq9315hWcKubqzlc8SwXKcp__C9PwEAAP__eZiWdw)
---

Election Day is almost here and this is the closest race in America right now.

This race is so close that all Joe Biden needs to do is make a phone call to one of his billionaire friends and that would be the end of it all.

Unfortunately, I don't have those kinds of connections.

And given the rate at which the Democrats raise money, this race will be won or lost in the next few hours. This is our first & last chance at mounting this historic comeback & retaking the most important seat in America.

[**STAND WITH MAYRA FLORES**](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkbGOnDAQhp_GdCB7DF67oDgF0V2UIlJKa7BnOWuxQcbsXt4-Aum6FEk93z__p5lf7_YdwxLS_B0j9Q-Xbd5tedqIvzPa_UWYLXBoaw61MFZUvvfGKVQV9eLGtdSghKg-eiTh70ITOO0ngx2gk964O0xOSw73KvTnHg7CgGi7FhqN3ulJ38gYkOQ5azkulEvzINrcmuZM-55pO6YlOEyNW2O19B-lbDuTbwxGBuNO7sjUvELK5E-CwVgIY335Mxgv94yOTl6O-eRzSDOTQ8kHMVAY1yMVJgfJGaijROswbhjmxOTwpWx_vNXDz2_QCCE7c7NFtJ3gnaglbyUDRZ-2BP8fgatnTYWu6vKsHy5D_ZVmoD6P9PzLpMq9315hWcKubqzlc8SwXKcp__C9PwEAAP__eZiWdw)
---

_**[So please, if there is any amount you can spare for my campaign today, it would truly mean the world to me if you chipped in.](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkbGOnDAQhp_GdCB7DF67oDgF0V2UIlJKa7BnOWuxQcbsXt4-Aum6FEk93z__p5lf7_YdwxLS_B0j9Q-Xbd5tedqIvzPa_UWYLXBoaw61MFZUvvfGKVQV9eLGtdSghKg-eiTh70ITOO0ngx2gk964O0xOSw73KvTnHg7CgGi7FhqN3ulJ38gYkOQ5azkulEvzINrcmuZM-55pO6YlOEyNW2O19B-lbDuTbwxGBuNO7sjUvELK5E-CwVgIY335Mxgv94yOTl6O-eRzSDOTQ8kHMVAY1yMVJgfJGaijROswbhjmxOTwpWx_vNXDz2_QCCE7c7NFtJ3gnaglbyUDRZ-2BP8fgatnTYWu6vKsHy5D_ZVmoD6P9PzLpMq9315hWcKubqzlc8SwXKcp__C9PwEAAP__eZiWdw "So please, if there is any amount you can spare for my campaign today, it would truly mean the world to me if you chipped in.")**_

Thank you,
Mayra
[](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkbGOnDAQhp_GdCB7DF67oDgF0V2UIlJKa7BnOWuxQcbsXt4-Aum6FEk93z__p5lf7_YdwxLS_B0j9Q-Xbd5tedqIvzPa_UWYLXBoaw61MFZUvvfGKVQV9eLGtdSghKg-eiTh70ITOO0ngx2gk964O0xOSw73KvTnHg7CgGi7FhqN3ulJ38gYkOQ5azkulEvzINrcmuZM-55pO6YlOEyNW2O19B-lbDuTbwxGBuNO7sjUvELK5E-CwVgIY335Mxgv94yOTl6O-eRzSDOTQ8kHMVAY1yMVJgfJGaijROswbhjmxOTwpWx_vNXDz2_QCCE7c7NFtJ3gnaglbyUDRZ-2BP8fgatnTYWu6vKsHy5D_ZVmoD6P9PzLpMq9315hWcKubqzlc8SwXKcp__C9PwEAAP__eZiWdw)

subject: I never thought I’d write this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:

| | **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fa871240da5c4235a27e78054149a23d&_e=9GxuDXqxYP2yPXS3-4T2o3QCuXeX2Z2-3Rze9Sfwb-rcyC4XDNLcmuXH3e7MtjthqUDdmDvDdbx3wXJ7ZT_wlMvhigluiaWBBE8--KC4-Ey-db2N0lzsDFUuQBlsYEpXKS7qVGL3NXgWKrhgAUHtOlh2TSBhk7EEP1O1UC1lkzBbFGvZTfu9lqvh_GFTEtX63Rtz-DJg-O_A8Y8MIxeVZeO_Ga7hAw_IBqHl_KUX13ud40FAELJ5h0VjOjr5Qs1e7lmPEW7500wGTYpUXLoK2V7jNm9Uszo1qD6vJabBl7ed7PPS_lGOMnbE0PvYM9nJQDqPX25QsoIdui-VXjqXaUi63GLOX8tlPPASWGwnBxSEqcy2_KHz3zVWL1DBwEzl78ldgXUP8FbzJSESvAqmLA%3D%3D)** Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. **We Republicans pulled our country out of the 1970 's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. **[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $15 or more today?**](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fa871240da5c4235a27e78054149a23d&_e=9GxuDXqxYP2yPXS3-4T2o3QCuXeX2Z2-3Rze9Sfwb-rcyC4XDNLcmuXH3e7MtjthqUDdmDvDdbx3wXJ7ZT_wlMvhigluiaWBBE8--KC4-Ey-db2N0lzsDFUuQBlsYEpXKS7qVGL3NXgWKrhgAUHtOlh2TSBhk7EEP1O1UC1lkzBbFGvZTfu9lqvh_GFTEtX63Rtz-DJg-O_A8Y8MIxeVZeO_Ga7hAw_IBqHl_KUX13tksKKg3HtCtDP5AlMmefJDwvhYXwnHVDHtqezsd7y9t3vKcAqrP-EUy5Iva34VutcucL0eV_PQQGyZCe0LzSfgOkLAJMmMkM3J9M0N_PC9_iTtaGt-HuB4tj6gv3IICLbsZ7X5dfryvX8g21rEGoxN7zT7B7uGxobqIiBFTWshxQ%3D%3D)** The California primary is coming up in fast on March 5th and I need to have as many conservative Republican's like you on my side as possible. In California's primary the top two vote-getters make it to the general election. And right now the polls show Adam Schiff polling at #1 and I'm hot on his heels at #2. Once we're passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him in November. Why? First... I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a **Republican win**. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... **...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,

| Good afternoon, I am thrilled to share some incredible news with you today. Gabe Evans, our conservative champion running for Congress in Colorado's 8th Congressional District, has just received a **major endorsement from Americans for Prosperity Action!** This endorsement from Americans for Prosperity Action is a significant win for Gabe and a testament to the massive momentum behind his campaign. It demonstrates that Gabe's message of fiscal responsibility, economic freedom, and limited government is resonating with voters and conservative organizations alike. **Why Americans for Prosperity Action Endorsed Gabe Evans:** Americans for Prosperity Action recognizes Gabe's commitment to advancing policies that promote prosperity and opportunity for all Americans. As a combat veteran, former police lieutenant, and conservative state representative, Gabe has a proven track record of fighting for our values and delivering results for our community. Join Americans for Prosperity Action in supporting Gabe Evans for Congress! Your support is critical to ensuring that we have a strong conservative voice representing us in Washington, DC.
1. **Spread the Word:** Share this email with friends, family, and fellow conservatives to let them know about Gabe's endorsement from Americans for Prosperity Action and encourage them to join us in supporting his campaign.
2. **Donate Today:** Contribute to Gabe's campaign to help us build on this momentum and secure victory in 2024. Every dollar makes a difference! Visit [www.ElectGabeEvans.com](https://wayrap.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjYwMjExMCxcImxcIjoxMTM2NDQwNDUzODM3NjMxMTMsXCJyXCI6MTEzNjQ0MDQ2MjE2MzMzMjM5fSIsInMiOiIzNWM2Yjk2ZTU5MjczMzRmIn0) to make a donation.
3. **Get Involved:** Volunteer for our campaign and join us as we work to spread Gabe's message across the district. Your support as a volunteer is invaluable.

name: Old Growth Logging Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Urge President Biden to mark this day with a legacy action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

America’s precious remaining old-growth forests are being logged — and
President Biden can save them with the stroke of a pen.

These ancient woodlands are not just trees — they’re irreplaceable
ecosystems, home to countless endangered species. Old-growth trees absorb
and store huge amounts of carbon — also making them exponentially
important in the fight against climate change.

The destruction of old-growth forests is another tragic case of corporate
profits trumping environmental protections. It’s another instance of
corporate lobbyists capturing government policy to boost CEO bonuses and
shareholder value at the expense of the rest of us.

President Biden has the sole power to protect these forests and, on
President’s Day, it’s time he makes a legacy action by signing an
executive order with ironclad protections for old-growth trees.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14908?source=email-20240219&t=1011&akid=5353%2E5885482%2EQHOXYD ]Add your name: Urge President Biden to use his power to protect vitally
important old-growth forests.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14908?source=email-20240219&t=1012&akid=5353%2E5885482%2EQHOXYD ]ADD YOUR NAME

The redwoods of California, the Tongass National Forest in Alaska,
Chattahoochee National Forest in South Carolina and Georgia, and the
mountainous Adirondack forests in New York are all examples of beautiful,
irreplaceable old-growth forests.

The destruction of old-growth forests is not just an environmental issue.
Indigenous communities have centuries-old connections to many old-growth
forests and are reliant on sustainable use of its resources for
traditional practices.

The sad fact is, 95% of old-growth forests have already been destroyed by
the logging industry. It makes it even more important that President Biden
leaves no room for corporations to continue this destruction.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14908?source=email-20240219&t=1013&akid=5353%2E5885482%2EQHOXYD ]Sign your name now to urge President Biden to issue an executive order
to protect these forests. Let’s protect and preserve these natural
treasures before it's too late.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5353%2E5885482%2EQHOXYD ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5353%2E5885482%2EQHOXYD ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5353%2E5885482%2EQHOXYD ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5353%2E5885482%2EQHOXYD ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5353%2E5885482%2EQHOXYD ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=5353%2E5885482%2EQHOXYD ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-20240219.XRZpdm&t=1007&akid=5353%2E5885482%2EQHOXYD ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20240219.stQFOE&t=1008&akid=5353%2E5885482%2EQHOXYD ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-20240219.NcAe39&t=1009&akid=5353%2E5885482%2EQHOXYD ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-20240219.cIVkdT&t=1010&akid=5353%2E5885482%2EQHOXYD ]GIVE ONCE

body:
Don’t wait| | | Peter, The number of times Joe Biden and Senate Democrats have turned their backs on the American people is almost too many to count.
* **[They’ve created an UNPRECEDENTED illegal immigration crisis](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0b46174d47d244dd99914844e386b3d1&_e=eSQ3cmVSWkKr-S-Se7EytRqOVk-rtshEXz8JcK2TsrRSDXvq956wms40qNfs2mpsvsF6Czpv4V7yn4BR99etFEL9emdQbqzR1psr-xMZJ5HiCB8D7F3-92NSUAqmkerp4wlAjVherxiEQGoPn2Z5_Yg1CnKTC9xESMQBhvUdYcRAUhwUL7xxoYBrGubMlIt62XYkuUsKM-RqlqcOZ3BteSa6te_pM-_Tge-O5Q-StjX1Fu_K4KJDrGBWAatnv1Oqr7azBhtRaVO6bXnPeJXPzkxiw-k1IVMPNstZbbYmgkMfoq5xIlPquFm0WEt6YDvmginMD6VYRFFtpbSzR5DA1MAWGJLYSdOz5y7xjxAnPB20PM5lLDD1OAoI0xElkoWn5fBcrRje_zeHf5DtkEjwLineDJicoW9rSH2ISO4F4hFHZPpQUw0T6sSEdnzrGdoY3ridUQxnsLZR-i6UHI9vetcVQY8K37g6aHQh0OBjs1c%3D) **

* **[They’ve ROLLED BACK President Trump’s tough-on-China policies and SURRENDERED to the Chinese Communist Party](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0b46174d47d244dd99914844e386b3d1&_e=eSQ3cmVSWkKr-S-Se7EytRqOVk-rtshEXz8JcK2TsrRSDXvq956wms40qNfs2mpsvsF6Czpv4V7yn4BR99etFEL9emdQbqzR1psr-xMZJ5HiCB8D7F3-92NSUAqmkerp4wlAjVherxiEQGoPn2Z5_Yg1CnKTC9xESMQBhvUdYcRAUhwUL7xxoYBrGubMlIt62XYkuUsKM-RqlqcOZ3BteSa6te_pM-_Tge-O5Q-StjX1Fu_K4KJDrGBWAatnv1Oqr7azBhtRaVO6bXnPeJXPzkxiw-k1IVMPNstZbbYmgkMfoq5xIlPquFm0WEt6YDvmPzO76hdKAW_CaTKsdJisk3G_QIK7bu3WQ2IARrbBRGjOROosv84HuKEKuA7UDeAkEnWgPclF35ed5bwOO2Thcvr-G89O6VhdzL7tYjTLKKsu0t7V1RnMkhwtSx3ykBgej_pMrF_vWjQQzX4L63To1oMGmNSva3uoApU189-_v5c%3D)**

* **[And they’ve SKYROCKETED the national debt through frivolous government spending](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0b46174d47d244dd99914844e386b3d1&_e=eSQ3cmVSWkKr-S-Se7EytRqOVk-rtshEXz8JcK2TsrRSDXvq956wms40qNfs2mpsvsF6Czpv4V7yn4BR99etFEL9emdQbqzR1psr-xMZJ5HiCB8D7F3-92NSUAqmkerp4wlAjVherxiEQGoPn2Z5_Yg1CnKTC9xESMQBhvUdYcRAUhwUL7xxoYBrGubMlIt62XYkuUsKM-RqlqcOZ3BteSa6te_pM-_Tge-O5Q-StjX1Fu_K4KJDrGBWAatnv1Oqr7azBhtRaVO6bXnPeJXPzkxiw-k1IVMPNstZbbYmgkMfoq5xIlPquFm0WEt6YDvmWPZwNvCg4JM845jFbzZtfyeiRY-ooVAkZcKbp5NJoZSt678jHt5O0NZwapwTQBPksrDBZH2_9gEtif5YXJ2u069nAAEr2CVKPuJgPjcQDThbJrC8CB08azP7FxZGxotzjNK7Yxw9wZOCIpqYqjL9S-ZfyjM7eA8fEp9CZsUAmMI%3D)**

name: John Padora
subject: Celebrating Presidents Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
I wanted to reach out today to wish you a happy Presidents Day! Today, we get to honor the leaders who have shaped our country, and I’m reminded of the incredible impact that each one of you has had on this campaign.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=a6ab398ce53c4ba0aa34684a79057517&_e=Venn_M2Mw8yQ6jELI0lp7jENt689Dk9dByjvGM4opX0Rc3W37kjWRS28SooYSULPhmhpNrTqyhIXhFK0eMOOBew59MRIXNhiFnydWooFgmY9SIfJPd3s3e9I1xB0DzRMYTr6hBeQoqtnUdde4IDYRDlIJpRQ7BywziwC-D3j-f9u0D7zh9GszRQBvM3JhXemECGvWeZdqc_pHBkrcIJWlg%3D%3D) Folks, I wanted to reach out today to wish you a happy Presidents Day! Today, we get to honor the leaders who have shaped our country, and I’m reminded of the incredible impact that each one of you has had on this campaign. Now, I hope that most of you have the day off, BUT this is more than just a day off; **it's an opportunity to reflect on the values that make America exceptional and the ongoing work we do to uphold the principles that our founders fought and died for.** Though they were not perfect, the America they promised was an idea – an idea that we could always strive to be better because we had the freedom to do so. We have the freedom to elect our leaders, the freedom to speak our minds, and the freedom to change things as we see fit. Today, we’re fighting for women’s fundamental rights, the conservation of our environment, and the protection of our democratic system. We’ve got a lot to fight for this November, but I want to thank you for being an integral part of this journey. Your support fuels my team’s efforts, and I am grateful for your unwavering commitment. All the best, John Padora Paid for by Padora for Colorado

clean_body: I wanted to reach out today to wish you a happy Presidents Day! Today, we get to honor the leaders who have shaped our country, and I’m reminded of the incredible impact that each one of you has had on this campaign. | | | Folks, I wanted to reach out today to wish you a happy Presidents Day! Today, we get to honor the leaders who have shaped our country, and I’m reminded of the incredible impact that each one of you has had on this campaign. Now, I hope that most of you have the day off, BUT this is more than just a day off; it's an opportunity to reflect on the values that make America exceptional and the ongoing work we do to uphold the principles that our founders fought and died for. Though they were not perfect, the America they promised was an idea – an idea that we could always strive to be better because we had the freedom to do so. We have the freedom to elect our leaders, the freedom to speak our minds, and the freedom to change things as we see fit. Today, we’re fighting for women’s fundamental rights, the conservation of our environment, and the protection of our democratic system. We’ve got a lot to fight for this November, but I want to thank you for being an integral part of this journey. Your support fuels my team’s efforts, and I am grateful for your unwavering commitment. All the best, John Padora Paid for by Padora for Colorado

| | Last night, Andy demonstrated why he has a double-digit lead in the latest public poll with an overwhelming victory over First Lady Tammy Murphy in the first debate of this primary. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79325729/456131646/-1197072038?refcode=2024-02-19-debate&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8f9f3eb8-72cf-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjlmM2ViOC03MmNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_IXN_hfIweZikAEmddeCFxFOG_mCFUiaWzSRJscJsY=) In case you missed it, here's a quick recap of what happened last night:
* **Tammy Murphy, when questioned about being a registered Republican until 2014, said the Republican Party left her behind.** She donated to George W. Bush. She voted in primaries to select a nominee to run against Barack Obama and Joe Biden. But she couldn’t explain to voters why she was a Republican voter and donor for the first three decades of her adult life. To be clear: she was a Republican three times longer than she’s been a Democrat.

* **Tammy Murphy refuses to call for an end to “the line.” We can get rid of the county line right now. No waiting needed.** Andy knows this and is fighting to give voters the fair and democratic ballot they deserve. Tammy Murphy said she was for a fair ballot, and she needs to uphold this promise.

* **It took Tammy Murphy just a few weeks into her campaign to take thousands from corporate PACs.** Andy Kim has not taken a dime of corporate PAC money in his 5+ years in Congress. Only one candidate here is willing to do what it takes to take on big money in our politics.

There is a path forward to restore integrity in our politics. We have the vision, the momentum, and we're ready to win this for New Jersey. **Andy's just a Jersey kid ready to keep serving the state he loves.** Our grassroots movement is building a new kind of politics built around integrity and service. This race is about restoring integrity. It's about trust. It's about public service. But that’s put at risk when we have a Senator who is indicted on corruption, and now we're seeing the same broken politics that protected the Senator for so many years now trying to put its thumb on the scale of our elections, including this Senate race. [**Today, we're asking you to support Andy's campaign for change in New Jersey by chipping in today. name: BLUE HOUSE 2024 (protectvoting.org)
subject: you’ve been invited to sign our letter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This is the BEST news we’ve seen in months
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62283?t=6&akid=13023%2E878179%2EW0sny1) Friend, after Democrat Tom Suozzi DESTROYED his MAGA opponent in the race to replace George Santos, we’re closer than ever to flipping the House **BLUE!**

Due to this OUTSTANDING news, we’re sending a massive letter to show House Democrats just how proud we are of our incredible momentum!

**Your signature spot closes at midnight:[**Don’t miss your chance to sign the thank you letter! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62283?t=7&akid=13023%2E878179%2EW0sny1)** | [Donate $3 to add your name »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62283?t=8&akid=13023%2E878179%2EW0sny1)
---
TO: House Democratic Caucus
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear House Democrats,

_You make me so proud to be a Democrat!_**

While House Republicans tear each other apart and degrade our democracy, your caucus has been fighting for the American people since Day One.

**With last week’s HUGE win to replace George Santos, we’re just _4 seats_ away from retaking the majority and passing your amazing agenda.**

I know the GOP is going to use every dark money dollar in their warchest to fight back, so I’m fired up and ready to help Democrats keep our momentum!

[**That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to help Democrats flip the last 4 seats we need to end the MAGA mob’s reign »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62283?t=9&akid=13023%2E878179%2EW0sny1) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62283?t=10&akid=13023%2E878179%2EW0sny1)
---
**_X A GRATEFUL DEMOCRAT_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13023%2E878179%2EW0sny1). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13023%2E878179%2EW0sny1).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13023%2E878179%2EW0sny1) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=13023%2E878179%2EW0sny1). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=13023%2E878179%2EW0sny1)
---
