name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Molinaro?=
subject: February Update from Rep. Marc Molinaro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US Inc
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/124d8aa43e0e/molinaro-meets-with-schoharie-locals-on-inflation-law-enforcement-9422559?e=a39a20e5dd)
---
| |
---
|
---
| This past month has been a busy one. I continue to take on the issues that matter most to you - working to secure the border, fighting to lower costs and more.

I also am humbled by the support I've received so far for the upcoming election. Including endorsements from:
\- Broome County GOP Chair, Benji Federman
\- Tioga County GOP Chair, Donald Castellucci
\- Conservative Party of Ulster County
\- Cortland County Republican Committee

I look forward to working with them as we fight to deliver results for Upstate NY.

[_Wondering how you can help? Chip in $5, $10, or $15 to my campaign today. Every dollar matters._](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=5b71cabd97&e=a39a20e5dd)
---
|
---
|
---
Nearly 80% of individuals with intellectual, developmental, and physical disabilities are unemployed. This is simply unacceptable.

It was my honor to invite Iva Walsh to speak with the House Small Business Subcommittee on Entrepreneurship and Workforce Development. She is leading by example with the model she has created at Maeve's Place.

During her testimony, she said our society benefits when people with intellectual and developmental disabilities have access to employment. I could not agree more. When we #ThinkDIFFERENTLY, we open up doors for success for all.

- [Phoenicia coffee shop owner testifies before congressional panel to advocate for hiring people with intellectual disabilities](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=0da122b1b5&e=a39a20e5dd)
|
---
|
---
Early investments in our children's education has huge impacts on their opportunities for success.

I was proud to announce that Delaware Opportunities Inc. will receive over $1 million to provide these vital services to children from low-income families.

Additionally, when Head Start in Sullivan County abruptly closed without warning, my team and I began working immediately to help the County find a backup facility and see how this happened to a fully funded program so that it doesn't happen again.

- [Molinaro announces Head Start funding for Delaware](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=506878bb01&e=a39a20e5dd)
- [Head Start abruptly closes its doors](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=d49e5f88af&e=a39a20e5dd)
|
---
Too many of our farmers are dealing with inefficient and outdated pumping systems.

The LEAPS Act gives them the support they need to make changes and invests in great companies like National Pipe & Plastics in Endicott to help lead the way in innovative solutions.

- [Molinaro’s legislation to cut down farmers’ energy costs](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=6fd91a1886&e=a39a20e5dd)
- [Rep. Molinaro tours National Pipe & Plastics, pushes for passage of LEAPS Act](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=38748096a8&e=a39a20e5dd)
|
---
Reliable and affordable internet is essential for American families. It is critical for our economy, education, healthcare and so much more.

I introduced bipartisan legislation to extend the Affordable Connectivity Program, ensuring that millions of Americans don't lose their access.

-[ Lawmakers looking to extend federal internet aid](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=f274a03208&e=a39a20e5dd)
- [County officials, members of Congress team up to support extension of Affordable Connectivity Program](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=67a67f2bd5&e=a39a20e5dd)
|
---
|
---
The attack ads are already written. The DC elites are going to try and smear me, make outlandish claims, and spend millions to try and buy this seat for one of their own.

But what they say isn't what's important. It's what you and the people - on both sides of the aisle - of Upstate NY say. I'm working for you, and their lies and attacks won't stop me from my ongoing efforts to listen, learn and lead. To give you a functioning government that helps when it can and gets out of the way when it needs to.

-[ Control of the House Could Come Down to This New York Republican](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=e75174f63d&e=a39a20e5dd)
| | **Support Marc's Reelection Campaign**
Every dollar can make a difference.
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=ebb91b5f8c&e=a39a20e5dd "DONATE TODAY")

name: Jacky Rosen (via Mazie Hirono)
subject: Let me introduce myself
body:
the values of hard work, determination, and persistence |
#
Peter — Mazie asked me to reach out. I'm running for reelection in Nevada, and right now, I need your help. But first, let me share a little bit about myself. I'm the proud granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. Growing up, my family always taught me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence. It's these values that have guided me on every step of my journey – from becoming the first in my family to graduate from college to defying the odds and unseating a Republican Senate incumbent in 2018. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79325908/456132459/615972423?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWU0OWU0Zi03NGNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oC_IuVABjzW1LmCHblXyg7cqNQqMA4FOTUlI2GedLRk=) My path to Congress has been anything but traditional, and I wouldn't trade it for the world. I'm all in to keep delivering real progress to working families in Nevada and across the country – but there's a problem: **With experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, the GOP is doing everything it can to defeat me. I need to raise $100,000 before Friday to fight back and win – but unfortunately, I'm falling short.** [**That's why I'm personally asking, Peter: Will you split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and Mazie to help me close this gap, keep Nevada blue, and defend Democrats' crucial Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79325909/456132487/615972423?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWU0OWU0Zi03NGNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oC_IuVABjzW1LmCHblXyg7cqNQqMA4FOTUlI2GedLRk=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mazie Hirono and Jacky Rosen will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[SPLIT $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79325910/456132488/615972423?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWU0OWU0Zi03NGNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oC_IuVABjzW1LmCHblXyg7cqNQqMA4FOTUlI2GedLRk=)******

| | Early voting in the Georgia presidential primary started TODAY.

**_Here's the bottom line: we need your help to reach every single Georgia Democrat right now, ensuring they turn out to vote in this primary. Every vote matters, and time is of the essence._**

Every voter who comes out to vote in this primary is _**exponentially more likely to vote in November**_. That’s why we need to engage every Georgia voter NOW.

**_In 2020, Georgia saved American democracy by electing President Biden by a margin of just 0.23% of the votes cast. Every voter we reach in the next two weeks could make the difference in November!_**

**[_Early voting will be over before you know it, so every minute counts. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: “The Founding Fathers… warned against single-party impeachments.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-feb2024-fr-february?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-feb2024-fr-february?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Friend, over four years ago when our Congress voted to impeach Donald Trump, Mike Johnson had quite a lot to say about how the process was handled:

"The Founding Fathers, the founders of this country, warned against single-party impeachments. And they had a very specific reason for warning us against that."

But just last week, Speaker Johnson dropped the act to hold a total party-line impeachment vote to oust Secretary Mayorkas — but only after twice-impeached Trump told him to do it.

I don’t know about you, but I’m pretty sure George Washington didn’t predict our democracy would get wholly derailed by an overgrown toddler who wants to play “President,” when he envisioned America’s future.

He believed in the power of the people , and keeping our democracy out of the hands of authoritarian dictators like Donald.

This Presidents’ Day, we must fight like our Founding Fathers to keep tyrannical leaders like Trump — and those who enable them — out of power for good. Friend, can you rush a contribution of any amount so we can reject the MAGA madness for good this November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Feb2024-FR-February?&refcode=E7075-20240219-PresidentsDay-SL-Other&amount=25]

name: Joe Teirab -- Conservative Marine
subject: I hugged my parents for the last time.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOE TEIRAB FOR CONGRESS
body:
I was ready to sacrifice my life for my country.

| |
---
| | | I was on my way to a warzone.

Before I deployed, I looked back at this last picture taken on the day I became a Marine: my father - an immigrant from Sudan, and my mother - the daughter of a POW in WWII. **Then I hugged my parents for the last time.**

_Or so I thought._

---
| [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkbFu3TAMRb9G3mRIlC07g4cAgbcURRGgo0BLfLIKW36Q6Jd8fuGg2Tq0M3nPPSB_vrpXTFvK8RvuNHFhV6rjh2NKBRe5njFScKCgkwqkfnK6CVM3QDC2oUkPajRjD71u1gnR4oiL6XsN9rZ4NGZQZlB6XHwYqWvSdHEU6CcAo4xuEcYlgIXF38DehiA6hRsVri2vVOh-LlvymJlwb_2xN9u0Mt-rMM8CZgFzJX8Wat9TLhSuDQHzr4PkH_nbUaQ_cixUq4B5STFSZbkeZyVZ0NNFMXO5KCXlKMwLl5ME2JN353G_Y4pZmJcvbff9Wb79eINWazOAdqy7Xis1SKM6K8DSh-MU_iPw2XNkpsxX-UNyYZBfaQH248yPv0yaMoX7e9q2VO0gOhV3TNvnififfvg7AAD__wT4mpI)
---

Hi - I'm Joe Teirab and luckily, God spared my life and I made it back home. But service for your country doesn't just fade away when you hang up your uniform for the last time...

Now God is calling me to serve in a different way:

**[I'm running for Congress because the values you and I hold dear are facing extinction.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkbFu3TAMRb9G3mRIlC07g4cAgbcURRGgo0BLfLIKW36Q6Jd8fuGg2Tq0M3nPPSB_vrpXTFvK8RvuNHFhV6rjh2NKBRe5njFScKCgkwqkfnK6CVM3QDC2oUkPajRjD71u1gnR4oiL6XsN9rZ4NGZQZlB6XHwYqWvSdHEU6CcAo4xuEcYlgIXF38DehiA6hRsVri2vVOh-LlvymJlwb_2xN9u0Mt-rMM8CZgFzJX8Wat9TLhSuDQHzr4PkH_nbUaQ_cixUq4B5STFSZbkeZyVZ0NNFMXO5KCXlKMwLl5ME2JN353G_Y4pZmJcvbff9Wb79eINWazOAdqy7Xis1SKM6K8DSh-MU_iPw2XNkpsxX-UNyYZBfaQH248yPv0yaMoX7e9q2VO0gOhV3TNvnififfvg7AAD__wT4mpI "I’m running for Congress because the values you and I hold dear are facing extinction.")**

Unfortunately, my opponent not only doesn't believe in those values - she rejects them. And she's a powerful sitting Democrat with the entire Liberal Machine watching her flank.

I know I can defeat her but I'll be honest with you:

**My campaign is the underdog in this race. My opponent has Joe Biden 's ear and if I can't rally a last-minute defense, they'll wipe the floor with me. So my campaign is in your hands.**

Would you be willing to pitch in just a few bucks to push me over the top?

---
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkbFu3TAMRb9G3mRIlC07g4cAgbcURRGgo0BLfLIKW36Q6Jd8fuGg2Tq0M3nPPSB_vrpXTFvK8RvuNHFhV6rjh2NKBRe5njFScKCgkwqkfnK6CVM3QDC2oUkPajRjD71u1gnR4oiL6XsN9rZ4NGZQZlB6XHwYqWvSdHEU6CcAo4xuEcYlgIXF38DehiA6hRsVri2vVOh-LlvymJlwb_2xN9u0Mt-rMM8CZgFzJX8Wat9TLhSuDQHzr4PkH_nbUaQ_cixUq4B5STFSZbkeZyVZ0NNFMXO5KCXlKMwLl5ME2JN353G_Y4pZmJcvbff9Wb79eINWazOAdqy7Xis1SKM6K8DSh-MU_iPw2XNkpsxX-UNyYZBfaQH248yPv0yaMoX7e9q2VO0gOhV3TNvnififfvg7AAD__wT4mpI "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

I set a goal of raising $350 from this email.

**[I'm only sending this to a small group so if everyone can add just $5 or $10, that's all we need!](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkbFu3TAMRb9G3mRIlC07g4cAgbcURRGgo0BLfLIKW36Q6Jd8fuGg2Tq0M3nPPSB_vrpXTFvK8RvuNHFhV6rjh2NKBRe5njFScKCgkwqkfnK6CVM3QDC2oUkPajRjD71u1gnR4oiL6XsN9rZ4NGZQZlB6XHwYqWvSdHEU6CcAo4xuEcYlgIXF38DehiA6hRsVri2vVOh-LlvymJlwb_2xN9u0Mt-rMM8CZgFzJX8Wat9TLhSuDQHzr4PkH_nbUaQ_cixUq4B5STFSZbkeZyVZ0NNFMXO5KCXlKMwLl5ME2JN353G_Y4pZmJcvbff9Wb79eINWazOAdqy7Xis1SKM6K8DSh-MU_iPw2XNkpsxX-UNyYZBfaQH248yPv0yaMoX7e9q2VO0gOhV3TNvnififfvg7AAD__wT4mpI "I’m only sending this to a small group so if everyone can add just $5 or $10, that’s all we need!")**

I always told my parents I'd make them proud.

_The same goes for you when we defy the odds and win it all ... TOGETHER!_

So what do you say?

God bless you,
Joe Teirab

---

clean_body: I was ready to sacrifice my life for my country. | | | | | I was on my way to a warzone. Before I deployed, I looked back at this last picture taken on the day I became a Marine: my father - an immigrant from Sudan, and my mother - the daughter of a POW in WWII. Then I hugged my parents for the last time. Or so I thought. | Hi - I'm Joe Teirab and luckily, God spared my life and I made it back home. But service for your country doesn't just fade away when you hang up your uniform for the last time... Now God is calling me to serve in a different way: "I’m running for Congress because the values you and I hold dear are facing extinction." Unfortunately, my opponent not only doesn't believe in those values - she rejects them. And she's a powerful sitting Democrat with the entire Liberal Machine watching her flank. I know I can defeat her but I'll be honest with you: My campaign is the underdog in this race. My opponent has Joe Biden 's ear and if I can't rally a last-minute defense, they'll wipe the floor with me. So my campaign is in your hands. Would you be willing to pitch in just a few bucks to push me over the top? | | "PLEASE DONATE NOW" I set a goal of raising $350 from this email. "I’m only sending this to a small group so if everyone can add just $5 or $10, that’s all we need!" I always told my parents I'd make them proud. The same goes for you when we defy the odds and win it all ... TOGETHER! So what do you say? God bless you, Joe Teirab | | | | PAID FOR BY JOE TEIRAB FOR CONGRESS Joe Teirab is a veteran of the U.S. Marine Corps. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Marine Corps or the Department of Defense. PO BOX 1894 BURNSVILLE, MN 55337 The Republican Team PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| | **Biden retiring the US dollar? Could be replaced with this...**
---
| | In one of the most despicable acts every committed by a sitting president, Blundering Joe Biden – without the approval of Congress or the American people – quietly signed **[Executive Order 14067.](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJw8kb2O2zAQhJ9m1VmgltRfoeISRdckCJDiijTCmlrJdEiJIKnzOU8fyHFSEZgZDL7hkvPWzPcO6k-AeDFTBESQL4C4vL1f9x_4-1s69T_f3OnL1X0Vh4ufATHdPf-PPltydmTsodZ9NnXnstFVm3FX1KKRDSpVZZeurkpdlEVRsmDdNjzNQpPS4qxL2RJhZjoUqAQWLR6PyqtZSjUTnaVQSqsalHB3chyMptVTCmZL-RaWzHaXlHx8MA2Agw9b7inQZBa38i1aTolDPLKAgwMcEFssmxbksCc3Op7M7kD2zx3VIcZtD5pB9qu243Po09LkPJllBdk_gNWJli3QaM2cxnVLPAZ29Iv_xbc18Zr-Vp0Sx1SgBKzG1ZoJZP8Re77R-2t4eYiPY8h-aT6u-_W7eM1CN_mbsdbE6viD5YDM9eb-BAAA__8hco96)**

What makes this so disturbing?

Well, buried inside this order is a sinister provision that could give the government _unprecedented_ control over your money and freedom.

In fact, this provision could set the stage for
* Legal government surveillance of all US citizens

* Total control over your bank accounts and purchases

* And the ability to silence all dissenting voices for good

It’s no wonder Fox News recently called this “a deeply troubling development.”

Still, most Americans have never even _heard_ of Executive Order 14067.

That’s why today, Jim Rickards – a world-renowned economist and former advisor to both the CIA and the Pentagon – has just sounded the alarm on this troubling new development.

In **[his critical presentation](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJw8kU-vlDAUxT_NZTcE7u10YMFCrbjxX9S8RDekwIUptrQpxef46Q3j-FZNzjk5-Z1e7YI1062By2tAvJpxA0SgV4A4P_1a9i_450M6qR9P7vR2ce-Lw8U3gJhugV-ij5acnTb2UC8qG5v-XA2yzrgpL0VFFQohs2vTk6h6XSHXVMuyJO6pF9WZRlFyKSVmpsECRYFljccjcjkRiUnrngohBnEBUbibdhzNoNegUzQ-5T7OmW2uKYXtztQCtiH6POioRzO7lZ83yylx3I4sYOsAW8Qaz1UN1O7JdY5Hszsg9dghD3HzexwYSK2D7R5DH9agXdBmXoHUHVic9Oyj7qyZUrf6xF1kp3_y_7hfE6_pX9Up8ZZKJEDZrdaMQOqzUh-_Tsv38dtdvB-D1Fz9XvblU_Eui80Yno21ZpPHH8wHZD549zcAAP__7_OOFA)** , he reveals the shocking truth about Biden’s Executive Order...

**And why it’s a direct threat to the freedom of _every single American citizen._**

In fact, according to Mr. Rickards, this order could mean the _end_ of the U.S. dollar as we know it.

“We’re in for a major upheaval of the U.S. dollar,” he says.

“In fact, I predict the 3rd Great Dollar Earthquake has already started...

“The first was Roosevelt confiscating private gold in 1934...

“The second was Nixon abandoning the gold standard in 1971...

“Now,” he says, “Biden’s plan could pave the way for ‘retiring’ the U.S. dollar – and replacing it with **this disturbing new alternative.** ”

And this is NOT some far-off pipe dream.

This is happening right now.

“Executive Order 14067 already gives President Biden unprecedented power over the future of the U.S. dollar,” he says. “And sadly, most Americans will be completely caught off guard by it.”

That’s why Mr. Rickards released **[this must-see presentation](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJw8kc2u0zAUhJ_mZNfIPXadZJHFveSGDT-CRZHYRK59mrr4T45DKU-PUgorSzOj0Tc-yidnz_cemldAvFizACLwF0Ccjz-v61f8_bHshu9Hv3u7-g9sc_EdIJZ7ov_RZ0tNXlm3qc1Qmf50aLXsKur3DWt5i0LI6tKTYJIOTOPJIOMkW832J9kZ1siukwor2yNDwXDf4faIWp45F2elTpwJoUUDgvm78pStViGpkm0sdcxz5fpLKWl5MI2AY8qxTiorY2cf6LY4KoXysmUBRw84InZ4aDvg41r85MnY1QMfnjvkJi5xzZqAD0G76Tn0aWnlk7JzAD48gMVOzTGrydlzmUIsNGXy6gf9i8dQKJS_VbtCS9kjB5RTcNYAH94-vX4TL3g0Xx7i4xh8mNtf1_X6mb2vcm_SzTpnF7n9wbxB1jr6PwEAAP__D4GNxQ)** , which explains – in detail – how you can prepare for this critical event NOW...

Including 4 simple steps you can take TODAY to actually _profit_ from the fallout.

**[Click here to watch this urgent presentation from Jim Rickards now.](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJw8kUGPmzAUhH_N4xbkvOc15sChLaWXripV2pW2F-RgQ8za2DKmafrrK1Lak6WZ0egbP-Wjs-O9geojIF6tXgER6AMgTq8_5-07_n7Op_bHqz99nv1Xtrv4CRDzPZr_0aOlNF5Zt6tVW-jm8iQHURemOVdMkkTORXFtpGDMKKxEpXmldT1KoosccRQVkaShsA0y5AzPNe4PL8VIxEelLsQ4H3gFnPm78ibZQS1R5WRDLkOaCtdcc47rg6kD7GIKZVRJaTv5xdxWZ3I2ad2zgJ0H7BBrfJI1ULdl33uj7eaB2mOH2MU1bGkwQO0yuP4YeliD8lHZaQFqH8D8pKaQVO_smPslZNMn49W7-RcPSzZL_lt1ymbNZyRA0S_OaqB2fH-eX17e3m7xIT6OQe0kf83b_I19KVKj4806Z1ex_8G0Q5ZD8H8CAAD__1vtjsw)**

**BREAKING NEWS:****DEMOCRAT ESTABLISHMENT ANNOUNCES FULL SUPPORT FOR RADICAL LEFTIST IN AMERICA 'S MOST HOTLY CONTESTED CONGRESSIONAL ELECTION.**

Friend,

The left has just set the stage for 2024. Our conservative majority will either be WON or LOST here in Iowa. Now that the Leftist Establishment in D.C. has declared its support for my opponent, underhanded deals and backroom politicking will ensure her campaign is well-funded and well-supplied.

Folks, **Securing the border isn 't quantum physics. _We 've done it before._**

But President Biden keeps fighting us every step of the way.
It's no secret that Biden has fallen short of his responsibilities as president to keep our country secure and safe.

Instead of prioritizing the American people, he seems to be more concerned with appeasing the Mexican Government.

_It 's concerning._

**[We cannot stand idly by while our nation's security is compromised for the benefit of a corrupt cartel-run government.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=4d3d6efa2b2e47e4aa1f0d1870f30e7c&_e=-M3fYTmLpj7jHL_MbHKw-hDSQyP1yE9YUrwyniURgc_evHdam5mDRtkbrtM22bf__3nkPEe2UdymWeYJMMmSaoHimaobBQtBoE1N2mQVHuO1_dCvMsTSyxou9NOOUVQiMF7CjTCiWq2v701qSSZs96olcJnd4h4BLieu1sb1zglakOipALgqljp9p439GGqWXloQSVoYn3dT6txycCFIyJteKKmNQydjK66tJiPGtWT5ybKyrWYOfnXZr9Br0nean2atp8l4Mshc1bl_MVOHGf7bHmnQ4XL4hI16oEJbHahlJixylE8PkDrDtu9S8FIOCr51pQUBgUh_kG3e2_JYWvFwmrPOS3_5l7cMBAXxE1L999OMOVPBfFUXFa2i9mA-)**

The path to the House Majority – and path back to a government that works for Oregon families – runs through toss-up races like ours. And with Republicans barely holding on to their Majority, we know this will only intensify their efforts to defeat us and keep this seat red. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Team Bynum Janelle Bynum is running to represent Oregon's Fifth Congressional District. With a reputation as a tireless champion for real progress, Janelle has worked in the State Legislature to safeguard our rights, lower costs, and create pathways to success for the next generation. Oregon's 5th District is one of the most competitive – and most flippable – seats in the country. Janelle has what it takes to win, but she can't do it without you. Will you make a grassroots donation today? | = | Janelle Bynum is running for in Oregon's 5th Congressional District. Dear Peter,
It's a clear sign we are a threat when the Democratic National Committee (DNC) launches a vicious attack against our campaign for President.
The DNC sponsored Billboards in Michigan, accusing the Kennedy for President campaign of being “powered” by a Trump donor, signals that their candidate, Joe Biden, is in deep trouble.
They understand RFK, Jr. is a real force against the Establishment and the status quo. That's why they're doubling down on their attacks, using lies and misrepresentations to discredit our campaign.
But we won't back down or be intimidated by their attempts to silence us. [Please give now to show the DNC that every time they come after us, our support and donations will only surge in response.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_panic_attack_2_19_24_nd3&n=3)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_panic_attack_2_19_24_nd3&n=4)
The billboards in Michigan are yet another testament to the corruption within the Democratic Party. Their willingness to resort to attacks, deceit, and false accusations, labeling RFK, Jr. as a "spoiler candidate," reflects their desperation and lack of integrity.
_They are in full-blown panic mode._
The DNC has resorted to more than just billboards. They fired the first shot by filing a complaint with the FEC, concocting false allegations of illegal coordination between our campaign and a PAC.
Their attempts to smear this campaign show that the two-party system is corrupt and rigged against independent candidates like RFK, Jr.
But we won't let them — _you_ won’t let them — get in the way of achieving our goals and fighting for a better America.
We need your help to show the DNC that their attacks only fuel our confidence, and we are resolved more than ever to fight for what we believe in. [Every dollar you donate and every message you share helps us amplify our message and push back against their lies.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_panic_attack_2_19_24_nd3&n=5)

clean_body: Vandalizing signs. | = | Peter, I’ve faced many tough elections and I will never forget how nasty it got last cycle. Take a look at what happened to our signs: = This is exactly the kind of thing that makes people so cynical about politics. It’s what convinces people out of running for office. Why raise your hand to help your community if your family will have to live through seeing things like this? = = I’ve done lots of reflecting on it, and I’ve decided I refuse to be intimidated. I ran for office to help, and these extremists will not deter me. It’s in communities like mine that Democrats can’t be scared to stand up. So, no matter how many times our signs are vandalized, I’m staying in this race. Because this work matters. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- \- Josh *

name: Mario for Congress
subject: Almost petition time in NY-24!
body:
Dear Friends and Supporters of Mario,

As we count down to petition time, we need your help to get Mario on the ballot for Congress in NY-24!

24 for 24 Campaign
Would you be a part of our 24 for 24 Campaign? We are looking for volunteers to commit to collecting at least 24 signatures in District 24!

What does this entail? In order for a candidate to be on the ballot for Congress, they need hundreds of signatures from registered Republican voters in our district. You can help by gathering signatures - either going door to door or simply asking your friends and family. We will have several weeks to fill our petitions, starting February 27th. It's not hard!

If you would like to help be a part of our 24 for 24 Campaign, simply reply to this email or sign up to volunteer at www.MarioforCongress.com<https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=http-3A__www.marioforcongress.com_&d=DwMFAw&c=euGZstcaTDllvimEN8b7jXrwqOf-v5A_CdpgnVfiiMM&r=KYJwm6S2jzgq1T5OTALZufAz7RKMYdaMO9lRNEuS1d4&m=Jm3TTUymupI8mxqZhBAFie3ZQwZXY-DmXoTFB-__VFe4946o4mlxRWObeMN42gpj&s=uspqBd7eUIvMiNoiEN7Kqji22fuuH1fJKewWbB2iSZc&e=>. We will provide additional information and answer any questions you may have to help with the process. A big THANK YOU to those who have reached out to help already! We couldn't do this without you.

Join us in this exciting next step to sending Mario Fratto to Congress for District 24 in 2024!

www.MarioforCongress.com<https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=http-3A__www.marioforcongress.com_&d=DwMFAw&c=euGZstcaTDllvimEN8b7jXrwqOf-v5A_CdpgnVfiiMM&r=KYJwm6S2jzgq1T5OTALZufAz7RKMYdaMO9lRNEuS1d4&m=Jm3TTUymupI8mxqZhBAFie3ZQwZXY-DmXoTFB-__VFe4946o4mlxRWObeMN42gpj&s=uspqBd7eUIvMiNoiEN7Kqji22fuuH1fJKewWbB2iSZc&e=>
[cid:bb97c6bb-955e-46c5-bf36-1b480e130999]

name: MAGA PATRIOTS
subject: DO NOT FORWARD THIS EMAIL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:

body:
One month from now, three right-wing Republicans are vying to take Sherrod Brown’s seat
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79327547/456137791/313806064?refcode=odp_em_240219_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWIzNTdjYy03ZWNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4MaSuRoBHT-61WhEH6JBUURPkLZpx-0XsymF-AwkQjQ=) Team, One month from today, on March 19, Ohioans will head to the polls to cast our ballots in this year’s primary elections – and for Ohio Republicans, that means choosing their candidate to take on Senator Sherrod Brown in a race that could decide control of the United States Senate. While we won’t know the winner for another month, here’s what we do know:**Every single one of these Republicans is bad for Ohio.** Every one of them supports a ban on abortion. Every one of them has prioritized attacking each other (and Senator Brown!) while avoiding talking about the issues that matter to Ohioans – issues like prescription drug costs and job creation. And every one of them will take Ohio backward if elected. ****[We can’t afford to end up with Senator Moreno, LaRose, or Dolan – and we definitely can’t wait until after the primary to fight back. Please, rush $5 right now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79327548/456137792/313806064?refcode=odp_em_240219_2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWIzNTdjYy03ZWNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4MaSuRoBHT-61WhEH6JBUURPkLZpx-0XsymF-AwkQjQ=)**** In their recent debates, Ohio’s Republican Senate candidates have made it crystal clear that they don’t have any plans to fight for Ohioans: They’re in this race for themselves and their ultra-conservative, deep-pocketed allies. And national Republicans are already digging deep: a GOP super PAC has put _$83 million_ into attacking Sherrod Brown and flipping Ohio’s Senate seat red. **** ****[This race is going to be one of the most consequential in the country, and we need to hit the ground running. If you can, chip in $5 right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79327549/456137793/313806064?refcode=odp_em_240219_2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWIzNTdjYy03ZWNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4MaSuRoBHT-61WhEH6JBUURPkLZpx-0XsymF-AwkQjQ=)**** Thank you, Ohio Democrats ** ** | ******Control of the House and Senate runs right through Ohio this year. I don’t know where else to turn, so I’m reaching out to you in a pinch. **[I’m under heavy fire, and I desperately need cover now.](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=769ec86edca84ef5ad5b340b7742aaa0&_e=c2ma81xnfgetu4MX8gRCAAuwMZf0s6MNlfdfgoUqMpIwg80xeuK0d1PXJ5x1n75aTrfNOn9DRmnGbcmPqNY4xmyweDN0-Ce3AMXT40T0HTMJthl8fnzyw-93zAHMrnqVvrWd29d5BetJdy_7lbj4gmKQ-BaAANFS0_nQeByXD2KbFECK6jtwGroe1SD_9ExWoJmToBxZs0ebTVQJ6Ijn6oaAEzPmaTi_Pe1o_tM4IAweakJC8K2LCgiZfzSQj4KUn0iPWPWhli5DvjaGwbScf_eenLDU8YaNlLdA2Q-9Ifqn_dUwNNFmDF7i95TZpYenbL18TvqUNf84zoGHI4NF9EeSf_Sgy1i9kGLf8Z92X8R2gKbtkr3TUyAUPnELvB_BUelzmLPMUaUnA4MeN2k_iA%3D%3D)**

As a U.S. Army veteran, I know what it’s like to go up against a dangerous enemy.

I used to fight foreign threats, like radical Islamic terrorists. Now, I fight to protect our country here at home.

What’s perhaps most alarming: there is growing support for radical Islamic terrorists in Congress from the Radical Left.

My top priority: _stopping them from destroying our country from within._

But **I am under heavy fire** for supporting Israel and speaking out against the radical Democrats.

**[With help from my fellow soldiers, I survived getting blown up by a Taliban bomb. With your help, I can survive enemy attacks from the Radical Left. name: Sen. Rosen (D-NV)
subject: From the synagogue to the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
how I first got involved in politics
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79327672/456138237/2128632416?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3478-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTg2OWYzMS04MGNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iesB6ExK9_oX3yUehUTc94L_t8UJKVCzrJoElJ9fw-4=)
Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics, friend?
While serving as the president of Nevada's largest synagogue, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that _this_ was my entry point to public service – **because my Judaism helps guide much of my work in the Senate today.** **In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it.**
Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country.** ** And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on reproductive freedom to threats to tear down our very democracy, I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen. **But I need your help.**

clean_body: how I first got involved in politics | | | = Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics, friend? While serving as the president of Nevada's largest synagogue, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that this was my entry point to public service – because my Judaism helps guide much of my work in the Senate today. In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it. Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country. And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on reproductive freedom to threats to tear down our very democracy, I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen. But I need your help. body:
want to tell you why it’s critical for us to take back our culture and education from the radical left...

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3zCIJa9AIe_vfGaJaPMo0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRntnY-P0SNaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2dhaW5lcyZ1dG1fdGM9VUNOLTIwMjQwMjE5JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cmV2c2hhcmUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1sb2dvVwNzcGNCCmXOF-jTZYLpv69SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

This is a deeply personal email, but I want to tell you why it's critical for us to take back our culture and education from the radical left... not just in sports, but even in children's books.

My story begins at the University of Kentucky. I was on the swim team. I am a 12-time NCAA all-American, 5x SEC champion, and SEC record holder in the butterfly.

But then it all changed for a photo-opt.

In March of 2022, I and other female swimmers were forced to compete with a male, Lia Thomas. We watched as this male swam to a title, beating out Olympians and other record holders. Despite tying Lia to the 100th of a second, the NCAA denied me the trophy because the NCAA claimed it was necessary to have Lia Thomas hold the trophy while photos were being taken.

The radical left reduced everything I worked my entire life for down to a photo opt.

But that's not all...

I was forced to share locker rooms with a 6'4" man.

**_This is where the madness needs to end because it 's not just sports where the radical gender ideology movement is dominating_.**

Now, children's literature is injected with this radical gender ideology movement.

[You can help me STOP this madness by making an urgent donation to SkyTree Book Fairs, which is combating Scholastic's transgender woke propaganda, by creating a wholesome and age-appropriate book fair alternative for parents, students, and educators. Click here to donate ANY amount!](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TluCVfDevMr4lEu_qp3hNA~~/AARclAA~/RgRntnY-P0STaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2dhaW5lcyZ1dG1fdGM9VUNOLTIwMjQwMjE5JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cmV2c2hhcmUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD10ZXh0X2xpbmsxVwNzcGNCCmXOF-jTZYLpv69SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Some of the books are too gross to even share with you on this email. But here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers.

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_6AJs84Bl0Ngf9MfMTs4RA~~/AARclAA~/RgRntnY-P0SOaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2dhaW5lcyZ1dG1fdGM9VUNOLTIwMjQwMjE5JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cmV2c2hhcmUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1pbWFnZVcDc3BjQgplzhfo02WC6b-vUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Full stop: This needs to end. No compromising. No more excuses.

While Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs, one organization is fighting back, and I am urgently asking for you to support them as you have supported my fight to defend women's sports.

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

[Can you help me raise $50,000 in the next 48 hours toward SkyTree in order for them to host dozens of book fairs? Click here to chip in $35, $50, or even $100 >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/J1v8u-JTSNFYVgn2aXe8hA~~/AARclAA~/RgRntnY-P0STaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2dhaW5lcyZ1dG1fdGM9VUNOLTIwMjQwMjE5JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cmV2c2hhcmUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD10ZXh0X2xpbmsyVwNzcGNCCmXOF-jTZYLpv69SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

[Donate](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6FZ0tMCbAxnXnF5BM2sa_Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRntnY-P0SXaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2dhaW5lcyZ1dG1fdGM9VUNOLTIwMjQwMjE5JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cmV2c2hhcmUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wYSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1kb25hdGVfYnV0dG9uMVcDc3BjQgplzhfo02WC6b-vUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

**Why this matters:**

You may remember Scholastic book fairs. All the kids used to love it when they came to school. It was a catalog of all the stories I got to read. It used to be an innocent event.

Unfortunately, that's all changed.

Scholastic now promotes woke, radical LGBT books. They promote a radical agenda over the well-being of kids.

And make no mistake, Scholastic is the nation's leading hotbed. Ellie Berger, president of Scholastic's trade publishing division, wrote, "We pledge to stand with you as we redouble our efforts to combat the laws restricting children's access to books."

With over 120,000 book fairs a year, Scholastic is the biggest pusher of transgender, woke propaganda to school children.

That's why it's urgent we create more SkyTree book fairs.

SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

However, SkyTree Book Fairs is a David VS. Goliath battle.

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $4,500 to host each book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/the-space-business-is-taking-off?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4d22c73c-3da6-433e-abe9-f4d42ed5184c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
On Thursday February 15, 2024, a SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket successfully launched a private lunar lander in what may prove to be a milestone in the private space industry. If successful, it will be America's first return to the moon since the [1972 Apollo mission](https://substack.com/redirect/8337b091-7df4-4251-a4da-1c2a528044cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But perhaps more importantly, it would be the first time a **private** company has reached the surface of the moon. All prior attempts to reach the moon by private enterprises have failed.
Approximately 49 minutes after the rocket's launch, the SpaceX rocket deployed the 1,490 pound Odysseus lander, designed and manufactured by [Houston-based Intuitive Machines](https://substack.com/redirect/4b77b7e6-5077-4304-80f8-85446c8de86c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). According to Space.com, "[Odysseus will soon start making its way toward lunar orbit, a journey that will take six days. Odysseus will then gear up for its historic landing attempt, which will take place at Malapert A, a small crater about 190 miles (300 kilometers) from the moon's south pole](https://substack.com/redirect/7e90c469-993a-49d4-81fc-c05986f94307?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6504bae8-0848-4e2c-ae79-c07ad95479f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Intuitive Machine's Odysseus lunar lander deploying on February 15th from a SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket to begin its six day journey to the moon; [Source: NasaTV](https://substack.com/redirect/7e90c469-993a-49d4-81fc-c05986f94307?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
For those interested in keeping tabs on Odysseus this week, [please visit the real time mission update page on Intuitive Machine's website](https://substack.com/redirect/2e16d204-8eb6-4ead-b41c-ec095298485e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). A successful landing on the moon would be, I believe, a watershed moment in the space industry that very well might be the space industry's version of the Internet's [1994 release of the Netscape Navigator](https://substack.com/redirect/744d5ed6-ecfa-4622-9b6c-a45bfb743325?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4kn6diBTemO2OwtMW0c3JBKwJiX1ZJecdCuB9j8xpf8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=141766173)
For those old enough to remember, Marc Andreessen's commercial browser was the first to offer an easy-to-use interface that enabled users to access the World Wide Web without having to be computer-savvy. It was an immediate blockbuster success that led to an eye-popping IPO for Netscape, and spurred an explosion of investment and innovation in commercial activity on the internet.
_Bloomberg Originals_ launched a docu-series in 2019 called _**[Giant Leap](https://substack.com/redirect/fe4fc8ae-4d02-46ff-8685-16d4455b5263?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ that focuses on the business of space: "**[In](https://substack.com/redirect/fe4fc8ae-4d02-46ff-8685-16d4455b5263?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/fe4fc8ae-4d02-46ff-8685-16d4455b5263?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[the not-too-distant future, entirely new industries will be developed in space](https://substack.com/redirect/fe4fc8ae-4d02-46ff-8685-16d4455b5263?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[. These are the stories about the entrepreneurs and visionaries who are taking that next Giant Leap](https://substack.com/redirect/fe4fc8ae-4d02-46ff-8685-16d4455b5263?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." (emphasis added)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/502b4a14-ea82-465e-a934-5fc47921ced5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The first episode, aired in October 2019, was titled "[Space: The Final Business Frontier](https://substack.com/redirect/b16bda92-f300-4e2d-8c38-5ad7099696f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." In it, Carissa Bryce Christensen, Founder and CEO of Bryce Space and Technology, notes that "There is a $200+ billion commercial space industry right now today" and over the last four years the business has boomed. By 2022, [Fortune estimated the commercial space industry had grown to more than $425 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/df5cceaa-7f2b-41f1-9ae0-05fc245ce044?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [McKinsey is projecting that it could grow to $1 trillion by 2030](https://substack.com/redirect/032544ce-da35-40d4-a429-f4c1224cb08c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I believe we are at an inflection point in the space industry and the next five years will see a massive acceleration in the number of new businesses and business models in the space economy. Consider the following chart from a 2023 McKinsey comment titled "A Giant Leap for the Space Industry," which might (in my opinion) actually be underestimating the industry's potential growth.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6daa210d-e13d-4747-bea9-793e07871d4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: ["A Giant Leap for the Space Industry" McKinsey & Company, January 19, 2023](https://substack.com/redirect/032544ce-da35-40d4-a429-f4c1224cb08c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
While it's impossible to list out every opportunity that will emerge for entrepreneurs in space, there are five emerging commercial space segments that illustrate the vast potential for business innovation in space: space transport, satellite communications, space manufacturing, space mining, and space tourism.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4kn6diBTemO2OwtMW0c3JBKwJiX1ZJecdCuB9j8xpf8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=141766173)
### _Space Transportation Services_
The remarkable success of SpaceX has demonstrated that the commercial launch industry is open for business. The lower right chart in the graphic above tells the story of what private enterprise has achieved. Launch costs per kilogram have plunged, enabling greater access to space for entrepreneurs looking to create space-based businesses.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c729c89d-bd40-4fff-884c-487812003faf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Just as the fall in data transmission prices increased consumer access to the World Wide Web and enabled entrepreneurs to start new internet businesses, so too have plunging launch costs enabled greater access to space for startups working on new space businesses. It's also worth noting that the launch industry itself is not done innovating. Large launch companies like SpaceX are offering low-cost transportation services between earth and a specific destination in space (usually determined by the largest customer on the rocket). The table below looks at a handful of the leading space transportation companies that are working to develop low-cost, reliable, and safe access to space for humans and payloads.
* * *
##### **Private Companies Providing Launch Services**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d6d9d9a1-a6ba-4d11-bb43-c4a86f8fdf0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [Balerion Space Ventures](https://substack.com/redirect/ddb6cf75-bf84-44b9-a47f-803435b949f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Think of such cargo ride-sharing as similar to a train, bus, or plane that takes everyone to the same spot. But customers may sometimes be willing to pay a bit extra to go to their preferred destination, a market that is well served by taxis, charter buses, or private planes. The same dynamic will occur in space and the demand for launch services targeting payload of less than 1,000 kgs to customized destinations is already booming. And the dynamic will create a virtuous cycle of launch innovation enabling other innovation, which may in turn spur more launch innovation. And while the demand for launch rockets has historically been driven by the need to launch satellites, the emergence of lunar missions (such as Odysseus) and services in space is a new and important driver.
It's also important to note that many of the large companies listed in the table above do more than merely provide launch services. They are building satellites and constructing constellations to provide services and have plans to expand into other businesses as well. It's also true for some of the smaller companies as well; Phantom, for instance, has two members of the SpaceX founding team leading its effort and is planning to offer both launch as well as satellite design and manufacturing services.1
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4kn6diBTemO2OwtMW0c3JBKwJiX1ZJecdCuB9j8xpf8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=141766173)
### _Satellite Communications Services_
For the foreseeable future, however, launch demand appears very robust, driven by the buildout of numerous new satellite constellations. McKinsey's aerospace and defense practice noted in March 2023 there were [5,000 communications satellites operating in space, with another 1,000 active satellites gathering data about the Earth, and about 1,500 pursuing other missions (research, technology development, etc.)](https://substack.com/redirect/43dc1b04-a28c-4aee-bf36-362b96370e98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The 2023 report further noted:
> _[Looking ahead, there are plans for a significant expansion to as many as 65,000 new communications satellites and 3,000 non-communications satellites (for applications such as Earth observation). In total, companies have proposed more than 100 new constellations. Direct-to-device concepts, which link satellites to cell phones, have also gained traction lately and could lead to additional new entrants. Even if not fully deployed, the new constellations will drive demand for services including intrasatellite links, ground terminals, analytical support, and potentially in-orbit maneuvering and debris removal.](https://substack.com/redirect/43dc1b04-a28c-4aee-bf36-362b96370e98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
One of the leading companies that is pioneering the satellite direct to phone business model is [Lynk Global, based in Falls Church, Virginia](https://substack.com/redirect/415201a4-a03e-418c-a098-fb345c71fcf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).2 Lynk is the world's only patented, proven, and commercially licensed satellite direct to standard phone system in the world. Once Lynk has its constellation built utilizing its proprietary technology, it will basically be tricking every device on the planet into thinking the satellite signal is coming from a local cell tower. The impact on life on Earth will be profound. No more dropped calls, no need to build out cell towers across the rural areas, and most importantly, no need to change the billions of devices that consumers globally have already gotten comfortable using. Hundreds of millions of currently disconnected individuals will be able to reap the rewards of modern communications and data as these cell towers in space disrupt the existing tower industry, improve coverage for mobile network operators, and ultimately lower the cost of connection while improving service quality globally.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0d594943-41ff-49d4-9cf0-fa7395ed7fa8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4kn6diBTemO2OwtMW0c3JBKwJiX1ZJecdCuB9j8xpf8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=141766173)
### _Space Manufacturing_
One of the annoying realities of industrial processes on Earth is that they are subject to gravity and the planet's environment. Space offers an environment of microgravity with no atmospheric pressure. As a result, space is an interesting place to experiment with manufacturing materials that might be created more efficiently or accurately without gravity.
One of the leading space manufacturing companies, Varda Space, has been working diligently on designing industrial experimentation options in space. They've created a vehicle in which to conduct manufacturing experiments in space and then return the vessel back to Earth. In fact, their W1 capsule is expected to touch down in Utah later this week with the results of an extended experiment in microgravity conditions where they believe they will have been able to autonomously grow crystals of ritonavir (an anti-viral drug used to treat HIV).
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d1128c40-41e6-4874-9194-faeaa13c5d5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In 2023, NASA partnered with ISS National Labs on a study that
> _[uses 3D cultures of neurons or nerve cells in microgravity and tests an approach to gene therapy. A process of transferring genetic material into cells, gene therapy shows promise for treating paralysis and neurological diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. The 3D structures needed to test these therapies ](https://substack.com/redirect/671b9d68-01d1-4d51-9f4f-5983327ce000?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[do not form](https://substack.com/redirect/671b9d68-01d1-4d51-9f4f-5983327ce000?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ in Earth's gravity, so microgravity provides a critical platform for this testing](https://substack.com/redirect/671b9d68-01d1-4d51-9f4f-5983327ce000?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_.
NASA also recently announced a new initiative, **In Space Production Applications** (INSPA), in partnership with ISS National Laboratory to "kickstart American manufacturing in orbit." The announcement video below highlights a focus on uniform crystals, fiber optics, artificial retinas, stem cells, bio-inks, next generation semiconductors, and cancer therapies.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ba65efa3-639e-4a89-abcf-d7afcf343cd0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And it's not just microgravity that's inspiring space manufacturing. The Earth's closed environment leads to concentrations of pollutants that may meaningfully impact the planet's long term health. As such, Jeff Bezos noted in 2021 after returning to Earth after a ride on Blue Origin's New Shepard into suborbital space that "[we need to take all heavy industry, all polluting industry, and move it into space. And keep Earth as this beautiful gem of a planet that it is](https://substack.com/redirect/79b20008-0152-49d2-a35c-7ad76ceb8247?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." (For anyone who wants to better understand the influences that drove some of Bezos' thinking on space, I'd encourage you to read Gerard O'Neil's _[The High Frontier: Human Colonies in Space](https://substack.com/redirect/149e340d-3048-4fa8-961c-83b436dfc7f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4kn6diBTemO2OwtMW0c3JBKwJiX1ZJecdCuB9j8xpf8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=141766173)
### _Space Mining_
Neil deGrasse Tyson, arguably the most famous astrophysicist alive today, noted in 2015, well before current investor interest in space, that "[The first trillionaire there will ever be is the person who exploits the natural resources on asteroids](https://substack.com/redirect/09f94563-8ca7-4194-9d28-03efc32882fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." If you think about the amount of effort that we deploy here on Earth to find the commodities we need to power our modern lives, you can see that there's likely enormous value to finding those commodities elsewhere.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fde79f42-b1c1-4c22-ba4f-1317fa67b767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[On October 13, 2023, NASA launched the Psyche mission, sending an orbiter to an asteroid that is currently orbiting the Sun between Mars and Jupiter](https://substack.com/redirect/63512cc0-fc81-43a9-8327-6324a0193177?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [The asteroid is the largest known metal-rich asteroid, worth an estimated $10,000 quadrillion](https://substack.com/redirect/86d1e05b-84a1-492c-b629-d6442d97b37c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The instruments on the orbiter going to the satellite include a multispectral imager, a gamma ray and neutron spectrometer, and a magnetometer. There is currently no way to even bring the asteroid close to earth, but that hasn't discouraged those seeking space riches to think about mining it.
But thinking about commodities in space in terms of their value on Earth may be the wrong way to think about the future of space mining. While the allure of finding value materials in space and bringing them to our planet is seductive, there may be more value in finding resources that are useful to humans in space. [Christian Lange, executive director of the Canadian Space Agency's Lunar Exploration Accelerator Program](https://substack.com/redirect/86d1e05b-84a1-492c-b629-d6442d97b37c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), has suggested that the goal of a human presence in deep space begins with the moon, then to Mars, etc. He goes on to say these "[exploration activities rely a lot on in situ resources so that when you get there, you don't need to bring all your stuff. You will be able to start using resources the planet or on the planetary body where you go.](https://substack.com/redirect/86d1e05b-84a1-492c-b629-d6442d97b37c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
Harvard Business School Professor Matthew Weinzierl and his Research Associate Mehak Sarang described this shift in a Harvard Business Review article titled "[The Commercial Space Age is Here](https://substack.com/redirect/6f8de7af-bc2b-4858-a2c2-a2c4edfca938?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." They describe it as a move from a _space-for-earth_ economy to a _space-for-space_ economy. And without question, the space-for-space economy offers an unprecedented opportunity for innovation and entrepreneurship.
### _Space Tourism_
The final area of the space industry that's worth considering as it's growing rapidly is space tourism. The concept of leaving planet Earth to experience a gravity free environment has been popular for years and years. The first real space tourist was Dennis Tito, an American entrepreneur and engineer. He paid the Russian Space Agency to take him aboard a Russian Soyuz spacecraft to the International Space Station. His orbital space trip lasted eight days.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8d1e2795-360b-45bb-956a-97a177fd8fe3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Dennis Tito became the first-ever space tourist in 2001, traveling to the ISS on a Russian Soyuz.| Image Credits: Mikhail Metzel / AP](https://substack.com/redirect/c236807c-1bf2-4508-99c4-b34b3d312f16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
More popular than orbital space tourism, which requires intense training to help tourists handle the extended weightlessness, is suborbital space tourism, which are much shorter duration trips that offer panoramic views of the Earth and the edge of our atmosphere. Because tourists are only weightless for a few minutes, the training is minimal. Companies like [Virgin Galactic](https://substack.com/redirect/e04a4c8e-c00a-4dd5-ac56-48de30a8df8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Blue Origin](https://substack.com/redirect/f398957f-e87d-4553-8e10-cbcf8bf8c9a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) offer suborbital space trips.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/710f4b6f-8ace-46e0-a224-dd87d69709c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Over time, it's likely that we will see the emergence of orbital and lunar hotels that offer space stays enabling visitors to have unique experiences while enjoying luxurious accommodations.
### _**Other Areas**_
There are so many other areas of the space business that will likely emerge to be large industries. The other domains that I am continuing to watch closely include space-to-space communication services, space traffic management (to help satellites and spacecraft maneuver around each other and to avoid colliding with space debris), propulsion and energy technologies, and lunar services, to name a few.
While there are sure to be bumps on the road and numerous failures and setbacks, the human thirst to explore seems insatiable and is likely to generate some gigantic business opportunities along the way. What do you think?

clean_body: A multi-trillion dollar economy is beginning to take shape | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? A multi-trillion dollar economy is beginning to take shape | | | Feb 19 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- On Thursday February 15, 2024, a SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket successfully launched a private lunar lander in what may prove to be a milestone in the private space industry. If successful, it will be America's first return to the moon since the . But perhaps more importantly, it would be the first time a private company has reached the surface of the moon. All prior attempts to reach the moon by private enterprises have failed. Approximately 49 minutes after the rocket's launch, the SpaceX rocket deployed the 1,490 pound Odysseus lander, designed and manufactured by . According to Space.com, "." | | ---|---|--- Intuitive Machine's Odysseus lunar lander deploying on February 15th from a SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket to begin its six day journey to the moon; For those interested in keeping tabs on Odysseus this week, . A successful landing on the moon would be, I believe, a watershed moment in the space industry that very well might be the space industry's version of the Internet's . For those old enough to remember, Marc Andreessen's commercial browser was the first to offer an easy-to-use interface that enabled users to access the World Wide Web without having to be computer-savvy. It was an immediate blockbuster success that led to an eye-popping IPO for Netscape, and spurred an explosion of investment and innovation in commercial activity on the internet. Bloomberg Originals launched a docu-series in 2019 called that focuses on the business of space: "." (emphasis added) The first episode, aired in October 2019, was titled "." In it, Carissa Bryce Christensen, Founder and CEO of Bryce Space and Technology, notes that "There is a $200+ billion commercial space industry right now today" and over the last four years the business has boomed. By 2022, , and . I believe we are at an inflection point in the space industry and the next five years will see a massive acceleration in the number of new businesses and business models in the space economy. Consider the following chart from a 2023 McKinsey comment titled "A Giant Leap for the Space Industry," which might (in my opinion) actually be underestimating the industry's potential growth. | | ---|---|--- Source: . While it's impossible to list out every opportunity that will emerge for entrepreneurs in space, there are five emerging commercial space segments that illustrate the vast potential for business innovation in space: space transport, satellite communications, space manufacturing, space mining, and space tourism. Space Transportation Services The remarkable success of SpaceX has demonstrated that the commercial launch industry is open for business. The lower right chart in the graphic above tells the story of what private enterprise has achieved. Launch costs per kilogram have plunged, enabling greater access to space for entrepreneurs looking to create space-based businesses. | | ---|---|--- Just as the fall in data transmission prices increased consumer access to the World Wide Web and enabled entrepreneurs to start new internet businesses, so too have plunging launch costs enabled greater access to space for startups working on new space businesses. It's also worth noting that the launch industry itself is not done innovating. Large launch companies like SpaceX are offering low-cost transportation services between earth and a specific destination in space (usually determined by the largest customer on the rocket). The table below looks at a handful of the leading space transportation companies that are working to develop low-cost, reliable, and safe access to space for humans and payloads. Private Companies Providing Launch Services | | ---|---|--- Source: Think of such cargo ride-sharing as similar to a train, bus, or plane that takes everyone to the same spot. But customers may sometimes be willing to pay a bit extra to go to their preferred destination, a market that is well served by taxis, charter buses, or private planes. The same dynamic will occur in space and the demand for launch services targeting payload of less than 1,000 kgs to customized destinations is already booming. And the dynamic will create a virtuous cycle of launch innovation enabling other innovation, which may in turn spur more launch innovation. And while the demand for launch rockets has historically been driven by the need to launch satellites, the emergence of lunar missions (such as Odysseus) and services in space is a new and important driver. It's also important to note that many of the large companies listed in the table above do more than merely provide launch services. They are building satellites and constructing constellations to provide services and have plans to expand into other businesses as well. It's also true for some of the smaller companies as well; Phantom, for instance, has two members of the SpaceX founding team leading its effort and is planning to offer both launch as well as satellite design and manufacturing services.1 Satellite Communications Services For the foreseeable future, however, launch demand appears very robust, driven by the buildout of numerous new satellite constellations. McKinsey's aerospace and defense practice noted in March 2023 there were . The 2023 report further noted: One of the leading companies that is pioneering the satellite direct to phone business model is Lynk is the world's only patented, proven, and commercially licensed satellite direct to standard phone system in the world. Once Lynk has its constellation built utilizing its proprietary technology, it will basically be tricking every device on the planet into thinking the satellite signal is coming from a local cell tower. The impact on life on Earth will be profound. No more dropped calls, no need to build out cell towers across the rural areas, and most importantly, no need to change the billions of devices that consumers globally have already gotten comfortable using. Hundreds of millions of currently disconnected individuals will be able to reap the rewards of modern communications and data as these cell towers in space disrupt the existing tower industry, improve coverage for mobile network operators, and ultimately lower the cost of connection while improving service quality globally. Space Manufacturing One of the annoying realities of industrial processes on Earth is that they are subject to gravity and the planet's environment. Space offers an environment of microgravity with no atmospheric pressure. As a result, space is an interesting place to experiment with manufacturing materials that might be created more efficiently or accurately without gravity. One of the leading space manufacturing companies, Varda Space, has been working diligently on designing industrial experimentation options in space. They've created a vehicle in which to conduct manufacturing experiments in space and then return the vessel back to Earth. In fact, their W1 capsule is expected to touch down in Utah later this week with the results of an extended experiment in microgravity conditions where they believe they will have been able to autonomously grow crystals of ritonavir (an anti-viral drug used to treat HIV). In 2023, NASA partnered with ISS National Labs on a study that . NASA also recently announced a new initiative, In Space Production Applications (INSPA), in partnership with ISS National Laboratory to "kickstart American manufacturing in orbit." The announcement video below highlights a focus on uniform crystals, fiber optics, artificial retinas, stem cells, bio-inks, next generation semiconductors, and cancer therapies. And it's not just microgravity that's inspiring space manufacturing. The Earth's closed environment leads to concentrations of pollutants that may meaningfully impact the planet's long term health. As such, Jeff Bezos noted in 2021 after returning to Earth after a ride on Blue Origin's New Shepard into suborbital space that "." (For anyone who wants to better understand the influences that drove some of Bezos' thinking on space, I'd encourage you to read Gerard O'Neil's ). Space Mining Neil deGrasse Tyson, arguably the most famous astrophysicist alive today, noted in 2015, well before current investor interest in space, that "." If you think about the amount of effort that we deploy here on Earth to find the commodities we need to power our modern lives, you can see that there's likely enormous value to finding those commodities elsewhere. . . The instruments on the orbiter going to the satellite include a multispectral imager, a gamma ray and neutron spectrometer, and a magnetometer. There is currently no way to even bring the asteroid close to earth, but that hasn't discouraged those seeking space riches to think about mining it. But thinking about commodities in space in terms of their value on Earth may be the wrong way to think about the future of space mining. While the allure of finding value materials in space and bringing them to our planet is seductive, there may be more value in finding resources that are useful to humans in space. , has suggested that the goal of a human presence in deep space begins with the moon, then to Mars, etc. He goes on to say these "" Harvard Business School Professor Matthew Weinzierl and his Research Associate Mehak Sarang described this shift in a Harvard Business Review article titled "." They describe it as a move from a space-for-earth economy to a space-for-space economy. And without question, the space-for-space economy offers an unprecedented opportunity for innovation and entrepreneurship. Space Tourism The final area of the space industry that's worth considering as it's growing rapidly is space tourism. The concept of leaving planet Earth to experience a gravity free environment has been popular for years and years. The first real space tourist was Dennis Tito, an American entrepreneur and engineer. He paid the Russian Space Agency to take him aboard a Russian Soyuz spacecraft to the International Space Station. His orbital space trip lasted eight days. | | ---|---|--- More popular than orbital space tourism, which requires intense training to help tourists handle the extended weightlessness, is suborbital space tourism, which are much shorter duration trips that offer panoramic views of the Earth and the edge of our atmosphere. Because tourists are only weightless for a few minutes, the training is minimal. Companies like and offer suborbital space trips. Over time, it's likely that we will see the emergence of orbital and lunar hotels that offer space stays enabling visitors to have unique experiences while enjoying luxurious accommodations. Other Areas There are so many other areas of the space business that will likely emerge to be large industries. The other domains that I am continuing to watch closely include space-to-space communication services, space traffic management (to help satellites and spacecraft maneuver around each other and to avoid colliding with space debris), propulsion and energy technologies, and lunar services, to name a few. While there are sure to be bumps on the road and numerous failures and setbacks, the human thirst to explore seems insatiable and is likely to generate some gigantic business opportunities along the way. What do you think? | | POLL What do you think of the Space business? | ? ? ? ? | | ---|---|--- VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. He currently serves on the board of Werner Enterprises (NASDAQ: WERN) and Phantom Space Corporation, as well as several non-profit. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, , and . Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | Jan 7 | 1 Please note that I am on the board of. 2 Please note that entities I control have invested in. 15 more days! | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65d3eaf1e866e078a7089abc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.jobyforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D65d3d31de866e078a7058927%26ss_email_id%3D65d3eaf1e866e078a7089abc%26ss_campaign_name%3DThe%2Bfinal%2Btwo%2Bdebates%2Bplus%2Bother%2Bexciting%2Bupdates%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-02-19T23%253A57%253A38Z&w=6514833727955b66bdb4f35b&c=b_65d3d31de866e078a7058927&l=en-US&s=gKKyGbnPfzLdh_d3M_3OCFzKsao%3D)
---
| Hi Friend -Last week we braved the rain and made it out to meet our newest CA-16 constituents along the coast! On Saturday, Joby participated in the Pacifica Democratic Club’s candidate forum. The rain cleared and sun came out just in time for some coastal canvassing afterwards. Sunday brought us back to Mountain View, where we had a breakfast meet & greet, thanks to Rebecca & Vivek for hosting. This was followed by canvassing across Monta Loma. **Ballots are out!** Only 15 more days to get your ballots in and **VOTE FOR JOBY!**
**UPCOMING EVENTS** **(Two more debates + a hike)****16th Congressional District Primary Forum** **on** _**Thursday, February 15, 6-7:30pm**_**.**_****_ Hosted by the Los Altos Institution and Palo Alto High School's Associated Student Body, Palo Alto High School, 50 Embarcadero Road, Palo Alto, CA 94301. Register [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65d3eaf1e866e078a7089abc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fforms.gle%2FdehU1eZepEcNgqp7A&w=6514833727955b66bdb4f35b&c=b_65d3d31de866e078a7058927&l=en-US&s=whN1v5OFBpD1QMgemGmTZCtmL2I%3D)**Social Media Jam Session!** Join us virtually _**Thursday, February 15 from 4-5pm**_ for an interactive hour of social media brainstorming! Email hello@jobyforcongress.com to be added to the coveted invite list. **Hike with Joby!** _**Sunday, February 25th from 8:30-9:30am**._ Join us for a beach hike in Pacifica and hear Joby’s thoughts about climate change and its impact on coastal communities. Following the hike, we’ll be volunteering with the Pacifica Beach Coalition to support habitat restoration efforts. clean_body: 15 more days! | | | | Hi Friend -Last week we braved the rain and made it out to meet our newest CA-16 constituents along the coast! On Saturday, Joby participated in the Pacifica Democratic Club’s candidate forum. The rain cleared and sun came out just in time for some coastal canvassing afterwards. Sunday brought us back to Mountain View, where we had a breakfast meet & greet, thanks to Rebecca & Vivek for hosting. This was followed by canvassing across Monta Loma. Ballots are out! Only 15 more days to get your ballots in and VOTE FOR JOBY! UPCOMING EVENTS (Two more debates + a hike)16th Congressional District Primary Forum on Thursday, February 15, 6-7:30pm.** Hosted by the Los Altos Institution and Palo Alto High School's Associated Student Body, Palo Alto High School, 50 Embarcadero Road, Palo Alto, CA 94301. Register Media Jam Session! Join us virtually Thursday, February 15 from 4-5pm for an interactive hour of social media brainstorming! Email hello@jobyforcongress.com to be added to the coveted invite list. Hike with Joby! Sunday, February 25th from 8:30-9:30am. Join us for a beach hike in Pacifica and hear Joby’s thoughts about climate change and its impact on coastal communities. Following the hike, we’ll be volunteering with the Pacifica Beach Coalition to support habitat restoration efforts. Linda Mar Beach, 5000 CA-1, Pacifica, CA 94044.Coastside Democratic Club Congressional Candidate Forum,Sunday, February 25th from 3-5pm.
